quests.name_ch: 银辇啊，迅赴那黑色大地
quests.name_en: Silver Chariot, Away to that Blackened Land

steps.ch: 匹诺康尼的旅程再次告一段落。如今列车能源告急，亟需一场足够「开拓」的旅程进行补充。
steps.en: The journey to Penacony has come to a close once again. With the Express running low on energy, a journey that is sufficiently Trailblazing is urgently needed to refuel.

steps.ch: 参加航线会议，决定列车的下一站
steps.en: Join the navigation meeting to decide the next destination of the Express

steps.ch: 打包行李，整装待发！
steps.en: Pack up and get ready to set off!

steps.ch: 在派对车厢稍作休憩，等待跃迁
steps.en: Take a short rest at the Party Car and wait for the warp jump

steps.ch: 临行时，三月七似乎身体抱恙……
steps.en: When setting off, March 7th seems to be feeling unwell...

steps.ch: 寻找一反常态的三月七
steps.en: Seek out March 7th, who seems to be out of sorts

steps.ch: 匹诺康尼的旅程再次告一段落。如今列车能源告急，亟需一场足够「开拓」的旅程进行补充。
steps.en: The journey to Penacony has come to a close once again. With the Express running low on energy, a journey that is sufficiently Trailblazing is urgently needed to refuel.

steps.ch: （可选）和伙伴们聊聊
steps.en: (Optional) Chat with your companions

steps.ch: 临行时，三月七似乎身体抱恙……
steps.en: When setting off, March 7th seems to be feeling unwell...

steps.ch: 听听伙伴们的看法
steps.en: Seek your companions' opinions

steps.ch: 三月七的缺席为这次的开拓之旅又添了一分不确定性。为了旅程能够尽可能顺利，姬子小姐决定启动「后备方案」。
steps.en: The absence of March 7th has introduced a new layer of uncertainty to this trailblazing expedition. To keep the expedition on course, Miss Himeko decides to activate the Backup Plan.

steps.ch: 前往观景车厢，准备启动「后备方案」
steps.en: Go to the Parlor Car and prepare to activate the Backup Plan

steps.ch: 列车车厢受袭迫降，好在我们并无大碍。初步判断，这个世界有文明存在。我们决定提高警惕，探索这片完全未知的土地。
steps.en: The coach was forced to make an emergency landing, but thankfully, we were both unharmed. Our initial assessment suggests that this world contains civilization. We resolve to remain vigilant as we explore this unfamiliar land.

steps.ch: 继续在翁法罗斯的开拓之旅
steps.en: Continue your trailblazing expedition in Amphoreus

quests.name_ch: 远客啊，请聆听此世祈祷
quests.name_en: Distant Travelers, Listen to this World's Prayer

steps.ch: 击败尼卡多利的一具分身后，黄金裔领袖阿格莱雅带我们来到云石天宫，用别样的方式为我们讲述了翁法罗斯的历史。
steps.en: After defeating a manifestation of Nikador, Aglaea, the leader of the Chrysos Heirs, guided us to Marmoreal Palace. There, she revealed the history of Amphoreus to us in a new and enlightening way.

steps.ch: 跟随阿格莱雅来到浴池边
steps.en: Follow Aglaea to the bath

steps.ch: 聆听翁法罗斯的创世神话
steps.en: Hear the creation myth of Amphoreus

steps.ch: 聆听不同口吻的创世神话
steps.en: Hear the creation myth in different tones

steps.ch: 在黄金裔浴场中，阿格莱雅以自己的方式确认了我们的善意，似乎奥赫玛愿意将我们奉为贵宾。希望此次开拓之行真能这般顺利吧。
steps.en: In the Chrysos Heirs bath, Aglaea affirmed our good intentions in her way, and it seems Okhema is willing to welcome us as honored guests. Let's hope this trailblazing expedition continues to unfold as smoothly.

steps.ch: 跟随阿格莱雅前进
steps.en: Move forward with Aglaea

steps.ch: 继续乘坐「电梯」
steps.en: Continue to take the Elevator

steps.ch: 与阿格莱雅对话
steps.en: Speak with Aglaea

steps.ch: 与丹恒会合
steps.en: Meet up with Dan Heng

steps.ch: 「圣城」奥赫玛…据说是如今的末世长夜中，唯一的永昼之地。我们决定在城中游历一番，了解此处风土人情，同时收集可靠信息。
steps.en: Okhema, the holy city... It is said to be the only place with eternal daylight amidst the end times' long night. We decide to tour the city to familiarize ourselves with the area and gather reliable information.

steps.ch: 前往云石市集
steps.en: Head to Marmoreal Market

steps.ch: 与聚集的群众交谈
steps.en: Talk with the gathered crowd

steps.ch: 尝试使用「欧洛尼斯奇迹」
steps.en: Try to use Oronyx's Miracle

steps.ch: 前往屋顶
steps.en: Head to the rooftop

steps.ch: 继续探索奥赫玛
steps.en: Continue to explore Okhema

steps.ch: 拿取少量大地兽饲料
steps.en: Take out a small amount of dromas feed

steps.ch: 投喂大地兽
steps.en: Feed the dromas

steps.ch: 再次拿取大地兽饲料
steps.en: Take the dromas feed again

steps.ch: 再次尝试投喂大地兽
steps.en: Try to feed the dromas again

steps.ch: 准备返回云石天宫
steps.en: Prepare to return to Marmoreal Palace

steps.ch: 和讨论「粉霞天女」的公民对话
steps.en: Speak with the citizen who are talking about the Rosy Celestial Maiden

steps.ch: （可选）继续探索奥赫玛城区
steps.en: (Optional) Continue to explore the Okhema city area

steps.ch: 在我们准备返回浴宫之时，三月七的照片意外流出，还被奥赫玛的居民们传颂为「粉霞天女」，闹出了不小的风波。
steps.en: As we prepared to return to the bath chamber, March 7th's photographs were unexpectedly leaked, and she was celebrated by the residents of Okhema as the "Rosy Celestial Maiden," causing quite a stir.

steps.ch: 前往浴场打听达米亚诺斯的去向
steps.en: Head to the baths to inquire about Damionis' whereabouts

steps.ch: 寻找达米亚诺斯
steps.en: Search for Damionis

steps.ch: 「粉霞天女」风波差点闹出人命。我们以暴露天外来客身份为代价救下了执着的达米亚诺斯，只是，如此一来…便违背了对阿格莱雅的承诺。
steps.en: The "Rosy Celestial Maiden" fiasco almost caused someone their life. We rescued the persistent Damionis at the cost of exposing our identities as guests from beyond the sky. But in doing so... we broke our promise to Aglaea.

steps.ch: 追上达米亚诺斯
steps.en: Catch up with Damionis

steps.ch: 与达米亚诺斯交流
steps.en: Speak with Damionis

steps.ch: 寻找「真言狮口」，尝试平息风波
steps.en: Search for Verax Leo to try calm the storm

steps.ch: 好在「粉霞天女」风波结束得够快，黄金裔们暂未发觉。为感谢我们先前从尼卡多利手中保护奥赫玛，阿格莱雅似有谢礼要送。
steps.en: Fortunately, the "Rosy Celestial Maiden" fiasco was quickly resolved before the Chrysos Heirs discovered it. As a token of gratitude for saving Okhema from Nikador, Aglaea seems to have prepared a special gift for us.

steps.ch: 与缇宝会合
steps.en: Meet up with Tribbie

steps.ch: 与缇宝一起去见阿格莱雅
steps.en: Go see Aglaea with Tribbie

steps.ch: （可选）远眺万径之门
steps.en: (Optional) View the Gate of Infinity from a distance

steps.ch: 进入私人浴宫
steps.en: Enter the private bath chamber

steps.ch: 环顾私人浴宫
steps.en: Look around the private bath chamber

steps.ch: 「圣城」奥赫玛…据说是如今的末世长夜中，唯一的永昼之地。我们决定在城中游历一番，了解此处风土人情，同时收集可靠信息。
steps.en: Okhema, the holy city... It is said to be the only place with eternal daylight amidst the end times' long night. We decide to tour the city to familiarize ourselves with the area and gather reliable information.

steps.ch: 好在「粉霞天女」风波结束得够快，黄金裔们暂未发觉。为感谢我们先前从尼卡多利手中保护奥赫玛，阿格莱雅似有谢礼要送。
steps.en: Fortunately, the "Rosy Celestial Maiden" fiasco was quickly resolved before the Chrysos Heirs discovered it. As a token of gratitude for saving Okhema from Nikador, Aglaea seems to have prepared a special gift for us.

steps.ch: 通过灵水盆进入「创世涡心」
steps.en: Enter the Vortex of Genesis via the spirit basin

quests.name_ch: 晚星啊，莫让我长夜独卧

steps.ch: 整理心情，好好休息吧
steps.en: Calm your mood and rest up

steps.ch: 整理心情，好好休息吧
steps.en: Calm your mood and rest up

steps.ch: 跟随白厄了解黄金裔的救世苦旅后，我们最终还是决定留在翁法罗斯。经过一番休整，众黄金裔再度集结，准备向尼卡多利所在的悬锋城发起讨伐，夺取「天谴之矛」的火种。
steps.en: After understanding from Phainon the Chrysos Heirs' arduous journey to save the world, we ultimately decided to remain in Amphoreus. After a period of rest and recovery, the Chrysos Heirs reconvened, readying themselves for an attack against Castrum Kremnos, where Nikador was, with the goal of seizing the Coreflame of the Lance of Fury.

steps.ch: 将听见梦中之声一事告诉丹恒
steps.en: Tell Dan Heng about the voice you heard in your dream

steps.ch: 前往黄金裔浴场与众人会合
steps.en: Go to the Chrysos Heir baths and meet with everyone

steps.ch: 与缇安对话， 准备前往悬锋城
steps.en: Speak with Trianne and get ready to go to Castrum Kremnos

quests.name_ch: 荒墟啊，可曾记旧日荣光
quests.name_en: Wasteland, Hark Back Glory of Old

steps.ch: {NICKNAME}与白厄、万敌来到了悬锋城。曾经兵戈作响的尚战之邦，如今已成了一座阴森的荒墟。疯溃的尼卡多利就身在这座移动堡垒的深处。
steps.en: {NICKNAME}, Phainon, and Mydei arrive at Castrum Kremnos. What was once a fierce city filled with the clamor of armaments has become a haunting ruin. Deep within this mobile fortress lies the maddened and fallen Nikador.

steps.ch: 继续前进，探索悬锋城
steps.en: Continue onward and explore Castrum Kremnos

steps.ch: 身处这纷争的国度，白厄与万敌两位黄金裔一时兴起，相约开启竞技，兵分两路杀入悬锋城中。城内机关遍地、危机四伏，必须小心翼翼地前进。
steps.en: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

steps.ch: 前往左侧神殿
steps.en: Go to the temple at the left

steps.ch: 继续前进，深入悬锋城
steps.en: Continue onward deep into Castrum Kremnos

steps.ch: 击败城中的眷属，收集徽记
steps.en: Defeat the Titankins in the city and collect their crests

steps.ch: 已收集的悬锋徽记：
steps.en: Collected Kremnos crests:

steps.ch: 利用「预言算碑」关闭落雷
steps.en: Use the Prophecy Tablet to shut the thunderbolt

steps.ch: 替三月七拍照留念
steps.en: Help March 7th take a picture as a keepsake

steps.ch: 利用「预言算碑」打开大门
steps.en: Use the Prophecy Tablet to open the door

steps.ch: 破解房间内机关，继续前进
steps.en: Solve the mechanism of the room and continue your exploration

steps.ch: 与万敌会合
steps.en: Meet up with Mydei

steps.ch: 借黄金狮首之口，{NICKNAME}一行人得知疯溃的尼卡多利正在酝酿针对奥赫玛的恐怖袭击。事已至此，唯有继续前进，挫败恶意的源头。
steps.en: Through Chryseus Leo, {NICKNAME} and the party learned that the maddened Nikador is planning a devastating attack on Okhema. With events taking this dire turn, their only option is to press forward and eliminate the source of this malevolence.

steps.ch: 继续前进，寻找其它可交流的眷属
steps.en: Continue to search for and talk with other Titankin

steps.ch: 去吧！直面「天谴之矛」尼卡多利
steps.en: Go and meet Nikador, Lance of Fury!

steps.ch: 身处这纷争的国度，白厄与万敌两位黄金裔一时兴起，相约开启竞技，兵分两路杀入悬锋城中。城内机关遍地、危机四伏，必须小心翼翼地前进。
steps.en: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

steps.ch: 通过锁链桥前往对岸
steps.en: Cross the chain bridge to the other side

steps.ch: 调查安全区，收集信息
steps.en: Investigate the safe zone to collect information

quests.name_ch: 夜帷啊，轻遮那静默过往
quests.name_en: Night Veil, Shroud the Silent Past

steps.ch: 尼卡多利以神躯之百死淬炼剑刃，试图挥动「天谴之锋」刺穿远方的奥赫玛城。危急时刻，万敌独自殿后拖住尼卡多利，而其余人则回到奥赫玛，商议破局之法。
steps.en: Nikador invoked the Body of a Hundred Deaths to temper blades, aiming to swing the Blade of Fury to pierce the distant Okhema. In this moment of crisis, Mydei held off Nikador alone, giving the rest of the party a chance to return to Okhema and strategize a way to counter this threat.

steps.ch: 与阿格莱雅商议对策
steps.en: Discuss a plan with Aglaea

steps.ch: 遐蝶发觉尼卡多利的不死身源于它对「死亡」的背叛。为揭露深埋于岁月中的谜团，我们需要前往重渊借助欧洛尼斯的力量复现往日。
steps.en: Castorice realizes that Nikador's immortality is rooted in a betrayal of Death itself. To unravel the mystery hidden in the past, we must journey to the Abyss and borrow the power of Oronyx to replicate the past.

steps.ch: 与缇宝一同前往命运重渊
steps.en: Head with Tribbie to the Abyss of Fate

steps.ch: 进入破碎的神殿
steps.en: Enter the broken temple

steps.ch: 启用泰坦神迹切换时空
steps.en: Use the Titan Miracle to switch space-time

steps.ch: 尝试开启大门
steps.en: Try to open the entrance

steps.ch: 启用奇迹宝珠
steps.en: Use Miracle Orbs

steps.ch: 前往命运三相殿
steps.en: Head to the Temple of the Three Fates

steps.ch: 开启万径之门
steps.en: Open the Gate of Infinity

steps.ch: 我们成功进入了三相神殿。只是，欧洛尼斯并不欢迎我们，反而以各种谜题刁难，阻止我们进入神殿深处。
steps.en: We successfully entered the Temple of the Three Fates. However, Oronyx does not welcome our presence and complicates our path with various puzzles, blocking us from reaching the temple's deeper chambers.

steps.ch: 继续前进
steps.en: Continue forward

steps.ch: 尝试利用奇迹典籍修复天秤
steps.en: Try using the Tome of Miracles to repair the scales

steps.ch: 遐蝶发觉尼卡多利的不死身源于它对「死亡」的背叛。为揭露深埋于岁月中的谜团，我们需要前往重渊借助欧洛尼斯的力量复现往日。
steps.en: Castorice realizes that Nikador's immortality is rooted in a betrayal of Death itself. To unravel the mystery hidden in the past, we must journey to the Abyss and borrow the power of Oronyx to replicate the past.

steps.ch: 我们成功进入了三相神殿。只是，欧洛尼斯并不欢迎我们，反而以各种谜题刁难，阻止我们进入神殿深处。
steps.en: We successfully entered the Temple of the Three Fates. However, Oronyx does not welcome our presence and complicates our path with various puzzles, blocking us from reaching the temple's deeper chambers.

steps.ch: 尝试配平天秤
steps.en: Try to balance the scales

steps.ch: 找到比「世界命运」更沉重之物
steps.en: Find something that has more weight than the "Fate of the World"

steps.ch: 尝试获取栅栏门后的砝码
steps.en: Try to retrieve the weight behind the fence

steps.ch: 使用预言算碑打开栅栏门
steps.en: Use Prophecy Tablet to open the way

steps.ch: 尝试用相同的砝码配平天秤
steps.en: Try using the same weights to balance the scales

steps.ch: 比「世界命运」更沉重之物…我们以取巧的方式，用三月七的相机通过了这项考验。
steps.en: An item heavier than the "Fate of the World"... We adopted a tricky method and used March 7th's camera to solve this puzzle.

steps.ch: 我们成功进入了三相神殿。只是，欧洛尼斯并不欢迎我们，反而以各种谜题刁难，阻止我们进入神殿深处。
steps.en: We successfully entered the Temple of the Three Fates. However, Oronyx does not welcome our presence and complicates our path with various puzzles, blocking us from reaching the temple's deeper chambers.

steps.ch: 比「世界命运」更沉重之物…我们以取巧的方式，用三月七的相机通过了这项考验。
steps.en: An item heavier than the "Fate of the World"... We adopted a tricky method and used March 7th's camera to solve this puzzle.

steps.ch: 离开房间，前去谒见欧洛尼斯
steps.en: Leave the room and meet Oronyx

steps.ch: 虽然我们成功来到欧洛尼斯所在，可它拒绝提供帮助。为了及时救援万敌，白厄不惜动用极端手段。
steps.en: We arrived at Oronyx's residence, but they refused to offer any assistance. In a desperate attempt to save Mydei, Phainon was prepared to take drastic measures.

steps.ch: 谒见「永夜之帷」欧洛尼斯
steps.en: Have an audience with Oronyx, Veil of Evernight

steps.ch: 虽然我们成功来到欧洛尼斯所在，可它拒绝提供帮助。为了及时救援万敌，白厄不惜动用极端手段。在这剑拔弩张之时，欧洛尼斯的态度却在见到{NICKNAME}后发生了转变。
steps.en: We arrived at Oronyx's residence, but they refused to offer any assistance. In a desperate attempt to save Mydei, Phainon was prepared to take drastic measures. Just as the sword was being drawn, Oronyx's demeanor shifted upon noticing {NICKNAME}.

steps.ch: 和丹恒分享「不存在的回忆」
steps.en: Share your "Non-Existent Memory" with Dan Heng

quests.name_ch: 悬锋啊，请涤去你的血锈•上

steps.ch: 自重渊归来，我们再次兵分两路。我与白厄前去援助死战多时的万敌，而{NICKNAME}则利用欧洛尼斯赋予的力量，收集记忆碎片，想办法前往悬锋城的往世，与遐蝶一同破解尼卡多利的不死神躯。
steps.en: After returning from the Abyss, we split into two groups. Phainon and I headed to assist the battle-worn Mydei, while {NICKNAME} planned to harness Oronyx's power to gather the memory fragments. Once this was done, we would devise a plan to journey into Castrum Kremnos' past, where we would join forces with Castorice to destroy Nikador's immortal body.

steps.ch: 收集有关悬锋城的记忆碎片
steps.en: Collect the memory fragments related to Castrum Kremnos

steps.ch: 查看哈托努斯的记忆碎片
steps.en: Check Chartonus' memory fragments

quests.name_ch: 悬锋啊，请涤去你的血锈•下

steps.ch: 尼卡多利一战，以黄金裔的胜利作结。我们返回奥赫玛，经过休整，将一同见证泰坦火种的归还与火种试炼的开启。
steps.en: The battle with Nikador ends with the Chrysos Heirs' victory. We return to Okhema to rest and recover. Together, we will witness the return of the Titan's Coreflame and the start of the Coreflame's trial.

steps.ch: 迈向决战，打败尼卡多利！
steps.en: Time for a decisive battle with Nikador!

steps.ch: 回私人浴宫好好休息
steps.en: Return to the private bath chamber and rest

quests.name_ch: 金缕荡污浊

steps.ch: 与此同时，奥赫玛城中，阿格莱雅也开始着手处理尼卡多利渗透一事。但奥赫玛的政局似乎并没有我们所预想的那么稳定。
steps.en: Meanwhile, in the city of Okhema, Aglaea has begun addressing Nikador's infiltration. However, the political situation in Okhema appears far less stable than we had anticipated.

steps.ch: 从衣匠处获取收集到的情报
steps.en: Gather the collected information from the Garmentmaker

steps.ch: 抓回贼灵巴特鲁斯
steps.en: Recapture Spirithief Bartholos

steps.ch: 前往云石市集，寻找并清除三处异常
steps.en: Go to Marmoreal Market, then find and clear three anomalies

steps.ch: 返回生命花园
steps.en: Return to the Garden of Life

steps.ch: 返回生命花园，将情况告诉缇宝她们
steps.en: Return to the Garden of Life and tell Tribbie and the rest the situation

quests.name_ch: 魔女的科学剩宴

steps.ch: 黑塔空间站内，黑塔对博识尊的谒见尚未结束。借助全空间站的能源供给，黑塔启动了谒见系统终端，尝试与博识尊沟通，却意外失败。经过排查，终端内的三个扇区均出现故障，黑塔不得不亲自下场，一一处理。
steps.en: Inside the Herta Space Station, Herta's audience with Nous had yet to end. Using all the energy available in the station, Herta activates the Audience System's terminal to try to communicate with Nous. However, the system unexpectedly failed. Upon investigation, all three sectors within the terminal are malfunctioning, requiring Herta to personally attend to each one to resolve the issues.

steps.ch: 调查「谒见系统」终端
steps.en: Investigate the Audience System terminal

steps.ch: 继续觐见星神
steps.en: Continue the audience with an Aeon

quests.name_ch: 英雄啊，且握住那枚火种

steps.ch: 留守列车的姬子为卧病在床的三月七准备了定制餐食，打算去她的房间探望一番。
steps.en: Himeko, on watch at the Express, has prepared a specially made meal for the bedridden March 7th and plans to check up on her.

steps.ch: 探望三月七
steps.en: Visit March 7th

chapters.chapter_ch: 纷争啊，伐清湮途的悼惧

quests.name_ch: 纷争啊，伐清湮途的悼惧

steps.ch: 距离白厄进入创世涡心挑战「纷争」试炼已过去很长时间，众黄金裔对此都不禁心生不安。
steps.en: It's been a long while since Phainon entered the Vortex of Genesis for the Strife trial, leaving all Chrysos Heirs deeply concerned.

steps.ch: 在创世涡心等待白厄
steps.en: Await Phainon at the Vortex of Genesis

steps.ch: 白厄的火种试炼突生变故，情急之下，我们决定与遐蝶、万敌一同介入试炼，将可能遭遇危险的白厄救出。
steps.en: When crisis struck during Phainon's Coreflame trial as we waited anxiously, we made the snap decision to join Castorice and Mydei in rescuing Phainon from possible peril.

steps.ch: 与阿格莱雅交谈，介入试炼
steps.en: Speak with Aglaea and interfere with the trial

steps.ch: 介入试炼
steps.en: Interfere with the trial

steps.ch: 将白厄安顿好后，我与{NICKNAME}回到浴宫稍作休整。关于翁法罗斯世界的现状，我们也做了一些自己的判断与总结。
steps.en: After ensuring Phainon's safety, {NICKNAME} and I retreated to the bath chamber to rest. We also drew our own conclusions about the present situation in the world of Amphoreus

steps.ch: 返回私人浴宫，与丹恒梳理现状
steps.en: Return to your private bath chamber and discuss the present circumstances with Dan Heng

quests.name_ch: 荣耀啊，不忍卒饮的鸩酒

steps.ch: 白厄的火种试炼失败，意味着承载尼卡多利神权的重任落到了唯一的悬锋王储——你的身上。但纵然身为「纷争」的正统继承人，你的心中却似乎有一处难以抹消的病灶……
steps.en: The failure of Phainon's Coreflame trial means the responsibility of bearing Nikador's divinity now falls to the lone crown prince of Kremnos — you. Yet, even as the orthodox heir to "Strife," you seem to have an absurd extent of hesitation and objection to accepting the god's authority...

steps.ch: 与缇宝交谈
steps.en: Speak with Tribbie

steps.ch: 前往高温浴池，寻找族人
steps.en: Head to the hot bath and look for the Kremnoans

steps.ch: 与嬉戏的孩子们交谈
steps.en: Speak to the playing children

steps.ch: 朝气蓬勃的悬锋稚童们让你再度思索悬锋城的未来，你决定找到悬锋老将克拉特鲁斯一叙。
steps.en: Seeing the energetic Kremnoan children prompts you to reflect on Castrum Kremnos's future. You decide to seek out the Kremnoan veteran Krateros for a discussion.

steps.ch: 寻找克拉特鲁斯
steps.en: Look for Krateros

steps.ch: 跟随克拉特鲁斯，找个僻静的角落…
steps.en: Follow Krateros to a quiet corner...

steps.ch: …准备动手
steps.en: ...Prepare to strike

quests.name_ch: 谧林啊，寤思者缘何失语
quests.name_en: Grove, Wherefore Are the Wise Silent

steps.ch: 对于我们伸出援手击败尼卡多利一事，阿格莱雅表现出真挚的谢意，诚备厚礼、邀我与{NICKNAME}前往英雄浴池一叙。
steps.en: Aglaea shows sincere gratitude for our help in defeating Nikador, preparing generous gifts and inviting {NICKNAME} and I to the Hero's Bath for a discussion.

steps.ch: 与遐蝶交谈
steps.en: Speak with Castorice

steps.ch: 前进路上，自称卡吕普索的神秘人突然出现，她声称已救下那刻夏，并带领{NICKNAME}他们向「启蒙王座」前进。
steps.en: During their advance, a mysterious woman identifying herself as Calypso appears suddenly, stating she saved Anaxa and offering guidance to {NICKNAME}'s group to the Luminary Throne.

steps.ch: 继续前进，穿过献身拱心
steps.en: Keep moving forward and pass through the Dome of Devotion

steps.ch: 对于我们伸出援手击败尼卡多利一事，阿格莱雅表现出真挚的谢意，诚备厚礼、邀我与{NICKNAME}前往英雄浴池一叙。
steps.en: Aglaea shows sincere gratitude for our help in defeating Nikador, preparing generous gifts and inviting {NICKNAME} and I to the Hero's Bath for a discussion.

steps.ch: 跟随遐蝶，面见阿格莱雅
steps.en: Follow Castorice to meet with Aglaea

steps.ch: 向商人了解情况
steps.en: Find out about what's happening from the merchants

steps.ch: 继续跟随遐蝶，面见阿格莱雅
steps.en: Continue following Castorice to meet with Aglaea

steps.ch: 与阿格莱雅交谈
steps.en: Speak with Aglaea

steps.ch: 与阿格莱雅商谈结盟一事时，我们与昏光庭院的风堇相识，{NICKNAME}与遐蝶决定陪她一同回到树庭，完成阿格莱雅交付的外交任务。
steps.en: During alliance negotiations with Aglaea, we encounter Hyacine from the Twilight Courtyard. {NICKNAME} and Castorice opt to join her journey back to the Grove to complete Aglaea's diplomatic mission.

steps.ch: 与遐蝶和风堇交谈，准备出发
steps.en: Speak with Castorice and Hyacine and prepare to head out

steps.ch: 与风堇的同伴会合
steps.en: Meet up with Hyacine's friends

steps.ch: 为了医救城外的无名伤者，风堇暂时驻留奥赫玛，缇安、遐蝶与{NICKNAME}三人先行前往树庭——信仰{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的学术圣地。
steps.en: With Hyacine remaining in Okhema to treat the unnamed wounded person, Trianne, Castorice, and {NICKNAME} head to the Grove — the academic sanctuary dedicated to {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}.

steps.ch: 跟随缇安前进
steps.en: Follow Trianne and move forward

steps.ch: 与缇安交谈，准备启程
steps.en: Speak with Trianne and prepare to depart

steps.ch: 等待缇安醒来
steps.en: Wait for Trianne to wake up

steps.ch: 登上经纬小径，进入神悟树庭
steps.en: Step onto the Woven Trail and enter the Grove of Epiphany

steps.ch: 替三月七拍摄巨木留念
steps.en: Help March 7th take a picture of the giant tree as a keepsake

steps.ch: 昔日流思遍地的树庭，如今却陷入诡异的静默。{NICKNAME}一行人设法进入树庭，发现内部似乎情况不对……
steps.en: The Grove, once filled with scholarly discourse, has now fallen into an eerie silence. {NICKNAME}'s group manages to enter, only to find that something seems amiss inside...

steps.ch: 寻找进入神悟树庭的方法
steps.en: Find the way to enter the Grove of Epiphany

steps.ch: 穿过「雅努斯密径」，进入神悟树庭
steps.en: Pass the Janus's Hidden Passage and enter the Grove of Epiphany

steps.ch: 继续前进
steps.en: Continue forward

steps.ch: 调查仙女木
steps.en: Investigate the White Dryad

steps.ch: 离开慈爱之庭，继续前进
steps.en: Leave the Courtyard of Storge and keep moving forward

steps.ch: 向阿格莱雅汇报情况
steps.en: Report the situation to Aglaea

steps.ch: 黑潮的造物在树庭四处游荡…这并不是个好消息，临此浩劫，树庭恐怕凶多吉少。向阿格莱雅报告后，{NICKNAME}他们继续向树庭深处前进调查。
steps.en: Black tide creations roaming throughout the Grove... this doesn't bode well. In this calamity, the Grove's fate looks grim. After reporting to Aglaea, {NICKNAME}'s group continues deeper into the Grove to investigate.

steps.ch: 继续前进，调查灾变始末
steps.en: Keep going and investigate the cause of the calamity

steps.ch: 打开大门，继续前进
steps.en: Open the gate and continue forward

steps.ch: 继续前进，前往启蒙王座
steps.en: Keep moving forward and head to the Luminary Throne

steps.ch: 名为那刻夏的黄金裔生死未卜，以炼金术留下线索。{NICKNAME}一行人根据他的指引，前去查看火种安危。
steps.en: The Chrysos Heir Anaxa's whereabouts remain uncertain, but he left alchemical clues. {NICKNAME}'s group follows these leads to verify the Coreflame's condition.

steps.ch: 寻找声音的来源
steps.en: Find the source of the sound

steps.ch: 前进路上，自称卡吕普索的神秘人突然出现，她声称已救下那刻夏，并带领{NICKNAME}他们向「启蒙王座」前进。
steps.en: During their advance, a mysterious woman identifying herself as Calypso appears suddenly, stating she saved Anaxa and offering guidance to {NICKNAME}'s group to the Luminary Throne.

steps.ch: 根据卡吕普索的指引，寻找继续前进的方法
steps.en: Follow Calypso's guidance and find a way to keep going forward

steps.ch: 越过深井，取得「金枝誓言」
steps.en: Pass the deep wall and obtain Golden Bough of Vows

steps.ch: 向心脏献上「金枝誓言」
steps.en: Offer the Golden Bough of Vows to the heart

steps.ch: 乘坐水车，前往友爱之馆上层
steps.en: Take the waterwheel to head to the top level of the Library of Philia

steps.ch: 离开友爱之馆，前往启蒙王座
steps.en: Leave the Library of Philia and head to the Luminary Throne

steps.ch: 循声找到走散的迷迷和缇安
steps.en: Find Mem and Trianne by listening to the sounds

steps.ch: 设法抵达迷迷所在处，拯救迷迷
steps.en: Try to reach where Mem is and rescue Mem

steps.ch: 黑潮的造物在树庭四处游荡…这并不是个好消息，临此浩劫，树庭恐怕凶多吉少。向阿格莱雅报告后，{NICKNAME}他们继续向树庭深处前进调查。
steps.en: Black tide creations roaming throughout the Grove... this doesn't bode well. In this calamity, the Grove's fate looks grim. After reporting to Aglaea, {NICKNAME}'s group continues deeper into the Grove to investigate.

steps.ch: （可选）尝试感应黑潮怪物的记忆
steps.en: (Optional) Try to sense the black tide monster's memory

steps.ch: 前进路上，自称卡吕普索的神秘人突然出现，她声称已救下那刻夏，并带领{NICKNAME}他们向「启蒙王座」前进。
steps.en: During their advance, a mysterious woman identifying herself as Calypso appears suddenly, stating she saved Anaxa and offering guidance to {NICKNAME}'s group to the Luminary Throne.

steps.ch: 击退围困迷迷的奇兽
steps.en: Defeat the magical beasts surrounding Mem

steps.ch: 用「金枝誓言」采撷余火
steps.en: Pick the remaining fires with the Golden Bough of Vows

steps.ch: 向神识之蝶奉上余火
steps.en: Offer the remaining fires to the Butterfly of Divine Mind

steps.ch: 经过一路的观察，遐蝶揭穿卡吕普索的真面目，指出其人正是{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}。瑟希斯承认身份，委托{NICKNAME}等人助它前往那刻夏所在之处，将火种再度熔合，以便缉拿树庭覆灭的元凶——无名的黑袍剑士。
steps.en: After careful observation, Castorice exposes Calypso's true identity as {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}. Cerces admits to this and asks {NICKNAME}'s group to help them reach Anaxa, so they can fuse the Coreflame again to catch the culprit behind the annihilation of the Grove — the nameless black-robed swordmaster.

steps.ch: 向上攀登，前往启蒙王座
steps.en: Climb upwards and reach the Luminary Throne

steps.ch: 继续前进，在王座处与瑟希斯会合
steps.en: Keep moving forward and meet up with Cerces at the throne

steps.ch: 击退黑袍剑士
steps.en: Defeat the black-robed swordmaster

quests.name_ch: 旧忆啊，热雾中显隐扑朔

steps.ch: *我们*感知到，缇安又使用神力了，*我们*很担心她的情况…阿雅感觉到*我们*的忧虑，答应一起去趟浴场散心。
steps.en: We sense that Trianne used her divine power again. We're worried about her... Agy noticed our concern and agreed to go to the baths together to unwind.

steps.ch: 与阿格莱雅交谈
steps.en: Speak with Aglaea

steps.ch: 与阿格莱雅一起前往浴场
steps.en: Head to the baths with Aglaea

steps.ch: 浴场中多人离奇昏倒，经风堇诊断，病因竟是水温过高。而其幕后黑手究竟是…？
steps.en: Multiple visitors suddenly pass out in the baths. Hyacine's examination shows an unexpected reason: overheated water. But who is the culprit...?

steps.ch: 设法了解事故始末
steps.en: Try to understand what happened

steps.ch: 入浴
steps.en: Take a bath

steps.ch: 结束了堪称荒唐的比赛，白厄与万敌一同稍事休息。两位战士聊起火种试炼，吐露出彼此不为人知的往事……
steps.en: Following a ridiculous contest, Phainon and Mydei stop to rest. The two warriors discuss the Coreflame trial, revealing untold stories from their pasts...

steps.ch: 观看白厄与万敌交谈
steps.en: Observe Phainon conversing with Mydei

steps.ch: 观看缇宝打断白厄与万敌交谈
steps.en: Observe Tribbie interrupting Phainon and Mydei's conversation

steps.ch: 克拉特鲁斯的一意孤行，使悬锋一族的宿命与未来再度横亘于你的面前……
steps.en: Krateros' stubborn persistence once again brings the fate and future of the Kremnoan people before you...

steps.ch: 与克拉特鲁斯交谈
steps.en: Speak with Krateros

steps.ch: 向大工匠哈托努斯寻求建议
steps.en: Seek advice from Grand Craftsman Chartonus

quests.name_ch: 悲音啊，莫让生者空垂涕

steps.ch: 经历一场恶战，{NICKNAME}一行人带着那刻夏安全返回奥赫玛，准备向阿格莱雅复命。
steps.en: Following intense combat, {NICKNAME}'s group escorts Anaxa back to Okhema to report to Aglaea.

steps.ch: 向阿格莱雅复命
steps.en: Report back to Aglaea

steps.ch: 在面见阿格莱雅之前，那刻夏提出了自己的要求：前去慰问黑潮之灾牺牲者的家属。
steps.en: Prior to seeing Aglaea, Anaxa asks to visit the families of those lost to the black tide.

steps.ch: 慰问罹难者家属
steps.en: Send condolences to the victims' families

steps.ch: 阿格莱雅因事务繁多，暂时无法与树庭归来的众人面议。舟车疲顿的{NICKNAME}一行人决定先休息一番。
steps.en: With many matters demanding her attention, Aglaea cannot yet receive those back from the Grove. {NICKNAME}'s travel-weary group decides to rest first.

steps.ch: 与遐蝶和那刻夏交谈
steps.en: Speak with Castorice and Anaxa

steps.ch: 返回私人浴宫，结束这一天
steps.en: Return to your private bath chamber and end this day

quests.name_ch: 门扉啊，叩声仍激荡梦中

steps.ch: 一场梦境，将*我们*带回那段早已为岁月所模糊的遥远回忆之中，而这场幻梦，印刻着*我们*内心最深处的不安。
steps.en: A dream carries us back to memories long faded by time, and this dream mirrors the profound fears within our hearts.

steps.ch: 入睡，进入缇宝的梦境
steps.en: Fall asleep and enter Tribbie's dream

steps.ch: 入睡，继续缇宝的梦境
steps.en: Fall asleep and continue Tribbie's dream

steps.ch: 与阿格莱雅交谈
steps.en: Speak with Aglaea

steps.ch: 白厄找到了禁闭中的那刻夏，似乎不单是为了叙旧。
steps.en: Phainon finds the confined Anaxa, apparently not just for catching up.

steps.ch: 观看白厄与那刻夏交谈
steps.en: Observe Phainon conversing with Anaxa

steps.ch: 为了复现记忆、完成对克拉特鲁斯的承诺，*我们*悄悄来到命运重渊，寻找历经当年岁月的事物。
steps.en: To replicate memories and fulfill the promise to Krateros, we quietly visit the Abyss of Fate, searching for objects that have witnessed those years.

steps.ch: 觐见欧洛尼斯，恢复记忆
steps.en: Have an audience with Oronyx and regain memories

steps.ch: 找到「番红蕊」，觐见欧洛尼斯
steps.en: Find "saffron" and have an audience with Oronyx

steps.ch: 跟随缇安，寻找「番红蕊」
steps.en: Follow Trianne and look for "saffron"

steps.ch: 阅读缇安找到的信件
steps.en: Read the letter Trianne found

steps.ch: 继续跟随缇安，寻找「番红蕊」
steps.en: Continue following Trianne and look for "saffron"

steps.ch: 调查缇安找到的陶罐
steps.en: Investigate the dolium Trianne found

steps.ch: 觐见并尝试说服欧洛尼斯
steps.en: Have an audience with Oronyx and try to convince them

steps.ch: 白厄找到了禁闭中的那刻夏，似乎不单是为了叙旧。
steps.en: Phainon finds the confined Anaxa, apparently not just for catching up.

steps.ch: 继续观看白厄与那刻夏交谈
steps.en: Keep observing Phainon conversing with Anaxa

steps.ch: 为了复现记忆、完成对克拉特鲁斯的承诺，*我们*悄悄来到命运重渊，寻找历经当年岁月的事物。
steps.en: To replicate memories and fulfill the promise to Krateros, we quietly visit the Abyss of Fate, searching for objects that have witnessed those years.

steps.ch: 寻找欧洛尼斯
steps.en: Look for Oronyx

quests.name_ch: 仇寇啊，且领受金血烧灼

steps.ch: 缇安以耗尽神力为代价，将缇宝与缇宁送离战场。城中英雄会合，准备制定战术，救回缇安、围猎「盗火行者」。
steps.en: Depleting her divine power, Trianne manages to send Tribbie and Trinnon away from the battle. The heroes gather in the city to plan tactics for rescuing Trianne and hunting down the Flame Reaver.

steps.ch: 与阿格莱雅交谈，商讨对策
steps.en: Speak with Aglaea and discuss countermeasures

steps.ch: 开始围猎盗火行者
steps.en: Start to entrap the Flame Reaver

steps.ch: 向阿格莱雅复命
steps.en: Report back to Aglaea

quests.name_ch: 王座啊，终了那数载索寞
quests.name_en: Throne, End Those Long Years Forlorn

steps.ch: 围猎盗火行者一役以黄金裔的凯旋作结。已肩负成神使命的你，如今将要面临另一个重要的抉择：成王与返乡。
steps.en: The hunt for the Flame Reaver ends in victory for the Chrysos Heirs. Now bearing the mission of attaining divinity, you face another crucial choice: Claim the throne or return home.

steps.ch: 与克拉特鲁斯交谈
steps.en: Speak with Krateros

steps.ch: 你决绝地否定了悬锋人千载的荣耀执念，决定独自还乡，接下尼卡多利抗击黑潮的使命。在迈上回乡之路之前，你还需与城中的友人们一一作别。
steps.en: You decisively reject the Kremnoans' centuries-old obsession with glory, opting to return home alone and assume Nikador's duty against the black tide. Before starting your homeward journey, you need to say goodbye to your friends in the city.

steps.ch: 告别阿格莱雅
steps.en: Bid farewell to Aglaea

steps.ch: 告别开拓者和丹恒
steps.en: Bid farewell to the Trailblazer and Dan Heng

steps.ch: 与开拓者和丹恒合影留念
steps.en: Take a commemorative photo with the Trailblazer and Dan Heng

steps.ch: （可选）告别缇宝、遐蝶和大工匠
steps.en: (Optional) Bid farewell to Tribbie, Castorice, and the Grand Craftsman

steps.ch: 告别白厄
steps.en: Bid farewell to Phainon

steps.ch: 告别奥赫玛
steps.en: Bid farewell to Okhema

steps.ch: 与白厄同行最后一段路
steps.en: Walk with Phainon for the last part of the journey

steps.ch: 我，不死的迈德漠斯，亡国的王储，纷争的新神…如今已迈上以血作辙的归途。
steps.en: I, the undying Mydeimos, the Last Prince, the new God of Strife... now tread the blood-soaked road home.

steps.ch: 回返家乡
steps.en: Return home

quests.name_ch: 来路啊，请再度显映往履
quests.name_en: Passage, Reveal the Past Once More

steps.ch: 虽然我们赢下了与盗火行者的战斗，却永远地失去了缇安……
steps.en: Though we won the fight against the Flame Reaver, we have lost Trianne forever.

steps.ch: 参加缇安的葬礼
steps.en: Participate in Trianne's funeral

steps.ch: 借助{NICKNAME}的力量，白厄等人来到了命运重渊的往世——神谕的圣地「雅努萨波利斯」，并在这里见到了缇宝三人千年前的模样。
steps.en: Through {NICKNAME}'s power, Phainon's group journeys to the past of the Abyss of Fate — the "Sanctum of Prophecy" Janusopolis, where they see the Tribbie trio as they were a thousand years ago.

steps.ch: 向祭坛左侧「预言书库」前进
steps.en: Advance towards the Archive of Prophecies at the left of the altar

steps.ch: 完成第一次「雅努斯迷津」
steps.en: Complete the first Janus' Maze

steps.ch: 完成第二次「雅努斯迷津」，打开大门
steps.en: Complete the second Janus' Maze and open the gates

steps.ch: 重回故乡，缇宁不禁睹物生情，也回想起许多本已忘却的人、事、物。
steps.en: As Trinnon returned to her homeland, familiar sights stirred forgotten memories within her — of people, moments, and treasures she thought time had washed away.

steps.ch: 进入缇里西庇俄丝的住处
steps.en: Enter Tribios' abode

steps.ch: 陪缇宁四处转转
steps.en: Walk around with Trinnon

steps.ch: 陪缇宁前往缇里西庇俄丝的卧房
steps.en: Walk with Trinnon to Tribios' bedroom

steps.ch: 寻找缇里西庇俄丝
steps.en: Look for Tribios

steps.ch: 打开书架暗门
steps.en: Open the bookshelf's hidden door

steps.ch: 跟随缇里西庇俄丝前进
steps.en: Follow Tribios forward

steps.ch: 设法为缇里西庇俄丝开辟道路
steps.en: Try to open up the way for Tribios

steps.ch: 继续跟随缇里西庇俄丝前进
steps.en: Keep following Tribios forward

steps.ch: 观看缇里西庇俄丝过去的对话
steps.en: Watch Tribios' past conversations

steps.ch: 跟随缇里西庇俄丝穿过大桥
steps.en: Follow Tribios and cross the bridge

steps.ch: 跟随缇里西庇俄丝，前往雅努斯宝库
steps.en: Follow Tribios and head to the Janus Vault

steps.ch: 设法开辟前进的道路
steps.en: Try to open the way forward

steps.ch: 继续跟随缇里西庇俄丝，前往雅努斯宝库
steps.en: Keep following Tribios to the Janus Vault

steps.ch: 与缇里西庇俄丝一起面对圣城守卫
steps.en: Face the holy city's guards together with Tribios

steps.ch: 缇里西庇俄丝夺取了「门径」的火种，接过雅努斯的神权。现在，她必须逃离这座囚禁了她数十年之久的三相圣地，奔赴自己的命运。
steps.en: Tribios takes the Coreflame of Passage, receiving Janus's divine authority. Now, she must flee this Sanctum of Tripartite Prophecy that has held her captive for decades and pursue her destiny.

steps.ch: 与缇里西庇俄丝一起开辟道路
steps.en: Open the way together with Tribios

steps.ch: 与缇里西庇俄丝一起逃离
steps.en: Escape with Tribios

steps.ch: 与缇里西庇俄丝一起击退追兵
steps.en: Defeat the pursuers with Tribios

quests.name_ch: 纺锤啊，难纴岁月的经纬
quests.name_en: Spindle, Laboring to Weave the Tapestry of Time

steps.ch: 与盗火行者的意外遭遇，导致欧洛尼斯的火种被提前取出。众黄金裔们希望由{NICKNAME}来承担岁月的神职。\n开拓总是会面对如此的时刻，将自己的命运与他人的命运深深地结合在一起…只有{NICKNAME}自己能决定{F#她}{M#他}的命运走向何方。
steps.en: An unexpected encounter with the Flame Reaver led to the premature extraction of Oronyx's Coreflame. The Chrysos Heirs hope that {NICKNAME} will take on the divine role of Time.\nTrailblazers always face moments like this, where their fate becomes deeply entwined with that of others... Yet only {NICKNAME} can decide where {F#her}{M#his} destiny leads.

steps.ch: 前往生命花园，与黄金裔商量接下来的打算
steps.en: Head to the Garden of Life and discuss what to do next with the Chrysos Heirs

steps.ch: 与遐蝶和阿格莱雅对话
steps.en: Speak to Castorice and Aglaea

steps.ch: 与遐蝶对话
steps.en: Speak to Castorice

steps.ch: 与盗火行者的意外遭遇，导致欧洛尼斯的火种被提前取出。众黄金裔们希望由{NICKNAME}来承担岁月的职责。\n{NICKNAME}和迷迷愿意尝试接受欧洛尼斯的试炼，而公民大会将近，黄金裔的英雄们也有新的麻烦要面对。
steps.en: An unexpected encounter with the Flame Reaver led to the premature extraction of Oronyx's Coreflame. The Chrysos Heirs hope that {NICKNAME} will take on the authority of Time.\n{NICKNAME} and Mem are willing to face Oronyx's trial. But with the citizens' assembly approaching, the Chrysos Heir heroes have new troubles on the horizon.

steps.ch: 前往私人浴宫，与丹恒对话
steps.en: Head to the private bath chamber and speak with Dan Heng

steps.ch: 好好休息，准备接受试炼
steps.en: Rest up and prepare to face the trial

steps.ch: 与盗火行者的意外遭遇，导致欧洛尼斯的火种被提前取出。众黄金裔们希望由{NICKNAME}来承担岁月的职责。\n未流淌着黄金血的异乡旅者也接受了泰坦的试炼，希望{NICKNAME}和迷迷一切顺利。\n「那不存在于预言之中，却由我纺入命运的，也并非仅此一例。」我想起了初次见到阿格莱雅时听到的这句话。
steps.en: An unexpected encounter with the Flame Reaver led to the premature extraction of Oronyx's Coreflame. The Chrysos Heirs hope that {NICKNAME} will take on the authority of Time.\nEven as an outland traveler, whose veins carry no golden blood, has accepted the Titan's trial. Wishing {NICKNAME} and Mem the best of luck.\n"I've woven many unforeseen events into the tapestry of fate, this is but one instance." I remembered hearing this the first time I met Aglaea.

steps.ch: 前往创世涡心
steps.en: Head to the Vortex of Genesis

steps.ch: 与缇宁交谈
steps.en: Speak with Trinnon

steps.ch: 提交火种
steps.en: Submit Coreflame

steps.ch: 与涡心附近的黄金裔们对话
steps.en: Speak with the Chrysos Heirs near the vortex

steps.ch: 于试炼中醒来，与迷迷对话
steps.en: Awaken during the trial and speak to Mem

steps.ch: 与欧洛尼斯对话
steps.en: Speak with Oronyx

steps.ch: 与盗火行者的意外遭遇，导致欧洛尼斯的火种被提前取出。众黄金裔们希望由{NICKNAME}来承担岁月的职责。\n根据迷迷所说{NICKNAME}早在车厢坠落中途就已死去，而如今只是一簇行走的记忆。多亏了翁法罗斯当地独特的生死规律，{NICKNAME}尚有一线生机，而找到塞纳托斯变成了不得不优先完成的要务。\n眼下，{NICKNAME}要去找最接近死亡之人确认自身状况。
steps.en: An unexpected encounter with the Flame Reaver led to the premature extraction of Oronyx's Coreflame. The Chrysos Heirs hope that {NICKNAME} will take on the authority of Time.\nAccording to Mem, {NICKNAME} had died halfway through the Express's descent, and now is just a walking memory. Thanks to the unique life-death laws of Amphoreus, {NICKNAME} still has a slim chance of survival, and finding Thanatos has become the priority task.\nNow, {NICKNAME} must find the one closest to death to confirm their condition.

steps.ch: 于私人浴宫中醒来
steps.en: Wake up in the private bath chamber

steps.ch: 前往生命花园，向遐蝶咨询
steps.en: Head to the Garden of Life and consult Castorice

steps.ch: 与盗火行者的意外遭遇，导致欧洛尼斯的火种被提前取出。众黄金裔们希望由{NICKNAME}来承担岁月的职责。\n根据迷迷所说{NICKNAME}早在车厢坠落中途就已死去，而如今只是一簇行走的记忆。多亏了翁法罗斯当地独特的生死规律，{NICKNAME}尚有一线生机，而找到塞纳托斯变成了不得不优先完成的要务。\n{NICKNAME}会没有事的，我衷心祈祷如此。
steps.en: An unexpected encounter with the Flame Reaver led to the premature extraction of Oronyx's Coreflame. The Chrysos Heirs hope that {NICKNAME} will take on the authority of Time.\nAccording to Mem, {NICKNAME} had died halfway through the Express's descent, and now is just a walking memory. Thanks to the unique life-death laws of Amphoreus, {NICKNAME} still has a slim chance of survival, and finding Thanatos has become the priority task.\n{NICKNAME} will be just fine, I sincerely pray so.

steps.ch: 与阿格莱雅等人商议后续安排
steps.en: Discuss your next steps with Aglaea and the others

quests.name_ch: 橄榄啊，请掷向议厅之主
quests.name_en: Olive, Cast to the Conference Chair

steps.ch: 如今瑟希斯的火种就在你的胸中，这意味着阿格莱雅迟早会为了逐火之旅将它取出。届时，因火种死而复生的你将会怎样也不难猜到。\n为了求生，也为了求索，你需要寻找既能够保全自己、又能对抗阿格莱雅等人的力量——元老院的使者已经等待你多时了。
steps.en: Now, the Coreflame of Cerces resides in your chest, which means that Aglaea will eventually extract it for the Flame-Chase Journey. It's easy to guess what will happen to you, who the Coreflame had revived.\nTo survive, and to seek, you need to find a power that can protect you and combat Aglaea and others — The messenger from Council of Elders has been waiting for you for a long time.

steps.ch: 与元老院使者会面
steps.en: Meet with the Council of Elders's messenger

steps.ch: 跟随来古士，动身前往黎明云崖
steps.en: Follow Lygus and head to Dawncloud

steps.ch: 元老院如你所料派出了使者抢在阿格莱雅行动前将你带到了黎明云崖。在这里，你将接受众元老们的庇护。\n离传令兵返回还有些时间，在这附近逛逛吧，也是为了让好奇宝宝——你脑中的瑟希斯适当安静一些。
steps.en: The Council of Elders dispatched a messenger, as you anticipated, to escort you to Dawncloud before Aglaea could make her move. Here, you will be under the Elders' protection.\nThere's still some time before the Messenger returns. Take a stroll around here, and let the curious Cerces, who resides in your mind, calm down a bit.

steps.ch: 传令兵到达前，在附近逛逛
steps.en: Walk around before the Messenger arrives

steps.ch: 元老院如你所料派出了使者抢在阿格莱雅行动前将你带到了黎明云崖。在这里，你将接受众元老们的庇护。\n瑟希斯也会好奇自己被绘制成什么模样吗？
steps.en: The Council of Elders dispatched a messenger, as you anticipated, to escort you to Dawncloud before Aglaea could make her move. Here, you will be under the Elders' protection.\nWill Cerces be curious about how they've been portrayed?

steps.ch: 听听瑟希斯如何评价瑟希斯的壁画
steps.en: Listen to Cerces's evaluations of their murals

steps.ch: 元老院如你所料派出了使者抢在阿格莱雅行动前将你带到了黎明云崖。在这里，你将接受众元老们的庇护。\n元老们已经知晓你的到来，跟随传令兵前去会面吧。
steps.en: The Council of Elders dispatched a messenger, as you anticipated, to escort you to Dawncloud before Aglaea could make her move. Here, you will be under the Elders' protection.\nThey await your arrival. Follow the Messenger to meet them.

steps.ch: 跟随传令兵，与元老凯妮斯会面
steps.en: Follow the Messenger and meet with Elder Caenis

steps.ch: 通过雅努斯密径
steps.en: Cross through Janus's Hidden Passage

steps.ch: 元老院如你所料派出了使者抢在阿格莱雅行动前将你带到了黎明云崖。在这里，你将接受众元老们的庇护。\n凯妮斯就像是条诡诈的毒蛇，想要获得她的信任并不容易。
steps.en: The Council of Elders dispatched a messenger, as you anticipated, to escort you to Dawncloud before Aglaea could make her move. Here, you will be under the Elders' protection.\nCaenis is like a cunning snake. Gaining her trust will not be easy.

steps.ch: 跟随凯妮斯继续前进
steps.en: Keep following Caenis

steps.ch: 与凯妮斯交谈，促成盟友关系
steps.en: Speak with Caenis and form an alliance

steps.ch: 你主动抛出橄榄枝寻求庇护，成功取得凯妮斯信任，并与元老院结盟。\n「寻求庇护」多么完美的理由，足以让你、元老院、黄金裔都相信它的正当性，可惜…你费劲来到达这里是另有所寻——\n这需要「神礼观众」来古士的帮助。
steps.en: You reached out for protection and successfully gained Caenis's trust, forming an alliance with the Council of Elders.\n"Seeking protection" — what a perfect excuse, enough to convince you, the Council, and the Chrysos Heir of its legitimacy. Unfortunately... the real reason you came here was something else entirely—\nThis requires the help of "Theoros" Lygus.

steps.ch: 与来古士交谈
steps.en: Speak with Lygus

steps.ch: 跟随来古士继续前进
steps.en: Keep following Lygus

steps.ch: 泰坦断崖——整个翁法罗斯中距离刻法勒奥体最近的地方。你的心中早就盘算着觐见负世之泰坦的计划。\n与神同行，登上神山。
steps.en: The Titan Cliff — the closest one can get to Kephale's mystic body in all of Amphoreus. You have been planning to seek an audience with the Worldbearing Titan.\nTo walk with the gods, and ascend the holy mountain.

steps.ch: 与神同行，登上泰坦断崖
steps.en: Walk with the divine and ascend the Titan Cliff

steps.ch: 泰坦断崖——整个翁法罗斯中距离刻法勒奥体最近的地方。你的心中早就盘算着觐见负世之泰坦的计划。\n你的身体在云崖圣道上攀登，灵魂却在冥河滩涂上缓行…那些亡魂与登山道重合在一起，究竟想要讲述什么……
steps.en: The Titan Cliff — the closest one can get to Kephale's mystic body in all of Amphoreus. You have been planning to seek an audience with the Worldbearing Titan.\nYour body climbs the Sacred Path of Dawncloud, but your soul lingers at the shores of River of Souls... The souls along the mountain path — what do they want to tell?

steps.ch: 继续登山，并调查灵魂离体时出现的幻影
steps.en: Continue climbing the mountain and investigate the phantoms that appeared when the soul left the body

steps.ch: 泰坦断崖——整个翁法罗斯中距离刻法勒奥体最近的地方。你的心中早就盘算着觐见负世之泰坦的计划。\n敬请一探究竟。
steps.en: The Titan Cliff — the closest one can get to Kephale's divine vessel in all of Amphoreus. You have been planning to seek an audience with the Worldbearing Titan.\nTime to discover what lies ahead.

steps.ch: 继续登山，觐见刻法勒的奥体
steps.en: Continue your climb and have an audience with Kephale's divine vessel

quests.name_ch: 莎草啊，抽绎渎神者所想

steps.ch: 前去友爱之馆前，查看沿途是否有遗漏的资料。\n黑潮怪物袭击了此处的学者，慌乱之中，不少资料也遗落此处。\n希望能有塞纳托斯相关的情报。
steps.en: Before heading to the Library of Philia, look for any documents left behind along the way.\nMany documents were scattered when scholars fled from the black tide creatures.\nThere might be information about Thanatos.

steps.ch: 调查黑潮怪物的残躯
steps.en: Investigate the remains of the black tide spawned monster

steps.ch: 前去友爱之馆前，查看沿途是否有遗漏的资料。\n和风堇交换一下各自找到的情报吧。
steps.en: Before heading to the Library of Philia, look for any documents left behind along the way.\nLet's exchange information with Hyacine.

steps.ch: 继续前进，与风堇汇合
steps.en: Continue forward and join up with Hyacine

steps.ch: 与风堇交谈
steps.en: Speak with Hyacine

steps.ch: 与风堇一同前往友爱之馆，获取能够补充智库的资料，补充对翁法罗斯的认识。\n那位树庭惨案的幸存者——阿那克萨戈拉斯令人在意。
steps.en: Head to the Library of Philia with Hyacine to collect documents for the data bank and expand our understanding of Amphoreus.\nAnaxagoras, who survived the tragedy in the Grove, remains a mystery.

steps.ch: 前往友爱之馆
steps.en: Head to the Library of Philia

steps.ch: 与风堇一同前往友爱之馆，获取能够补充智库的资料，补充对翁法罗斯的认识。\n找找与阿那克萨戈拉斯有关的资料。
steps.en: Head to the Library of Philia with Hyacine to collect materials for the data bank and expand our understanding of Amphoreus.\nLook for documents related to Anaxagoras.

steps.ch: 搜寻那刻夏留下的资料
steps.en: Search for the materials left by Anaxa

steps.ch: 前往根石之间，寻找那刻夏的实验室
steps.en: Search for Anaxa's lab between the cornerstones

steps.ch: 你早在心中猜想到接近刻法勒会有意想不到的收获，果然活死人的身体能见到常人所不能见的「贵重记忆」。\n准备炼成吧。
steps.en: You had a feeling that getting close to Kephale would reveal unexpected truths. Indeed, as one of the living dead, you can perceive "precious memories" that others cannot.\nNow, prepare for transmutation.

steps.ch: 觐见刻法勒奥体，准备炼成
steps.en: Have an audience with Kephale's divine vessel, and prepare for transmutation

quests.name_ch: 争辩啊，代长矛分庭抗礼

steps.ch: 得知阿那克萨戈拉斯投奔元老院之后，为了掌控火种动向，阿格莱雅立刻动身前去黎明云崖质问元老院。\n那位学者似乎与如今{NICKNAME}的状况相同，也许将成为{F#她}{M#他}得救的关键。
steps.en: After discovering Anaxagoras had fled to the Council of Elders, Aglaea rushed to Dawncloud to confront the Council about the Coreflames.\nThe scholar appears to share the same condition as {NICKNAME}. This might hold the key to {F#her}{M#his} salvation.

steps.ch: 与阿格莱雅等人一同追问那刻夏去向
steps.en: Ask about Axana's whereabouts with Aglaea and the others

steps.ch: 得知阿那克萨戈拉斯投奔元老院之后，为了掌控火种动向，阿格莱雅立刻动身前去黎明云崖质问元老院。\n将万敌传来的警告告诉阿格莱雅。
steps.en: After discovering Anaxagoras had fled to the Council of Elders, Aglaea rushed to Dawncloud to confront the Council.\nDeliver Mydei's warning to Aglaea.

steps.ch: 返回半神议会，告知阿格莱雅
steps.en: Return to the Demigod Council and inform Aglaea about things

steps.ch: 遐蝶与阿那克萨戈拉斯支持元老院「重归黄金世」，这让「暂停逐火之旅」成为了公民大会的议题。\n听听遐蝶她公开「背叛」逐火之旅的原因，想必是有什么隐情吧。
steps.en: As Castorice and Anaxagoras back the Council of Elders' plan to "return to Era Chrysea," "pausing the Flame-Chase Journey" has become a matter for the citizens' assembly.\nLet's hear why Castorice publicly "abandoned" the Flame-Chase Journey. There must be more to this story.

steps.ch: 与遐蝶对话，了解事情经过
steps.en: Speak to Castorice and learn about what happened

quests.name_ch: 断梦啊，从夙世捎来启迪
quests.name_en: Broken Dream, Enlighten From the Beyond

steps.ch: 你前去断崖寻找那刻夏，那位专注灵魂研究的贤人存在着拯救{NICKNAME}的可能性，显然那刻夏对你的到来早有准备。\n「那诸位已陨的英雄，正是泰坦们成神前的模样」，那些陌生的记忆也许是找到塞纳托斯的线索。
steps.en: You head to Titan Cliff in search of Anaxa. The Sage, expert in soul studies, might be able to save {NICKNAME}. And it seems Anaxa has been expecting your arrival.\n"Those fallen heroes are the mortal incarnations of the Titans before their ascensions to godhood." — these strange memories may point the way to Thanatos.

steps.ch: 查看那刻夏展示的「记忆」
steps.en: Check the memory shown by Anaxa

quests.name_ch: 行者啊，向冥河解缆起航
quests.name_en: Pathstrider, Set Sail Upon the River of Souls

steps.ch: 遐蝶的解释得到黄金裔们的理解——为了得到塞纳托斯的去向，她主动站在元老院一侧，这是必要的选择。\n有人需要处理「暂停逐火之旅」的会议，也有人需要寻找塞纳托斯的踪影。
steps.en: Castorice's explanation earned her the Chrysos Heirs' understanding. To find out where Thanatos went, she actively stood with the Council of Elders. This is an essential choice.\nSomeone needs to handle the conference about "pausing the Flame-Chase Journey" and someone needs to find a trace of Thanatos.

steps.ch: 与阿格莱雅交谈，商量对策
steps.en: Speak with Aglaea and discuss countermeasures

steps.ch: 次日午时，扎格列斯的半神将成为冥河之行的向导。今日今时，应为远行留存体力。\n回到私人浴宫，再做打算。
steps.en: At noon of the next day, Zagreus's demigod will become a guide to traverse the River of Souls. Today, stamina should be conserved for the long trip ahead.\nReturn to the private bath chamber and make a plan.

steps.ch: 前往私人浴宫，与迷迷交谈
steps.en: Head to the private bath chamber and speak with Mem

steps.ch: 次日午时，扎格列斯的半神将成为冥河之行的向导。今日今时，应为远行留存体力。\n躺下休息，等待次日到来。
steps.en: At noon of the next day, Zagreus's demigod will become a guide to traverse the River of Souls. Today, stamina should be conserved for the long trip ahead.\nLay down and rest in preparation for tomorrow's arrival.

steps.ch: 好好休息，为远行保存体力
steps.en: Rest well and gather strength for a long journey

steps.ch: 你已经寻找了塞纳托斯太久。如今越是接近它，越是觉得夜晚漫长。\n你还有些话想和缇安讲，好像也有人察觉了你的想法。
steps.en: You've spent far too long searching for Thanatos. Now, the closer you seem to get to them, the longer the night seems to last.\nYou still have some things to say to Trianne, and someone else seems to have noticed your thoughts.

steps.ch: 出发前，再与缇安娃娃说说话
steps.en: Speak with the Trianne Doll again before heading out

steps.ch: 次日午时，扎格列斯的半神将成为冥河之行的向导。今日今时，应为远行留存体力。\n{NICKNAME}就像学黉里准备春游的学生…即便性命危在旦夕，{F#她}{M#他}还是这么松弛，姑且算作是好事吧。
steps.en: At noon of the next day, Zagreus's demigod will become a guide to traverse the River of Souls. Today, stamina should be conserved for the long trip ahead.\n{NICKNAME} is like a student preparing for a spring break trip... Even if lives are at stake {F#she}{M#he} is still so relaxed. That might be a good thing.

steps.ch: 睡不着，看看远方的泰坦吧
steps.en: Look at the distant Titan since you can't sleep

steps.ch: 去看看是谁在敲门
steps.en: See who's knocking at the door

steps.ch: 遐蝶登门拜访，既是为了散心，也是让{NICKNAME}跟随她取一样东西。\n「暂停逐火之旅」的支持与否，已经成了奥赫玛公民的头等大事。
steps.en: Castorice's visit isn't only for the purpose of relaxation, but also to have {NICKNAME} follow her to claim a certain item.\nThe vote to support pausing the Flame-Chase Journey or not has become the matter of prime importance among the citizenry of Okhema.

steps.ch: 与遐蝶同行，了解公民大会现状
steps.en: Walk with Castorice and learn about what's happening at the citizens' assembly

steps.ch: 遐蝶登门拜访，既是为了散心，也是让{NICKNAME}跟随她取一样东西。\n遐蝶想要述说，一段关于哀地里亚的回忆。
steps.en: Castorice's visit isn't only for the purpose of relaxation, but also to have {NICKNAME} follow her to retrieve a certain item.\nCastorice would like to illustrate a sequence of memories concerning Aidonia.

steps.ch: 与遐蝶交谈
steps.en: Speak with Castorice

steps.ch: 遐蝶登门拜访，既是为了散心，也是让{NICKNAME}跟随她取一样东西。\n遐蝶为{NICKNAME}准备了礼物。
steps.en: Castorice's visit isn't only for the purpose of relaxation, but also to have {NICKNAME} follow her to retrieve a certain item.\nCastorice prepared a gift for {NICKNAME}.

steps.ch: 与遐蝶同行，继续交谈
steps.en: Walk with Castorice and continue your talk

steps.ch: 查看遐蝶准备的礼物
steps.en: Check Castorice's gift

steps.ch: 遐蝶登门拜访，既是为了散心，也是让{NICKNAME}跟随她取一样东西。\n遐蝶准备的礼物被翁法罗斯最有名的猫咪怪盗给偷走了，而她还留下了线索。
steps.en: Castorice's visit isn't only for the purpose of relaxation, but also to have {NICKNAME} follow her to retrieve a certain item.\nThe gift that Castorice prepared was stolen by the famous Amphorean Kitty Phantom Thief. What's more, the thief left clues.

steps.ch: 找到黄金短矛，探明赛飞儿下落
steps.en: Find the Golden Short Spear and discover Cipher's whereabouts

steps.ch: 跟随黄金短矛
steps.en: Follow the Golden Short Spear

steps.ch: 根据黄金短矛指引，找到赛飞儿
steps.en: Follow the Golden Short Spear's direction and find Cipher

steps.ch: 遐蝶登门拜访，既是为了散心，也是让{NICKNAME}跟随她取一样东西。\n赛飞儿刻意塑造的神秘感到此为止，该露出真面目了。
steps.en: Castorice's visit isn't only for the purpose of relaxation, but also to have {NICKNAME} follow her to retrieve a certain item.\nCipher's manufactured mysteriousness is at an end. It's time to see what hides behind the veil.

steps.ch: 前往赛飞儿的秘密据点
steps.en: Head to Cipher's secret hideout

steps.ch: 计划有变，赛飞儿希望{NICKNAME}与遐蝶在奥赫玛城外会面。\n{NICKNAME}又稀里糊涂地在私人浴宫醒来。
steps.en: Plans have changed. Cipher hopes that {NICKNAME} can meet with Castorice outside Okhema.\n{NICKNAME} awakens groggily in the private baths once more.

steps.ch: 于私人浴宫中醒来
steps.en: Wake up in the private bath chamber

steps.ch: 计划有变，赛飞儿希望{NICKNAME}与遐蝶在奥赫玛城外会面。\n出发，前往斯缇科西亚。
steps.en: Plans have changed. Cipher hopes that {NICKNAME} can meet with Castorice outside Okhema.\nOnward, to Styxia.

steps.ch: 前往奥赫玛城外，与赛飞儿会面
steps.en: Leave Okhema and meet with Cipher

quests.name_ch: 摇船啊，请载我横渡冥流
quests.name_en: Ferryman, Ferry Me Across the Stream of Souls

steps.ch: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n阿那克萨戈拉斯提供的「贤者之石」与炼金术能将冥河中的泰坦召唤出来，而那炼金所需的材料应当就在城中。
steps.en: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nThe Philosopher's Stone provided by Anaxagoras and the art of alchemy can summon the Titan lurking with the River of Souls, and the alchemical materials should be found in the city as well.

steps.ch: 与遐蝶对话
steps.en: Speak to Castorice

steps.ch: 探索龙骸古城，寻找冥界入口
steps.en: Search Dragonbone City and find the entrance to the nether realm

steps.ch: 与斯缇科西亚的亡魂交谈
steps.en: Speak with the Styxian Spirit of the Dead

steps.ch: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n借助欧洛尼斯的奇迹，穿过险峻的冥河之水。
steps.en: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nUse Oronyx's Miracle to cross the treacherous waters of the River of Souls.

steps.ch: 利用欧洛尼斯奇迹通过冥河
steps.en: Use Oronyx's Miracle to cross the River of Souls

steps.ch: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n斯缇科西亚的亡魂们重复诉说着往昔，他们似乎是来自「黄金世」的亡者。
steps.en: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nThe spirits of Anaxagoras repeatedly recount the past. They seem to be those who fell during Era Chrysea.

steps.ch: 继续探索龙骸古城，与百夫长的亡魂交谈
steps.en: Continue exploring Dragonbone City and speak with the spirit of the centurion

steps.ch: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n斯缇科西亚的亡魂们重复诉说着往昔，他们似乎是来自「黄金世」的亡者。\n这灵魂的残留似乎与炼金术、与塞纳托斯都脱不开干系。
steps.en: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nThe spirits of Anaxagoras repeatedly recount the past. They seem to be fallen who lived during Era Chrysea.\nThe remains left by these spirits seem to have a connection with alchemy and Thanatos.

steps.ch: 查看灵魂的残留
steps.en: Check the souls remains

steps.ch: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n一切都指向斯缇科西亚最高处的塔，那里曾留下过巨龙的痕迹。
steps.en: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nEverything points to the highest towers at Styxia. There, remains left by the great dragon linger.

steps.ch: 继续探索龙骸古城，前往更高处
steps.en: Continue exploring Dragonbone City and head higher

steps.ch: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n斯缇科西亚的亡魂们重复诉说着往昔，他们似乎是来自「黄金世」的亡者。
steps.en: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nThe spirits of Anaxagoras repeatedly recount the past. They seem to be those who fell during Era Chrysea.

steps.ch: 继续探索龙骸古城，与宫廷学者的亡魂交谈
steps.en: Continue exploring Dragonbone City and speak with the spirit of the court scholar

steps.ch: 继续探索龙骸古城，进入王室宝库
steps.en: Continue exploring Dragonbone City and enter the royal vault

steps.ch: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n一切都指向斯缇科西亚最高处的塔，那里曾留下过巨龙的痕迹。
steps.en: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nEverything points to the highest towers at Styxia. There, remains left by the great dragon linger.

steps.ch: 寻找通向高处的通路
steps.en: Seek a pathway to higher ground

steps.ch: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n斯缇科西亚的亡魂们重复诉说着往昔，他们似乎是来自「黄金世」的亡者。\n这灵魂的残留似乎与炼金术、与塞纳托斯都脱不开干系。
steps.en: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nThe spirits of Anaxagoras repeatedly recount the past. They seem to be fallen who lived during Era Chrysea.\nThe remains left by these spirits seem to have a connection with alchemy and Thanatos.

steps.ch: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n一切都指向斯缇科西亚最高处的塔，那里曾留下过巨龙的痕迹。
steps.en: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nEverything points to the highest towers at Styxia. There, remains left by the great dragon linger.

steps.ch: 继续探索龙骸古城，与炼金术士的亡魂交谈
steps.en: Continue exploring Dragonbone City and speak with the spirit of the alchemist

steps.ch: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n杀出冥界的战士万敌，他那灵魂的幻影也出现在冥河滩涂之上。
steps.en: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nIllusions of Mydei's soul seem to have appeared on the banks of the River of Souls as he slaughters his way out of the nether realm.

steps.ch: 与万敌交谈
steps.en: Speak with Mydei

steps.ch: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n一切都指向斯缇科西亚最高处的塔，那里曾留下过巨龙的痕迹。
steps.en: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nEverything points to the highest towers at Styxia. There, remains left by the great dragon linger.

steps.ch: 继续探索龙骸古城，寻找通往高塔的通路
steps.en: Continue exploring Dragonbone City and seek a path to higher ground

steps.ch: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n前路阻断，会飞的迷迷能使出欧洛尼斯的奇迹，复原远处塔楼中的「奇迹宝珠」。
steps.en: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nThe path ahead has been severed. Mem, capable of flying and using Oronyx's Miracle, has restored the Miracle Orb in a distant tower.

steps.ch: 拜托迷迷使用欧洛尼斯祷言
steps.en: Ask Mem to use Oronyx's Prayer

steps.ch: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n一切都指向斯缇科西亚最高处的塔，那里曾留下过巨龙的痕迹。
steps.en: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nEverything points to the highest towers at Styxia. There, remains left by the great dragon linger.

steps.ch: 继续探索龙骸古城，沿着过去的锁链继续向上
steps.en: Continue exploring Dragonbone City and proceed upward with the chains of the past

steps.ch: 阿那克萨戈拉斯的「贤者之石」、斯缇科西亚的炼金法阵，以及遐蝶手中灵魂的残留，炼金的准备业已齐备。\n根据树庭的资料来看，「万物因四根的组合而生成，因四根的分离而消失」。完成炼成阵法，召唤泰坦。
steps.en: With Anaxagoras's Philosopher's Stone, Styxia's alchemical array, and the spiritual remains in Castorice's hands, the alchemical preparations are ready.\nAccording to data from the Grove, "All things come into being through the combination of the Four Roots and perish with their separation." Complete the alchemical array and summon the Titan.

steps.ch: 借助「贤者之石」，完成炼金术仪式
steps.en: Borrow the Philosopher's Stone and complete the alchemical ritual

steps.ch: 自冥河之中炼成的死龙残躯，它将载着遐蝶到达无人能够渡过的彼岸。\n在遐蝶临行前，与遐蝶再次交谈。
steps.en: The remains of Netherwing forged by the River of Souls. It carries Castorice to a shore none could cross.\nBefore Castorice makes her move, speak with her again.

steps.ch: 与遐蝶交谈，动身前往冥界
steps.en: Speak with Castorice and head to the nether realm

steps.ch: 自冥河之中炼成的死龙残躯，它将载着遐蝶到达无人能够渡过的彼岸。\n双子将在彼岸相会。
steps.en: The remains of Netherwing forged by the River of Souls. It carries Castorice to a shore none could cross.\nThe twins will soon reunite at the other shore.

steps.ch: 乘着「死龙」玻吕刻斯回到冥界
steps.en: Return to the nether realm via "Netherwing" Pollux

quests.name_ch: 公民啊，倾听那汹涌潮声
quests.name_en: Citizen, Listen to Those Roaring Tides

steps.ch: 公民大会关于「暂停逐火之旅」的议题也即将迎来尾声，众人也将见证「投票选出的明天」究竟是何模样。\n你的十五个门扉时终将结束，最后一场表演即将开幕。
steps.en: The citizens' assembly on the matter of "Pausing the Flame-Chase Journey" is coming to an end. Soon, everyone will witness what "vote-decided tomorrow" they will experience.\nYour fifteen Entry Hours are done. The last performance is about to begin.

steps.ch: 与瑟希斯对话
steps.en: Speak with Cerces

steps.ch: 前往半神议会，见证公民大会结果
steps.en: Head to the Demigod Council and witness the results of the citizens' assembly

steps.ch: 与传令士兵对话，在特等席落座
steps.en: Speak with the message-bearing soldier and take a seat at the special seating section

steps.ch: 落座并聆听白厄对公民们的演讲
steps.en: Sit down and listen to Phainon's speech to the public

steps.ch: 公民大会关于「暂停逐火之旅」的议题也即将迎来尾声，众人也将见证「投票选出的明天」究竟是何模样。\n掌握翁法罗斯命运的最后一枚陶片就在你的手中，你会将它掷于何处？
steps.en: The citizens' assembly on the matter of "Pausing the Flame-Chase Journey" is coming to an end. Soon, everyone will witness what "vote-decided tomorrow" they will experience.\nYou hold the last ceramic shard that will decide Amphoreus's fate. Where will your vote fall?

steps.ch: 前往陶罐处，投下最后一票
steps.en: Head to the dolium and place the last vote

steps.ch: 公民大会关于「暂停逐火之旅」的议题也即将迎来尾声，众人也将见证「投票选出的明天」究竟是何模样。\n多么愚蠢，竟然在末日将近时想用投票的方式决定世界的命运…你的职业道德要求你，去给这些笨货们好好上一课。
steps.en: The citizens' assembly on the matter of "Pausing the Flame-Chase Journey" is coming to an end. Soon, everyone will witness what "vote-decided tomorrow" they will experience.\nHow foolish, trying to decide the fate of the world through votes when the apocalypse looms... Your professional ethics demand that you give these fools an education.

steps.ch: 完成「大表演家」的表演
steps.en: Complete the Great Performer's performance

quests.name_ch: 学者啊，于真理门前再会
quests.name_en: Scholar, Let Us Meet Again Before the Gates of Truth

steps.ch: 成为半神的遐蝶成功将{NICKNAME}轻轻推出了冥界，她也为命运迎来结局。\n{NICKNAME}还记得与遐蝶再会的约定。
steps.en: Castorice, who became a demigod, successfully pushes {NICKNAME} gently out of the nether realm and welcomes the end of her fate.\n{NICKNAME} still remembers the promise they made with Castorice to meet her once more.

steps.ch: 离开冥界，回到人间
steps.en: Leave the nether realm and return to the mortal realm

steps.ch: 前往月光之下，遐蝶在呼唤你
steps.en: Go to the moonlight. Castorice is beckoning for you

steps.ch: 公民大会的事情暂告一段落，逐火之旅将会继续，元老院深受打击——这一切的缔造者阿那克萨戈拉斯也即将迎来最后的审判。\n直到最后的时刻，阿格莱雅才能和那刻夏打破彼此的芥蒂。
steps.en: The events in the citizens' assembly come to a temporary halt, and the Flame-Chase Journey will continue. The Council of Elders has suffered a heavy blow — and the one behind it all, Anaxagoras, is about to face the final judgment.\nOnly at the very last moment can Aglaea and Anaxa finally break down the barriers between them.

steps.ch: 倾听阿格莱雅与那刻夏交谈
steps.en: Listen to the conversation between Aglaea and Anaxa

steps.ch: 提交火种
steps.en: Submit Coreflame

steps.ch: 三月七的状况似乎更加严重了。\n黑天鹅似乎仍有隐瞒，翁法罗斯对忆庭来说意味着什么，它又为何如此重要。
steps.en: March 7th's condition seems to be getting worse.\nBlack Swan still seems to be hiding something... What does Amphoreus mean to the Garden of Recollection? And why is it so important?

steps.ch: 倾听黑天鹅与姬子的讨论
steps.en: Listen to the discussion between Black Swan and Himeko

quests.name_ch: 魔女的镜中回天

steps.ch: 感恩戴德吧，星穹列车。幸好黑塔大人对「翁法罗斯」很感兴趣，她打算亲自去到那里实地考察。\n黑塔大人您能多和第四面镜我说说话吗？
steps.en: Be grateful, Astral Express. Fortunately, Madam Herta is quite interested in Amphoreus and plans to conduct an on-the-ground investigation there.\nMadam Herta, could you speak with me, the Fourth Mirror, a little more?

steps.ch: 倾听黑塔的自说自话
steps.en: Listen to Herta talking to herself

steps.ch: 向第一面镜授令
steps.en: Give an order to the First Mirror

steps.ch: 向第二面镜授令
steps.en: Give an order to the Second Mirror

steps.ch: 向第三面镜授令
steps.en: Give an order to the Third Mirror

steps.ch: 回到第一面镜，准备折跃
steps.en: Return to the First Mirror and prepare for the warp jump

steps.ch: 学着点吧，星穹列车。黑塔大人不用肉身闯关，就能亲自降临翁法罗斯，只要轻轻出手，就能立刻探明这个陌生世界的奥秘。\n别问为什么我如此肯定，因为我早就是黑粉了。
steps.en: Learn from this, Astral Express. Madam Herta doesn't need to traverse obstacles in the flesh to personally visit Amphoreus. She can immediately uncover the secrets of this unknown world with just a simple touch.\nDon't ask me why I'm so sure — it's because I've been a Heritor for so long.

steps.ch: 继续前进，寻找翁法罗斯入口
steps.en: Continue forward to locate Amphoreus's entrance

steps.ch: 调查四周，查看记忆残留
steps.en: Check the surroundings for remnants of memories

steps.ch: 调查奇怪的水盆
steps.en: Investigate the strange basin

quests.name_ch: 死亡啊，如朝露滑落指尖

steps.ch: 你记得「长老」阿蒙内特，也记得这座信仰塞纳托斯的城邦哀地里亚，这是你回忆开始的地方。\n你当然也记得，你是如何成为一名行刑者，一名督战圣女的。
steps.en: You remember "Elder" Amunet as well as Aidonia, this city-state that worshiped Thanatos. This is where your memory begins.\nOf course, you also remember how you became an executioner and a Maiden of War.

steps.ch: 与「长老」阿蒙内特交谈
steps.en: Speak with "Elder" Amunet

steps.ch: 处刑不知名的死囚
steps.en: Execute the unknown death-row prisoner

steps.ch: 处刑勇敢的战士
steps.en: Execute the courageous warrior

steps.ch: 处刑异邦的战俘
steps.en: Execute the outlander war captive

steps.ch: 处刑不治的牧人
steps.en: Execute the Ill Herder

steps.ch: 你记得「长老」阿蒙内特，也记得这座信仰塞纳托斯的城邦哀地里亚，这是你回忆开始的地方。\n「长老」并非希望你成为一名「杀人不眨眼的刽子手」，而是希望你能充分理解生与死的重量后，再饱含敬意地完成你那与生俱来的使命。
steps.en: You remember "Elder" Amunet as well as Aidonia, the city-state that worshiped Thanatos. This is where your memory begins.\nThe "Elder" does not wish that you become a merciless executioner, but that you would fully understand the weight of life and death, then carry out with utmost respect the duty with which you were born.

steps.ch: 与「长老」阿蒙内特交谈，了解行刑人的使命
steps.en: Speak with "Elder" Amunet and learn about the duties of an executioner

steps.ch: 你记得「长老」阿蒙内特，也记得这座信仰塞纳托斯的城邦哀地里亚，这是你回忆开始的地方。\n主动使用你与生俱来的天赋，学会如何接受它。\n「证明自己是个合格的圣女，或是具备如此决心吧。」
steps.en: You remember "Elder" Amunet as well as Aidonia, this city-state that worshiped Thanatos. This is where your memory begins.\nActively use your natural-born talent and learn to accept it.\n"Prove that you're a capable Holy Maiden, or that you have such resolve."

steps.ch: 击败天谴先锋
steps.en: Defeat Furiae Praetor

steps.ch: 你记得「长老」阿蒙内特，也记得这座信仰塞纳托斯的城邦哀地里亚，这是你回忆开始的地方。\n「长老」并非希望你成为一名「杀人不眨眼的刽子手」，而是希望你能充分理解生与死的重量后，再饱含敬意地完成你那与生俱来的使命。
steps.en: You remember "Elder" Amunet as well as Aidonia, the city-state that worshiped Thanatos. This is where your memory begins.\nThe "Elder" does not wish that you become a merciless executioner, but that you would fully understand the weight of life and death, then carry out with utmost respect the duty with which you were born.

quests.name_ch: 花海啊，只为死之神垂怜
quests.name_en: Sea of Flowers, Adored Only by Death

steps.ch: 冥界…果真如传说那样，是一片花海。\n世人皆知灰黯之手，却鲜有人知晓塞纳托斯的另一只手——如今，你们终于相遇了。\n跟随着塞纳托斯前进，顺道一观她看顾的这片花海吧。
steps.en: Just as the legends say... The nether realm is truly a sea of flowers.\nEveryone knows of the Hand of Shadow, but few know of Thanatos's other hand — And now, you have finally met each other.\nProceed with Thanatos, and behold the sea of flowers that she watches over.

steps.ch: 与塞纳托斯一同前进
steps.en: Move forward with Thanatos

quests.name_ch: 归程啊，莫向来时路回首
quests.name_en: Homeward Journey, Never Look Back Upon the Path Whence You Came

steps.ch: 一位迷途者重返人间绝非易举。死亡的呢喃甘美而宁静，倘若意志不足，必将被冥府的长臂死死牵制。\n不要回头，向前看。走出冥界，回到人间。
steps.en: It is not easy for a lost soul to return to the mortal realm. The whispers of Death are sweet and alluring. If your determination wavers, you will succumb and be forever ensnared by the netherworld's grasp.\nDo not turn around. Look forward. Leave the nether realm and return to the mortal realm.

steps.ch: 抵抗死国的诱惑，离开冥界
steps.en: Resist the land of the dead's temptation and leave the nether realm

chapters.chapter_en: Through the Petals in the Land of Repose

quests.name_ch: 星空啊，为纷乱千念濯洗

steps.ch: 来到翁法罗斯后，伴随着相遇与离别，一次次经历目不暇接，让人有些惆怅。就连一向豁达的{NICKNAME}，此时也身处创世涡心，浸泡在往事中。
steps.en: Since arriving in Amphoreus, each meeting and parting has come in dazzling succession, leaving behind a faint melancholy. Even the ever-spirited {NICKNAME} now stands within the Vortex of Genesis, immersed in memories.

steps.ch: 前往创世涡心，回忆之前的经历
steps.en: Head to the Vortex of Genesis and recall what came before

steps.ch: 赛飞儿发短信邀请{NICKNAME}前往斯缇科西亚寻宝，或许能够成为一道不错的调剂。
steps.en: Cipher sent a message inviting {NICKNAME} to go treasure hunting in Styxia — could be a welcome change of pace.

steps.ch: 前往创世涡心，继续冒险
steps.en: Head to the Vortex of Genesis and continue your adventure

steps.ch: 前往「龙骸古城」斯缇科西亚，继续冒险
steps.en: Head to the "Dragonbone City" Styxia and continue your adventure

steps.ch: 调查可疑声音的来源
steps.en: Investigate the source of the strange noise

quests.name_ch: 书卷啊，可曾令锋刃回眸

steps.ch: 来古士提出意愿，希望我能带他前往车厢坠毁处查勘。令我在意的是，他似乎有方法能对列车进行修复…
steps.en: Lygus expressed a wish — he hoped I could escort him to the carriage crash site for an inspection. What catches my attention is he may know how to repair the Express...

steps.ch: 前往「命运重渊」雅努萨波利斯，继续冒险
steps.en: Head to the "Abyss of Fate" Janusopolis and continue your adventure

steps.ch: 此时，{NICKNAME}与白厄正在树庭继续着他们的意象训练。把力气用光后，友爱之馆的丰富馆藏将他们的视线吸引了过去…
steps.en: Right now, {NICKNAME} and Phainon are deep in their imagery training at the Grove. After spending all their strength, their gaze drifts to the vast collection in the Library of Philia...

steps.ch: 前往「呓语密林」神悟树庭，继续冒险
steps.en: Head to the "Murmuring Woods" Grove of Epiphany and continue your adventure

steps.ch: 前往友爱之馆
steps.en: Head to the Library of Philia

steps.ch: 在附近看看书
steps.en: Browse some books nearby

steps.ch: 看看迷迷在看什么
steps.en: See what Mem's reading

steps.ch: 迷迷在看什么？
steps.en: What's Mem reading?

steps.ch: 迷迷在看什么？！
steps.en: What's Mem reading!?

steps.ch: （可选）看看白厄在看什么
steps.en: (Optional) See what Phainon's reading

steps.ch: 我后来得知，{NICKNAME}与我几乎是在同一时刻遭遇了元老院的「清洗者」们，但不同的是，他们发生了正面冲突。
steps.en: I later learned that {NICKNAME} encountered the Council of Elders' "Cleaners" at almost the same moment I did, but unlike me, they engaged them head-on.

steps.ch: 另一方面，在奥赫玛，元老院卑劣的加害计划正在悄然实施，很快，便演变成了一场巨大风波。
steps.en: Meanwhile, in Okhema, the Council of Elders' despicable scheme was quietly taking shape, and soon, it erupted into a storm of chaos.

steps.ch: 前往「永恒圣城」奥赫玛，继续冒险
steps.en: Head to the "Eternal Holy City" Okhema and continue your adventure

quests.name_ch: 宝箱啊，兀自承装下前尘

steps.ch: 将{NICKNAME}与白厄接送至树庭后，赛飞儿找来「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，回到冥滩一阵搜刮…
steps.en: After dropping {NICKNAME} and Phainon off at the Grove, Cipher rounded up the "Spirithief", Bartholos, and returned to the Nethershore for a bit of scavenging...

steps.ch: 前往「龙骸古城」斯缇科西亚，继续冒险
steps.en: Head to the "Dragonbone City" Styxia and continue your adventure

quests.name_ch: 金丝啊，请喻救世者谶语
quests.name_en: Golden Thread, Relay the Savior's Fate

steps.ch: 克拉特鲁斯向我传达了阿格莱雅的死讯，而随后衣匠发来的短信也证明了他所言非虚，我相当震惊。摆脱「清洗者」的纠缠，我立即赶回奥赫玛，和{NICKNAME}汇合后，向同伴们了解情况…
steps.en: Krateros brought word of Aglaea's death, and the Garmentmaker's message that followed confirmed it, I was stunned. After shaking off the "Cleaners," I returned to Okhema at once. Upon reuniting with {NICKNAME}, I sought out our companions to learn what had happened...

steps.ch: 前往「命运重渊」雅努萨波利斯，继续冒险
steps.en: Head to the "Abyss of Fate" Janusopolis and continue your adventure

steps.ch: 前往「呓语密林」神悟树庭，继续冒险
steps.en: Head to the "Murmuring Woods" Grove of Epiphany and continue your adventure

steps.ch: 前往「永恒圣城」奥赫玛，继续冒险
steps.en: Head to the "Eternal Holy City" Okhema and continue your adventure

steps.ch: 阿格莱雅的留言让白厄下定了决心，他号召众人，意图控制住混乱的局面，安抚民众。事实证明，他是一位优秀的演说家。
steps.en: Aglaea's final words gave Phainon resolve. He gathered everyone, determined to bring order to the chaos and calm the people. And indeed, he proved to be a gifted speaker.

steps.ch: 前往「半神议院」黎明云崖，继续冒险
steps.en: Head to the "Demigod Council" Dawncloud and continue your adventure

quests.name_ch: 识院啊，悠扬间评定今昔
quests.name_en: Grove, Judge the Past and Present

steps.ch: 因为先前的事件影响，我前往树庭，意图调查并记录下这个世界的泰坦神话与相关研究，却在那里偶遇了处理要事的风堇。收集火种的任务已经刻不容缓，所以我决定见证风堇完成天空的仪式，获得前往艾格勒所在之处的手段。
steps.en: Still reeling from recent events, I went to the Grove, hoping to investigate and record the myths of the Titans or some manner of related research. There, I unexpectedly encountered Hyacine, who was dealing with urgent matters. The task of collecting Coreflames could wait no longer, so I chose to witness Hyacine perform the Skyward Rite and gain the path to Aquila's location.

steps.ch: 前往「呓语密林」神悟树庭，继续冒险
steps.en: Head to the "Murmuring Woods" Grove of Epiphany and continue your adventure

steps.ch: 寻找充满回忆的场所
steps.en: Seek out a place filled with memories

steps.ch: 寻找先祖之灵
steps.en: Search for Ancestral Ghost

steps.ch: 前往创世涡心
steps.en: Head to the Vortex of Genesis

steps.ch: 回到神悟树庭
steps.en: Back to the Grove of Epiphany

quests.name_ch: 诗者啊，从我处诉说天空·上
quests.name_en: Poet, Speak of the Sky Through Me (I)

steps.ch: 晨昏之眼，被冠以泰坦神名的天空壁垒，既是遥远年代天空一族的故乡，也是如今艾格勒的栖地。在风堇的帮助下，我们踏上了这片域外之地，找寻那位制约天幕的泰坦。
steps.en: The Eye of Twilight, a sky barrier named after a Titan, was both the homeland of the Sky people in ancient times and now serves as Aquila's dwelling. With Hyacine's help, we have set foot on this outworld land to find the Titan who binds the sky.

steps.ch: 前往「半神议院」黎明云崖，继续冒险
steps.en: Head to the "Demigod Council" Dawncloud and continue your adventure

steps.ch: 前往「穹顶关塞」晨昏之眼，继续冒险
steps.en: Head to the "Fortress of Dome" Eye of Twilight and continue your adventure

steps.ch: 继续前进，探索晨昏之眼
steps.en: Continue onward and explore Eye of Twilight

steps.ch: 尝试点亮天象画壁
steps.en: Try to illuminate the celestial mural

steps.ch: 阅览前人的记忆，寻找线索
steps.en: Read through past memories and search for clues

steps.ch: 整理一下获取到的线索
steps.en: Sort through the clues you've collected

steps.ch: 操纵浑象仪，开启天象画壁
steps.en: Use the celestial globe to activate the celestial mural

steps.ch: 操作西风罗盘，架设道路
steps.en: Use the West Wind Compass to set up a path

steps.ch: 探索中，我们无意间瞥见了天空之民的往昔，带着肃杀氛围，似乎难以用和平来形容。一位奇兽在我们面前现身，它与那位英雄塞涅俄丝关系匪浅，我们决定跟上它的振翅，一同前行。
steps.en: During our exploration, we caught glimpses of the Skyfolk's past, filled with a solemn atmosphere that could hardly be described as peaceful. Then, a mythical beast appeared before us, one deeply connected to the hero Seliose. We decided to follow its fluttering wings and continue forward together.

steps.ch: 跟随奇兽继续前行
steps.en: Follow the mythical beast and continue forward

steps.ch: 乘坐升降梯后，继续前行
steps.en: Take the elevator and continue forward

steps.ch: 查看索拉比斯的状态
steps.en: Check on Solabis' condition

steps.ch: 在风堇的呼唤中，索拉比斯恢复了神智。既而，塞涅俄丝的两位随伴翼兽愿意为我们带路，前往艾格勒的所在处。
steps.en: Responding to Hyacine's call, Solabis regained its sanity. Then, Seliose's two companion winged beasts offered to guide us to Aquila's location.

steps.ch: 尝试操纵风场，前往浑象仪所在处
steps.en: Try to control the wind field to reach the celestial globe's location

steps.ch: 尝试维修「电路」
steps.en: Try to repair the "circuits"

steps.ch: 尝试维修另一侧的「电路」
steps.en: Try to repair the "circuits" on the other side

steps.ch: 用浑象仪改变天象，逼泰坦现身
steps.en: Use the celestial globe to alter the weather and force the Titan to reveal themself

steps.ch: 见证塞涅俄丝的真相
steps.en: Witness the truth about Seliose

steps.ch: 天空一族的传说、风堇所在意的历史空白，「那段往事」。我们思索着翼兽们诉说的未知，不断追逐着艾格勒，试图利用天象画壁将其逼出。
steps.en: The legends of the Sky people, the historical gaps that concern Hyacine — "the past." We pondered the unknown tales shared by the winged beasts, relentlessly tracking Aquila down, trying to force them out using the celestial mural.

steps.ch: 继续前进，追逐艾格勒的踪迹
steps.en: Continue forward and track down Aquila

steps.ch: 前往西风罗盘处
steps.en: Head to the West Wind Compass

steps.ch: 操作西风罗盘，创造道路
steps.en: Use the West Wind Compass to create a path

steps.ch: 继续前进，跟上露奈比斯
steps.en: Continue forward and keep up with Lunabis

steps.ch: 使用神龛增幅祷言
steps.en: Use the shrine to enhance prayers

steps.ch: 前往浑象仪所在处
steps.en: Head to the celestial globe's location

steps.ch: 击败黑潮造物
steps.en: Defeat the Black Tide Creatures

steps.ch: 使用扎格列斯之手的冲拳，修好「硬盘」
steps.en: Use the Punch ability of the Hand of Zagreus to repair the "hard drive"

steps.ch: 再次用浑象仪改变天象，逼泰坦现身
steps.en: Use the celestial globe to alter the firmament again and force the Titan to reveal themself

steps.ch: 阅览记忆，揭开历史的面纱
steps.en: Read through memories to reveal the hidden truths of the past

steps.ch: 继续前进，与索拉比斯汇合
steps.en: Continue forward and join up with Solabis

steps.ch: 操作西风罗盘，重新架设道路
steps.en: Use the West Wind Compass to rebuild the path

steps.ch: 用浑象仪转换天象，重现过往
steps.en: Use the celestial globe to alter the firmament and reveal the past.

quests.name_ch: 诗者啊，从我处诉说天空·下
quests.name_en: Poet, Speak of the Sky Through Me (II)

steps.ch: 塞涅俄丝的过往似乎与故事所述相差甚远，在她曾经的两名随伴奇兽陪同下，我们即将揭示被掩藏的古老真相。
steps.en: Seliose's past seems to diverge greatly from what was told in bygone stories. Now, accompanied by her two mythical companion beasts from ages past, we stand poised to unveil the ancient and hidden truths.

steps.ch: 用浑象仪转换天象，重现过往
steps.en: Use the celestial globe to alter the firmament and reveal the past.

steps.ch: 与风堇对话，准备直面最后的真相
steps.en: Speak with Hyacine and prepare to face the final truth

quests.name_ch: 石板啊，为何罔闻那灯影
quests.name_en: Slate, Why Neglect That Light's Shade

steps.ch: 赛飞儿将刻法勒的火种带至斯缇科西亚保护起来，并独自解决了前来抢夺的「清洗者」。只是，威胁并非只有元老院的刺客，于此同时，盗火行者的身影也已触抵冥岸。
steps.en: Cipher brought Kephale's Coreflame to Styxia for safeguarding, then single-handedly fended off the Cleaners who sought to seize it. Yet the threat goes beyond the Council's assassins, for at the same moment, the Flame Reaver's figure has settled upon the nether shore.

steps.ch: 前往「龙骸古城」斯缇科西亚，继续冒险
steps.en: Head to the "Dragonbone City" Styxia and continue your adventure

quests.name_ch: 黎明啊，执耀于全世之终
quests.name_en: Dawn, Shine at the World's End

steps.ch: 世界之外，天才们藉现有信息进行推演，令翁法罗斯的本质逐步浮出水面。
steps.en: Worlds beyond, the geniuses compile the present information to begin their extrapolation, compelling Amphoreus's quintessential nature to surface.

steps.ch: 前往创世涡心，完成「再创世」
steps.en: Head to the Vortex of Genesis and complete the "Era Nova"

steps.ch: 某时某刻，白厄携最后一枚火种赶赴创世涡心，但在那里，他却见到了本不该身在此处的人……
steps.en: Sometime, someplace, Phainon bore the final Coreflame and rushed into the Vortex of Genesis. But there, he saw someone who shouldn't be there manifest before him...

quests.name_ch: 英雄啊，兑现那染血的冀望

steps.ch: 盗火行者突然陷入凝滞，似乎是发生了某种变故。思索间，我却再次见到了{NICKNAME}的身影…
steps.en: The Flame Reaver suddenly froze, as if something unforeseen had transpired. As I pondered what might have happened, I spotted {NICKNAME}'s figure once more...

steps.ch: 与卫士对话，前往同丹恒会合
steps.en: Talk to the Guard, and meet up with Dan Heng

steps.ch: 与丹恒会合
steps.en: Meet up with Dan Heng

steps.ch: 逃离翁法罗斯
steps.en: Escape from Amphoreus

steps.ch: 螺丝咕姆先生提供的信息让我们感到些许不安——此时此刻，三月七似乎也被卷入了翁法罗斯。
steps.en: Mr. Screwllum's information has left us feeling rather unsettled. It seems March 7th has now also become entangled in the events of Amphoreus.

steps.ch: 观看三月七的经历
steps.en: Watch March 7th's experience

steps.ch: 螺丝咕姆先生的现身无疑是一个转机，我们对翁法罗斯的状况有了新的认知。\n应他的请求，{NICKNAME}将留在翁法罗斯临机应变，而我会按照原定计划返回列车，与列车组的其他成员汇合后，商讨下一步的计划。
steps.en: Mr. Screwllum's arrival marks a definite turning point, giving us fresh insights into Amphoreus's condition.\nFollowing his request, {NICKNAME} will stay behind in Amphoreus to adapt to changing circumstances, while I'll return to the Express as planned to regroup with the other Crew members and formulate our next course of action.

steps.ch: 前往创世涡心，与白厄共同完成「再创世」
steps.en: Head to the Vortex of Genesis and complete the Era Nova with Phainon

steps.ch: 与白厄共同完成「再创世」
steps.en: Complete the Era Nova with Phainon

steps.ch: 完成「再创世」
steps.en: Complete Era Nova

steps.ch: 观看「沉浸式戏剧」
steps.en: Watch "Immersive Theater"

quests.name_ch: 英雄啊，回返那安宁的家乡
quests.name_en: Hero, Return to That Peace of Home

steps.ch: 回到创世涡心的{NICKNAME}与白厄一同归还了最后的火种，却未能按照预期中那样前往新世界，而是被来古士拉入了一场「沉浸式戏剧」之中。
steps.en: Upon returning to the Vortex of Genesis, {NICKNAME} and Phainon returned the final Coreflame together, but rather than journeying to the new world as expected, they were pulled into an "Immersive Theater" by Lygus.

steps.ch: 前往第一幕：「启程」
steps.en: Head to Act I: Departure

steps.ch: 跟随白厄，寻找昔涟
steps.en: Follow Phainon to find Cyrene

steps.ch: 「戏剧」实为某人年少时的记忆，舞台是昔日的哀丽秘榭，{NICKNAME}带着一肚子的问题， 扮演着其人「最重要的伙伴」，陪伴他与昔涟一同找寻着某物…
steps.en: The "theater" is actually someone's childhood memories, staged in the Aedes Elysiae of old. {NICKNAME}, with many questions in mind, assumes the role of this person's "most important companion," joining him and Cyrene on their search for something important...

steps.ch: 在祝祭庭院寻找神谕牌
steps.en: Find oracle cards in the Sacrament Courtyard

steps.ch: 登上阁楼，寻找神谕牌
steps.en: Go to the attic to find oracle cards

steps.ch: 跟随二人，前往庭园后院
steps.en: Follow the two to the backyard of the garden

steps.ch: 跟随二人，进入迷路迷境
steps.en: Follow the two to enter the Membrance Maze

steps.ch: 哀丽秘榭深处存在着一处「迷境」，{NICKNAME}跟随着二人一同前往，在那里见到了许多…形似迷迷的「妖精」住民？
steps.en: Deep in the Aedes Elysiae lies a "Maze." {NICKNAME} follows the two there and encounters many... fairy-like residents that resemble Mem?

steps.ch: 与迷迷对话…？
steps.en: Talk to Mem...?

steps.ch: 跟随徕啦迷，寻找村长
steps.en: Follow Relimem to find the village chief

steps.ch: 白厄与昔涟孩提时的游具——「神谕牌」，它所映照出的，是那熟悉而又陌生的，逐火英雄们的身姿。它是否象征着确凿无疑的命运之线？亦或只是舞台上的迷雾布景？其时，{NICKNAME}仍不得而知。
steps.en: The "oracle cards," childhood toys of Phainon and Cyrene, reflect the figures of Flame-Chase heroes, both familiar and strange. Do they symbolize the unyielding threads of fate? Or are they merely foggy backdrops on this theatrical stage? At this moment, {NICKNAME} could not yet tell.

steps.ch: 与昔涟讨论神谕牌揭示的未来
steps.en: Talk to Cyrene about the future revealed by oracle cards

steps.ch: 面对将要到来的「灾难」，昔日的白厄做出了选择。\n而这个决断，也将他带向了逐火之旅的开端…
steps.en: Faced with the oncoming "catastrophe," the Phainon of the past made his choice.\nAnd that very decision led him to the start of Flame-Chase Journey...

steps.ch: 拯救哀丽秘榭
steps.en: Save Aedes Elysiae

steps.ch: 白厄与昔涟孩提时的游具——「神谕牌」，它所映照出的，是那熟悉而又陌生的，逐火英雄们的身姿。它是否象征着确凿无疑的命运之线？亦或只是舞台上的迷雾布景？其时，{NICKNAME}仍不得而知。
steps.en: The "oracle cards," childhood toys of Phainon and Cyrene, reflect the figures of Flame-Chase heroes, both familiar and strange. Do they symbolize the unyielding threads of fate? Or are they merely foggy backdrops on this theatrical stage? At this moment, {NICKNAME} could not yet tell.

steps.ch: （可选）倾听神谕牌中的回音
steps.en: (Optional) Listen to the echoes of oracle cards

steps.ch: 「戏剧」的第二幕，是白厄与那位我们熟知的悬锋王子——万敌的初遇…
steps.en: The second act of this "drama" is Phainon's first encounter with Mydei, the Kremnos prince we all know...
