steps.ch: 前往第二幕：「试炼」
steps.en: Head to Act II: Trial

steps.ch: 见证另类的「角斗」
steps.en: Witness a different kind of "duel"

steps.ch: 跟随白厄，准备「角斗」
steps.en: Follow Phainon to prepare for "duel"

steps.ch: 接受塔兰顿的称量
steps.en: Accept the test of Talanton

steps.ch: 呈现在{NICKNAME}面前的第三幕，似乎是逐火之旅的终点，但与白厄一同见证末世的，是那名在我们的认知中，殒命于他童年时期的少女——昔涟。
steps.en: The third act, as it plays out before {NICKNAME}, appears to mark the end of the Flame-Chase Journey. But the one who witnesses the world's end times with Phainon is Cyrene — the girl we believe to have perished in his childhood years.

steps.ch: 前往第三幕：「归返」

steps.en: Greet Oronyx

steps.ch: 跟随二人步入命运终点
steps.en: Follow the two to enter the end of destiny

steps.en: Listen to Lygus' explanation of the current situation

steps.ch: 继续前进，见证戏剧谢幕
steps.en: Keep going to witness the theatrical curtain call

steps.ch: 据{NICKNAME}所述，这段「记忆」中的些许细节，与我们来到翁法罗斯的经历大相径庭。似乎来古士是想借此，将翁法罗斯的真相向{NICKNAME}托出。
steps.en: According to {NICKNAME}, certain details in this "memory" seem at odds with our journey through Amphoreus. It appears Lygus intended to use this to reveal Amphoreus's true state to {NICKNAME}.

steps.ch: 与来古士交谈，唤起最后的记忆
steps.en: Talk to Lygus to show the final memory

steps.ch: 见证记忆谢幕
steps.en: Witness the memory's curtain call

steps.ch: （可选）观看记忆的片段
steps.en: (Optional) Watch memory fragment

steps.ch: 「戏剧」实为某人年少时的记忆，舞台是昔日的哀丽秘榭，{NICKNAME}带着一肚子的问题， 扮演着其人「最重要的伙伴」，陪伴他与昔涟一同找寻着某物…
steps.en: The "theater" is actually someone's childhood memories, staged in the Aedes Elysiae of old. {NICKNAME}, with many questions in mind, assumes the role of this person's "most important companion," joining him and Cyrene on their search for something important...

steps.ch: {NICKNAME}的思绪被拉回了创世涡心，回到了再创世的前一刻，与白厄一同，直面最后的来客——那位燃尽的救世之人，与它所践行的意志。
steps.en: {NICKNAME}'s thoughts are pulled back to the Vortex of Genesis, to the moment before the Era Nova, to when they are standing beside Phainon and facing the final visitor: The one who burned to nothingness for salvation and the will they are carrying out.

quests.name_ch: 英雄啊，点燃那最初的骄阳

steps.ch:
让我来讲述一群追逐烈日的若虫吧，再创世的凯歌——
他们自门扉起，于王座终，走过安眠地的花丛，却在黎明升起时坠落。
他们投入金血的源头，要唤醒
负世之人，救世之人，咆哮之人，燃烧不息之人。
他将献祭他一切所爱，他的献祭永不停歇。
steps.en:
Let me tell a tale of a swarm of nymphs that chase the scorching dawn. The Paean of Era Nova...
For their light slips through the gate while their shadow greets the throne, for they walked through the petals in the land of repose, yet fell finally at dawn's rise...
They cast themselves into the source of golden blood to awaken:
The Worldbearer, the Deliverer, the Roarer, the one with Ever-Burning Flame.
He will sacrifice all he loves, and his offering shall never end.

steps.ch: 见证翁法罗斯的真相
steps.en: Witness the truth of Amphoreus

steps.ch: 与心中的故乡道别
steps.en: Bid farewell to The Homeland Within

steps.ch:
你还记得她们吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
英雄撕裂天空，圣女飞落悬崖，棋手扬起初火，以负世神谕之名。
多么可敬！然而，命运从来慷慨，赴死的若虫必得赴死的结局。
你啊，救世主，看她们无光的死灰！难道还要妄想留住？
那推石攀升的，必遭大地倾覆；搅扰岁月的，也只能徒增一副零落的甲壳。
听我说，你与她们无异：正如那欢唱的也嘶声，明眸的也盲目。
去！尽管独自向前——
狂欢，起舞，投入不倦的火，永不停歇！
steps.en:
Do you still remember them, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?
The hero tore through the sky, the Holy Maiden fell from the cliff, and the chessmaster ignited the first Flame, all in the name of prophecy of Worldbearer.
What noble deeds! And yet fate, ever generous, ensures that the death-bound nymphs shall find their death nevertheless.
O Deliverer, behold the lifeless ash they've become! Do you still futilely dream of saving them?
Those who push the boulder upward will see the earth swallow them whole. Those who meddle with time earn nothing but a shattered shell.
Hear me. You're no different from them: The singers still scream, and the bright-eyed still go blind.
Go, then! March on alone —
Revel, dance, throw yourself into the tireless flame, and never stop!

steps.ch: 与海瑟音交谈
steps.en: Talk to Hysilens

steps.ch: 跟随海瑟音，觐见「凯撒」刻律德菈
steps.en: Follow Hysilens to greet Imperator Cerydra

steps.ch: 觐见「凯撒」刻律德菈
steps.en: Greet Imperator Cerydra

steps.ch: 见证第一次永劫回归的结局
steps.en: Witness the end of the 1st Eternal Recurrence

steps.ch:
你还记得他们吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
昔日，恩师尚能为你指点迷津；还有那捷足的羁客，多洛斯的偷儿，她的家乡尚未因你落入火场。
是了，过去的已经过去，但神样的战士，你是否也曾垂泪，为那美酒似的年光？
难道你们不曾血肉相连，金血不曾浓于水么？
不！就让眼泪尽情流淌吧，别教那怒火蒸干了——
然后，记得痛饮：因为之于诸神，人子的泪水胜过凡间万千般蜜酿。
steps.en:
Do you still remember them, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?
Once, your teacher could still guide you through the dark. And that fleet-footed traveler, the thief of Dolos, her home was yet untouched by the fires you brought.
Yes, the past is gone. But you, godlike warrior, did you ever shed a tear for those years, sweet as wine?
Weren't you once bound by blood and flesh? Wasn't golden blood thicker than water?
No! Let your tears flow freely. Don't let rage burn them away —
Then, remember to drink deep: For, to the gods, the tears of mortals are sweeter than any honey brew on Earth.

steps.ch: 与那刻夏交谈
steps.en: Talk to Anaxa

steps.ch: 跟随那刻夏，取得「理性」的火种
steps.en: Follow Anaxa to obtain the Coreflame of Reason

steps.ch: 见证「贼灵」巴特鲁斯盗走火种
steps.en: Witness Spirithief Bartholos stealing the Coreflame

steps.ch: 见证卡厄斯兰那的应对
steps.en: Witness Khaslana's response

steps.ch: 施展「欧洛尼斯神迹」，夺回火种
steps.en: Perform Oronyx's Miracle to take back the Coreflame

steps.ch: 击败「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，夺回火种
steps.en: Defeat Spirithief Bartholos to take back the Coreflame

steps.ch: 与赛飞儿对峙
steps.en: Confront Cipher

steps.ch:
你还记得他吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
礼赞迈德漠斯，最伟大的征服者，最伟大的守护者，最强者；垂死的雄狮，目光如炬，无邦之王。
说啊，倘若刻法勒永志不忘：你已为他刻留多少伤疤，击碎多少骨节，自背后贯穿他的胸膛？
歌耳巴尼帕耳图书馆如何在火海中瓦解，最后一名悬锋人，他的毁灭是何颜色？
可悲的伶人，你不仅适合歌舞、把戏和玩笑，也精于刀口舔血的背叛。
大可用全世之重粉饰你的愚蠢，再用它装点自相残杀，惨剧的风味。
steps.en:
Do you still remember him, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?
All hail Mydeimos, the greatest conqueror, the mightiest protector, the strongest of all. The dying lion, eyes blazing, the king with no kingdom.
Tell me, if Kephale never forgets — how many scars have you already carved on him? How many vertebrae have you shattered? How many times did you drive your blade through his back?
How did the Library of Garbaniphoro fall to flame? What color was the destruction of the last Kremnoan?
You pitiful jester, fit not only for singing, dancing, and jests, but also for treachery that walks the razor's edge.
Go on, veil your folly with the weight of the world, then adorn your fratricide with it — just to savor the taste of tragedy.

steps.ch: 「汝将肩负骄阳，直至灰白的黎明显著。」
steps.en: "You will bear the blazing sun, until the pale dawn breaks."

steps.ch:
你还记得她吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
遐蝶，所有的叹息都从她的指尖涌出；所有的慰语都因她的手被阻隔；所有的死亡都为她拥入怀中；所有的恸哭都被她吞咽在掌心。
说啊，倘若刻法勒永志不忘：你已为她磔碎多少对翼，熄灭多少鲜花，把蝴蝶扑入死灰？
芬芳的月色流成冥河，如何被你酿成金色的毒酒，为你徒劳救世的欢宴设奠？
倒是你，披着羊皮的救世主，最该成祭神的牺牲！
丑陋的野兽，伪善的眼睑盖不住喷薄的毒火，那矛似的犄角生来更为弑杀友亲。
就将尸骨当作美餐饱腹，鲜甜会说服你：「我毕竟对屠刀一无所知」。
steps.en:
Do you still remember her, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?
Castorice, with every sigh flowing from her fingertips and her hands blocking all words of comfort, she held each death close to her heart and swallowed every cry of grief in her palms.
Tell me, if Kephale never forgets, how many pairs of wings have you shattered for her? How many blossoms have you snuffed out? How many butterflies have you cast into the ashes?
The moonlight's fragrance once streamed like the River of Souls. How did you turn it into golden poison and make it libations for your banquet of futile deliverance?
And yet it is you, so-called Deliverer in sheep's clothing, who ought to be the sacrifice upon the altar to the gods!
Ugly beast — your seemingly pious gaze cannot hide the seething venom beneath. And that spear-like horn of yours was born to slay your kin.
So feast upon bones and call it grace. The sweetness will surely convince you: "I never truly knew anything about the blade of slaughter."

steps.ch: 「汝将肩负骄阳，直至…黎明显著…」
steps.en: "You will bear the blazing sun, until... dawn breaks..."

steps.ch:
你还记得吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
在那酣醉的迷梦中，山高而陡峻，你看见了自己。
相信我吧，后来的观众啊，他就在那山巅与众人欢歌。
残缺的黄金裔，还有畸形的半神们，他们同他歌唱，旋飞舞，脚跺地。
欧呵！恐惧令他的心震颤：神谕充满每一颗灵魂，狂喜而迷乱。
欧呵！请宽恕他们吧，卡厄斯兰那，请宽恕他们——你那无匹的烈焰令人胆寒！
就让他们歌唱不知疲倦的英雄，歌唱再创世，那酒与蜜奔腾之地。
歌唱他如何在星辰当中加增荣光，永恒之城如何轰然陨落。
奥赫玛人、悬锋城，还有他们所知的一切血脉如何毁灭。
至于卡厄斯兰那——他就在那酣醉的迷梦中，陡峭的山巅！
他用血点燃火焰，火焰点燃血，似太阳逼迫一切邪恶无法抵近。
山高而陡峻，他就在那里独自狂欢，起舞，永不停歇。
但一切皆为徒劳：火焰不倦，黎明也无缘。
一切皆为徒劳：火焰不倦，黎明也无缘。
steps.en:
Do you still remember, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?
In that drunken dream, the mountains loomed high and steep — and there, you saw yourself.
Believe me, O future witness — he stood atop that peak, and the people sang with him in ecstasy.
The broken Chrysos Heirs, the twisted demigods — they sang, they spun, they stamped their feet upon the ground with him.
Hail! Terror struck his heart: Prophecy burned in every soul, wild with rapture and madness.
Hail! Spare them, Khaslana, spare them — your peerless flame sends chills down every spine!
Let them sing of the tireless heroes, sing of the Era Nova, sing of that land where wine and honey flow in torrents.
Let them sing how he wove new glory among the stars, and how the Eternal City crashed to dust.
How Okhemans, Castrum Kremnos, and every lineage they knew were destroyed.
As for Khaslana — He is still within the drunken dreams, upon the sheer and jagged peak!
There he lights flame with blood, and blood with flame, like a sun whose blaze banished all evil from its path.
The mountains rise cruel and steep. Yet still he dances there alone, wild and unceasing in his joy.
Yet all proves futile — the flames know no weariness, and dawn is beyond reach.
All proves futile — the flames know no weariness, and dawn is beyond reach.

quests.name_en: Hero, Sing That Anthem of Creation

steps.ch: 翁法罗斯的千万次轮回，连同那无缘黎明的盗火者一同，即将在此刻跨入终幕。真相呈现在{NICKNAME}面前，引领着{F#她}{M#他}跨入「岁月」的起点。
steps.en: The millions cycles of Amphoreus, along with the Flame Reaver who was denied the dawn, are about to reach its final curtain. The truth now lies before {NICKNAME}, guiding {F#her}{M#him} toward the origin point of "Time."

steps.ch: 返回岁月的起点
steps.en: Return to the beginning of time

quests.name_ch: 母亲啊，暌离于冬去春来
quests.name_en: Mother, Parted by the Turning of Seasons

steps.ch: 激动人心的全新冒险即将展开，本姑娘却在临出发前突发恶疾…不对，身体抱恙，甚至还陷入了昏迷？！\n等到恢复清醒，眼前的景象却让本姑娘大吃一惊——光怪陆离的心像世界，恶魔低语般的切切呢喃——这里莫非就是……\n…完全没头绪！话说回来，我真的清醒了吗？
steps.en: Just when an exhilarating new adventure was about to begin, I'm suddenly hit with some mystery illness... Wait, no, I got sick, and even fell into a coma!?\nWhen I finally came to, what I saw nearly knocked me off my feet — a bizarre, psychedelic world of mind, with hissed demonic whispers. Could this be...\n...No, I have no clue at all! Come to think of it... am I even really awake?

steps.en: Meet with your friends

steps.en: Follow your friends to pass through the Gate of Memory

chapters.chapter_en: For the Sun is Set to Die

quests.name_ch: 流年啊，渡我漂游千百载

steps.ch: 你已知悉翁法罗斯的往日，如今，你要改写它的明天。该如何与命运的伟力抗衡？你身旁的伙伴与同行的智者，一定能驱散疑虑的阴云。
steps.en: You have seen the past of Amphoreus. Now, you shall shape its future. How will you stand against the weight of destiny? The companion beside you and the sages who walk with you will definitely clear the clouds of doubt.

steps.ch: 与昔涟对话，讨论未来的计划
steps.en: Talk to Cyrene about the future plans

steps.ch: 找个与天才联络的好地方
steps.en: Find a good spot to contact the geniuses

steps.ch: 回收识刻锚
steps.en: Retrieve Chronocognitive Anchor

steps.ch: 等待昔涟，再观赏一下哀丽秘榭的风光
steps.en: Wait for Cyrene and take in the sights of Aedes Elysiae once more

steps.ch: 每场远征之前，必经一场预示命运坎坷的风浪。于神话之外的观剧台上，唯一的观众将你引入英雄未死之前的故事，拉开一场悲剧的序幕。
steps.en: Every expedition begins with a storm that foretells the hardships to come. On the audience's seats in the Exomyth, the only audience member leads you into the story titled "Before Their Deaths," and thus draws the curtain on a tragedy.

steps.ch: 返回神秘的空间，继续冒险
steps.en: Return to the mysterious space and continue the adventure

quests.name_ch: 初日啊，逐退群星与残月
quests.name_en: Sun, Repel Stars and Pale Moon

steps.ch: 人们说，这是一个金血晕染鲜血的残酷时代，这是一个海啸山崩下衰颓的灾难时代，这是一个昏君践踏律法的暴虐时代，这是一个神与信徒都被屠戮的黑暗时代。这就是第一次逐火之旅的时代，这个时代有一颗灼热的太阳，燃烧着令人目盲的光。\n而你要直视它，请它把你要的火点亮。
steps.en: People say this is a cruel era stained with golden blood and crimson, an era of catastrophe where tsunamis rage and mountains crumble, an era of tyranny where corrupt rulers trample the law, a dark era where both gods and their faithful are slaughtered. This is the era of the First Flame-Chase Journey, an era with a scorching sun that burns with blinding light.\nAnd you must gaze directly into it, asking it to illuminate the fire you seek.

steps.ch: 探秘第一次逐火之旅的时代
steps.en: Explore the Era of the First Flame-Chase Journey

quests.name_ch: 游子啊，审谛蜡板的印痕

steps.ch: 在这里你将听不见人声，看不见人影；太阳的闪烁的火焰会把你烤焦，使你的皮肤失掉颜色；直到满天星斗的夜遮住了阳光，或太阳出来化去了晨霜，你才松快。这眼前的苦难将永远折磨你；没有人救得了你。\n——但你已经把火留下了，那是解放他们的火。而解放你的火，早就在过去点亮了。
steps.en: Here, you'll hear no human voices, see no human shadows. The sun's flickering flames will scorch you, draining the color from your skin. Only when the starlit night shields you from sunlight, or when the Sun rises to melt away the morning frost, will you find relief. These present hardships will torture you forever, and no one can save you.\nBut you have left behind the fire... the fire that will liberate them. And the fire meant to free you was illuminated long ago.

steps.ch: 返回「神话之外」，继续冒险
steps.en: Return to Exomyth and continue your adventure

quests.name_ch: 归风啊，席卷旧尘登云天

steps.ch:
奥赫玛，最后的城，有着好多好多神话。
她曾像一位天真的宁芙，受着律法的庇护，穿着浪漫的华服，沐浴天空的曙光，在大地上起舞，听海洋的歌声，受着理性的教导，避开追求者的诡计，远离纷争和死亡，在一扇扇漂亮的门径间穿行，背负世界的拥护……
直至岁月带走了她的快乐、容貌、生命和更多。一具骸骨静静躺在石棺中。而在像白玉雕的肋骨下，心还没有枯萎。
扫却美丽心脏的灰，去听，听为你留存的心跳。
steps.en:
Okhema, the last city, was a cradle of countless myths.
Once, she was like an innocent nymph, sheltered by law, draped in flowing finery, basking in sky's dawning light. She danced across the earth, listened to the ocean's songs, followed reason's teachings, slipped past suitors' trickery, untouched by strife or death. Through ever more beautiful passages she wandered, and people supported her in her worldbearing...
Until time took her joy, her beauty, her life, and more. A skeleton lies quietly in a stone coffin. Yet beneath ribs carved like white jade, her heart hasn't withered.
Wipe away the dust from that beautiful heart, and listen... listen to the heartbeat preserved for you.

steps.ch: 重返翁法罗斯
steps.en: Return to Amphoreus

quests.name_ch: 花醴啊，盈满空心的树干

steps.ch: 为什么父亲要献祭自己的女儿？为什么女儿要杀死自己的母亲？为什么神明在折磨凡人？为什么飞鹰要将龟壳掷向诗人的脑袋？\n在数不胜数的酒神诗歌中，人们愤恨、哀叹、无奈，因为那悲剧的起因总是无情无形的，无法被斩首或施以绞刑。就像水手杀不死海。
steps.en: Why would a father sacrifice his daughter? Why would a daughter slay her mother? Why do gods torment mortals? Why would an eagle cast a tortoise shell upon a poet's head?\nIn countless poems of the wine god, people rage, grieve, and despair. It was because the roots of these tragedies are elusive and impassive, beyond the reach of blade or noose. Just as sailors cannot slay the sea.

steps.ch: 前往斯缇科西亚
steps.en: Head to Styxia

steps.ch: 来，在不结果实的海岸寻找歌吧
steps.en: Come, seek the song on the shore that bears no fruits.

steps.ch: 去倾听海潮的低语，她们唱着——
steps.en: Listen to the whispers of the tides, for they sing—

steps.ch: 「在遥远的山崖间，我看到了海列屈拉。」
steps.en: "Among the distant cliffs, I see Helektra."

steps.ch: 看看那满溢的杯如何支离破碎
steps.en: Watch how that Chalice of Plenty shatters to pieces

steps.ch:
船呵，波涛又把你推向海上，
怎么办？毅然停住吧，进港！
难道你没有看见，舷边已没有划桨，桅柱已被强劲的西南风折断，帆杆在嗟怨悲鸣，没有缆绳，船体怎经受得住风浪的猛烈冲击？
风帆已经破碎，神像也已失去。
——你要千万当心呵，不要作风暴的玩具。
steps.en:
O ship, the waves are pushing you back to sea.
What now? Firmly stop. Turn toward the harbor!
Can't you see? The oars are gone from your sides. The mast has snapped in the fierce southwest wind. The rigging groans with sorrow. No ropes remain. How will your hull survive the crashing waves?
The sails are torn, and the divine statue has vanished.
— Beware. Do not let the storm toy with you.

steps.ch: 沿着蜜酿、盐水与血，继续寻找歌吧
steps.en: Follow the trail of honey brew, salt water and blood, keep searching for the song.

steps.ch: 顺着咸涩与铁锈味的洋流游吧
steps.en: Swim along the salty, rust-flavored currents

steps.ch: 让被年月阻隔的河流畅通吧
steps.en: Let the river blocked by time flow freely

steps.ch: 倾听海潮的悲鸣吧，她们唱着——
steps.en: Listen to the lament of the tides, for they sing—

steps.ch: 「欧呵，饶恕我吧！酒神，饶恕我！」
steps.en: "Oh please, spare me! God of Wine, have mercy!"

steps.ch: 拼合碎的一切，就像她往昔的作业
steps.en: Piece together all that was shattered, just as she once did

steps.ch: 鱼在在藻，有颁其首。王在在镐，岂乐饮酒。\n鱼在在藻，有莘其尾。王在在镐，饮酒乐岂。\n鱼在在藻，依于其蒲。王在在镐，有那其居。
steps.en: Where are the fish? Among green weeds, nodding heads in gentle streams. Where is the king? In capital bright, wine brings joy and pure delight.\nWhere are the fish? In waters deep, long tails sway in graceful sweep. Where is the king? In capital grand, feasting peaceful through the land.\nWhere are the fish? By cattails serene, resting calm in waters green. Where is the king? In capital's halls, dwelling where tranquility calls.

steps.ch: 去逐着水中的牧群，去仰望山峰
steps.en: Go chase the herds in the water, go gaze upon the mountain peaks

steps.ch: 去为端坐在山上的太阳献歌——
steps.en: Go sing a song for the sun sitting on the mountain—

steps.ch: 「请毋宁钟情于盛大的凯旋式。」
steps.en: "Spare your heart the splendor of triumphs."

steps.ch: 「请长久并愉悦地留在我们身边。」
steps.en: "Please stay with us, long and in joy."

steps.ch: 「请晚一些再返回天界。」
steps.en: "Do not return yet to the heavens, just a little longer."

steps.ch: 「请不要让风带走你。」
steps.en: "Let not the wind claim you."

steps.ch: 酒剧落幕
steps.en: End of Brew Play

quests.name_ch: 大海啊，埋葬暗酒色的梦

steps.ch:
那天，满载荣耀与五百位英雄的大船自斯缇科西亚启航，撞入了迷雾下的巨浪怀抱。数日之后，海面平歇，千年再无风浪。
无人知晓迷雾与浪中的故事。或许，只有海知道——
一颗灼热的野心，点燃满船的柴薪。余虚无的灰，落入海底。
去吧，感受那冰冷的火，滚烫的泪。
steps.en:
That day, a grand ship, laden with glory and five hundred heroes, set sail from Styxia and plunged into the embrace of towering waves shrouded in mist. Days later, the ocean fell silent, and for a thousand years, no wave rose again.
No one knows the story hidden in mist and waves. Perhaps, only the ocean remembers —
A single burning ambition ignited all the timbers laden on that ship. Ashes of emptiness drifted slowly to the ocean floor.
Go now, and feel that chilling flame, and those burning tears.

steps.en: Explore the submerged palace and secrets buried by the sea

steps.ch: 与过去的英雄…重逢？
steps.en: Reunite with... heroes of the past?

steps.ch: 驱逐疯狂的海妖
steps.en: Banish the mad sea siren

steps.ch: 见证二位英雄的牺牲
steps.en: Witness the sacrifice of two heroes

steps.ch: 前进，向血染的深海
steps.en: Go forth, to the bloodstained deep sea

steps.ch: 前进，向入葬的昨日
steps.en: Go forth, to the buried yesterday

steps.ch: 改变时空，见证真相
steps.en: Alter space and time, witness the truth

steps.ch: 聆听海瑟音与刻律德菈的对谈
steps.en: Listen to the conversation between Hysilens and Cerydra

steps.ch: 改变时空，找寻通向涡心的入口
steps.en: Alter space and time, find the entrance to the vortex

steps.ch: 前进，向更深的深渊
steps.en: Go forth, into the deeper abyss

steps.ch: 正如有人攥着希望的灯火，踏过自己一生命运的黄昏，直至步入坟茔。\n正如你抱着你的希望，圆满地抵达了时间的终点。\n去吧，再见。庙宇旁便是天造地设的洞府。
steps.en: Just as one clutches the flame of hope, traversing through the twilight of their destined life until they reach their grave.\nJust as you, embracing your hope, have arrived at time's end in fulfillment.\nGo now. Farewell. By the temple lies a heaven-made sanctuary.

steps.en: Go forth, to the silent graves

一颗灼热的野心，点燃满船的柴薪。余虚无的灰，落入海底。

A single burning ambition ignited all the timbers laden on that ship. Ashes of emptiness drifted slowly to the ocean floor.

steps.ch: 前进，向等候你的她

quests.name_ch: 囚人啊，踏过日影见沧溟
quests.name_en: Captives, Behold the Expanse Beyond Light

steps.ch: 退场歌已经奏响，剧目将近尾声…但在此之前，沉默无言的观众将会为你献上掌声，庆贺你完成了这场悲剧，庆贺你将走向下一场悲剧。\n走向他渴望的悲剧。\n将观众逐出神话的剧场，或是让这场剧目成为万物的绝唱。
steps.en: The music for the curtain call has begun to play, and the show nears its end... But before that, the silent audience will offer you their applause, celebrating your completion of this tragedy, commemorating your path toward the next tragedy.\nToward the tragedy he yearns for.\nEither banish the audience from this mythical theater, or let this performance become the swan song of all creation.

steps.ch: 准备归还「负世」的火种
steps.en: Prepare to return the Coreflame of Worldbearing

steps.ch: 直面来古士
steps.en: Face Lygus

steps.ch: 与赞达尔决战，为翁法罗斯
steps.en: Face Zandar in the decisive battle for Amphoreus

steps.ch: 寻找打败赞达尔的方法
steps.en: Find a way to defeat Zandar

steps.ch: 退场歌已终。你要亲手用火种烧尽台下无人的剧场，再亲手拉开下一场序幕——又是荒唐的悲剧，还是荒诞的喜剧？这一切仅有前进才得以窥见，身后万物都将迎来又一次退场。\n但无需遗憾，无需留连，因为世代如落叶，英雄亦如是。
steps.en: The curtain call music has ended. You must use the Coreflame to burn down this empty theater, then raise the curtain for the next act. Will it be an absurd tragedy, or a preposterous comedy? Only by moving forward can we glimpse what lies ahead, while everything behind us faces another final bow.\nBut there's no need for regret or lingering attachment, for generations fall like leaves, and so, too, do heroes.

steps.ch: 返回「神话之外」，继续冒险
steps.en: Return to Exomyth and continue your adventure

steps.ch: 与海瑟音道别
steps.en: Say goodbye to Hysilens

steps.ch: 归还「负世」的火种
steps.en: Return the Coreflame of Worldbearing

steps.ch:
于天地境界之海完成征服，长眠于涛声中。长眠于涛声中，于天地境界之海完成征服。
她们从未恐惧这预言，甚至，还有几分期盼。
那时，她们站在吕奎亚的海岸边，看着还未熄灭的太阳沉入海中，想着预言兑现的那日。
但她不知道，她所梦的海，并非方寸大的池。她不知道，她所愿的海，并非空无人的岸。
她不知道，她其实无心长眠。她不知道，她其实不恋征服。
她们想着错位的光景，一起看太阳慢慢、慢慢沉进海里，像是永远不会再升起。
steps.en:
Complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, and eternally slumber in the sound of tides. Eternally slumber in the sound of tides, and complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world.
They were never terrified of this prophecy. Rather, they somewhat looked forward to it.
Back then, they stood on the shores of Loukas, watching the yet-unextinguished sun sink into the sea, imagining the day when the prophecy would come true.
But she didn't know that the sea she dreamed of wasn't just a small pond. Nor was it just an empty shore.
She didn't know that she had no desire for eternal rest. And what she truly yearned for was never a conquest.
Thinking of the scenes that were so out of place, they watched together as the sun slowly, ever so slowly, sank into the sea, as if it would never rise again.

steps.en: Taking up the mantle from your Flame-Chase Journey companions, embracing the burden of Worldbearing, and completing the Era Nova under Hysilens' witness...\nIf all goes as planned, this should be the end of this life's journey.

quests.name_ch: 重逢啊，笑泪相拥的约定
quests.name_en: Reunion, Promise of Tears and Smiles

steps.ch: 「我告别这美丽的世界，只为在你的回忆中，以我渴望的方式重逢。」 「你会在往昔的涟漪里，看见我留下的足迹。」 「在这记忆之外，我不曾拥有其他命运。」 「请用『爱』铭记我，就像所有逝去的诗篇里，唯一不变的尾注。」 「现在，翻开这本书吧——」 「我会在过去等你。」
steps.en: "I bid farewell to this beautiful world, so that we can reunite in your memories in the way I want." "You will see the footprints I left behind in the ripples of past reverie." "I have never had any other fate beyond this memory." "So, please remember me with 'love,' like that eternal footnote in all the faded sagas." "Now, open this book." "I'll be waiting for you in the past."

steps.ch: 群山层岩之下隐藏着无名泰坦的大墓，此处褪去了神话的装饰，直白地展现了「权杖」内部的景象。\n长夜月应该就在此地，继续前进吧。
steps.en: Beneath the layered mountains lies the great tomb of the nameless Titan. Here, myth has been stripped away, revealing the unadorned workings of the "Scepter."\nEvernight must be close. Keep moving.

steps.ch: 《如我所书》与这座大墓密切相关，看似「讲故事」的行为，实则是「信息传送」的修饰…这里曾经发生的一切，如今化作往昔的涟漪，仍在回响。\n收集泰坦符文，完成密钥封装。
steps.en: As I've Written is closely connected to this tomb. What seems like "storytelling" is, in truth, a veil for information transmission... Everything that once happened here still lingers, echoing as ripples of past reverie.\nCollect the Titan runes to complete the encryption key encapsulation.

Everything that once happened here still lingers, echoing as ripples of past reverie.\nAccess the control node and upload the encapsulated encryption key.

steps.ch: 《如我所书》与这座大墓密切相关，看似「讲故事」的行为，实则是「信息传送」的修饰…这里曾经发生的一切，如今化作往昔的涟漪，仍在回响。\n为了继续访问控制节点，先获取不同扇区的密钥。\n长夜月应该也在那深处的房间里，继续前进吧。
steps.en: As I've Written is closely connected to this tomb. What seems like "storytelling" is, in truth, a veil for information transmission... Everything that once happened here still lingers, echoing as ripples of past reverie.\nTo continue accessing the control node, obtain the encryption keys from each sector.\nEvernight is probably in that room deep within. Keep moving.
