steps.ch: 「我告别这美丽的世界，只为在你的回忆中，以我渴望的方式重逢。」 「你会在往昔的涟漪里，看见我留下的足迹。」 「在这记忆之外，我不曾拥有其他命运。」 「请用『爱』铭记我，就像所有逝去的诗篇里，唯一不变的尾注。」 「现在，翻开这本书吧——」 「我会在过去等你。」
steps.en: "I bid farewell to this beautiful world, so that we can reunite in your memories in the way I want." "You will see the footprints I left behind in the ripples of past reverie." "I have never had any other fate beyond this memory." "So, please remember me with 'love,' like that eternal footnote in all the faded sagas." "Now, open this book." "I'll be waiting for you in the past."

steps.ch: 前往德谬歌矩阵
steps.en: Head to Demiurge Matrix

quests.name_ch: 旅者啊，徘徊中忘却失真
quests.name_en: Traveler, Find Truth Beyond the Illusion

steps.ch: 「再创世」的仪式已经顺利完成，翁法罗斯的旅程结束…了吗？继续回到「开拓」之旅，弄清自己的现状。
steps.en: The Era Nova ceremony has been successfully completed, and Amphoreus's journey is... over? Continue returning to the trailblazing expedition to understand your current situation.

steps.ch: 继续「开拓」之旅
steps.en: Continue the Trailblazing Expedition

steps.ch: 「再创世」的仪式已经顺利完成，翁法罗斯的旅程结束…果然是假的！\n这里是用你的「记忆」构筑的假象，你必须和昔涟一起赶紧逃进其他的记忆里。\n星期日正在用他的能力入侵你的「梦境」来拯救你…没想到还会有这样的一天。
steps.en: The Era Nova Ceremony has been completed. The journey in Amphoreus is over... As if!\nThis is all an illusion constructed from your "memory." You must now escape with Cyrene into other memories!\nSunday is using his powers to invade your "dreamscape" to save you... Never thought this day would come.

steps.ch: 梳理忆潮内经历
steps.en: Sort through your memoria tide experiences

quests.name_ch: 大地啊，承载万物的苦难
quests.name_en: Earth, Bear the Suffering of All

steps.ch: 烈阳焚毁了神悟树庭之下的祭坛，那是「大地」的封印。在我到达神悟树庭之后，这里俨然已受到了「记忆」的影响，「毁灭」既是偶然也是必然，我必须继续前进，深入迷雾之中。
steps.en: The Blazing Sun ravaged the altar beneath the Grove of Epiphany, which sealed the "Earth." By the time I arrived, the Remembrance already warped the Grove. Destruction is accidental, yet inevitable. I must press on, deeper into the mist.

steps.ch: 前往「辉痕圣林」神悟树庭
steps.en: Head to "Radiant Scarwood" Grove of Epiphany

steps.ch: 与谜之山之民对话
steps.en: Talk with the mysterious Mountain Dweller

steps.ch: 烈阳焚毁了神悟树庭之下的祭坛，那是「大地」的封印。在我到达神悟树庭之后，这里俨然已受到了「记忆」的影响，「毁灭」既是偶然也是必然，我必须继续前进，深入迷雾之中。\n在我这副躯体的「记忆」之中的丹枫？若是能助我，不妨与我继续同行好了……
steps.en: The Blazing Sun ravaged the altar beneath the Grove of Epiphany, which was the seal of "Earth." By the time I arrived, the Grove was already warped by the Remembrance. Destruction is accidental, yet inevitable. I must press on, deeper into the mist.\nDan Feng is within the "memories" of this vessel of mine? If you'd lend your strength, then stay your path with me...

steps.ch: 深入树庭，寻找荒笛
steps.en: Venture into the Grove, seek out Terravox

steps.ch: 烈阳焚毁了神悟树庭之下的祭坛，那是「大地」的封印。在我到达神悟树庭之后，这里俨然已受到了「记忆」的影响，「毁灭」既是偶然也是必然，我必须继续前进，深入迷雾之中。\n神悟树庭灵水淤积，按「贼灵」的说法解决难题吧。
steps.en: The Blazing Sun ravaged the altar beneath the Grove of Epiphany, which was the seal of "Earth." By the time I arrived, the Grove was already warped by the Remembrance. Destruction is accidental, yet inevitable. I must press on, deeper into the mist.\nThe spirit water has stagnated in the Grove of Epiphany. Resolve this with the Spirithief's tricks.

steps.ch: 协助「贼灵」，通过此地
steps.en: Help Spirithief pass through this area

steps.ch: 协助「贼灵」堵住出水口
steps.en: Help Spirithief block the water outlet

steps.ch: 协助「贼灵」修改预言算碑
steps.en: Help Spirithief modify the Prophecy Tablet

steps.ch: 烈阳焚毁了神悟树庭之下的祭坛，那是「大地」的封印。在我到达神悟树庭之后，这里俨然已受到了「记忆」的影响，「毁灭」既是偶然也是必然，我必须继续前进，深入迷雾之中。\n这里的混乱的记忆越来越多，除了我的记忆，还有谁的记忆？
steps.en: The Blazing Sun ravaged the altar beneath the Grove of Epiphany, which was the seal of "Earth." By the time I arrived, the Grove was already warped by the Remembrance. Destruction is accidental, yet inevitable. I must press on, deeper into the mist.\nThe chaotic memories here keep growing. Besides mine, whose else could they be?

steps.ch: 烈阳焚毁了神悟树庭之下的祭坛，那是「大地」的封印。在我到达神悟树庭之后，这里俨然已受到了「记忆」的影响，「毁灭」既是偶然也是必然，我必须继续前进，深入迷雾之中。\n这里的混乱的记忆越来越多，除了我的记忆，竟然还有丹枫的记忆…？
steps.en: The Blazing Sun ravaged the altar beneath the Grove of Epiphany, which was the seal of "Earth." By the time I arrived, the Grove was already warped by the Remembrance. Destruction is accidental, yet inevitable. I must press on, deeper into the mist.\nThe chaotic memories here keep growing. Besides mine... Dan Feng's memories are here too?

steps.ch: 深入树庭，查看错乱的记忆
steps.en: Venture into the Grove, review the disordered memory

steps.ch: 烈阳焚毁了神悟树庭之下的祭坛，那是「大地」的封印。在我到达神悟树庭之后，这里俨然已受到了「记忆」的影响，「毁灭」既是偶然也是必然，我必须继续前进，深入迷雾之中。\n海瑟音揭露了事实，那神秘的山之民并非是真正的荒笛。
steps.en: The Blazing Sun ravaged the altar beneath the Grove of Epiphany, which was the seal of "Earth." By the time I arrived, the Grove was already warped by the Remembrance. Destruction is accidental, yet inevitable. I must press on, deeper into the mist.\nHysilens revealed the truth that the mysterious Mountain Dweller was not the real Terravox.

steps.ch: 深入错乱的记忆，寻找荒笛
steps.en: Venture into the disordered memory and seek out Terravox

steps.ch: 与「大地」半神荒笛对话
steps.en: Talk with Terravox, the Earth Demigod

steps.ch: 「大地」的权能已在手中，我会担起职责，也会与你们并肩面对「再创世」。\n如果当初是荒笛与长夜月构筑了忆潮世界，那么现在的我有能力找回{NICKNAME}。
steps.en: The authority of Earth is now in my hands. I will shoulder this responsibility and stand with you all to face "Era Nova."\nIf it were Terravox and Evernight who built the memoria tide world, then I now have the power to bring {NICKNAME} back.

steps.ch: 与「海瑟音」对话
steps.en: Talk with Hysilens

steps.ch: 找到{NICKNAME}并带{F#她}{M#他}回家
steps.en: Find {NICKNAME} and bring {F#her}{M#him} home.

quests.name_ch: 忆者啊，命途长河上溯洄

steps.ch: 多亏了星期日与长夜月的短暂碰撞，得以让潜伏起来的黑天鹅锁定了长夜月的藏身处，并沿着命途的河流逆流而上。\n忆庭决不允许黑天鹅擅自行动，而黑天鹅也不知道自己将面对什么……
steps.en: Thanks to the brief collision between Sunday and Evernight, Black Swan, who had been lurking, managed to lock onto Evernight's hideout and travel upstream along the currents of the Path.\nThe Garden of Recollection would never allow Black Swan to act on her own, while she had no idea what she was about to face...

steps.ch: 继续调查记忆世界
steps.en: Continue investigating the world of memories

quests.name_ch: 烈阳啊，为迷途照明前路
quests.name_en: Blazing Sun, Illuminate the Path for the Lost

steps.ch: 如今翁法罗斯被三重命途之一的「记忆」所裹挟，三月、{NICKNAME}…{F#她们}{M#他们}俩去向不明，能将他们带回的就只有我了。\n如今翁法罗斯迷雾重重，还有一位友人能为我拨云见日。
steps.en: Now Amphoreus is ensnared by the Remembrance, one of the Three Paths, and March and {NICKNAME}... they are nowhere to be found. I'm the only one who can bring them back.\nAmphoreus is shrouded in mystery now, but I have a friend who can help me see through the fog.

steps.ch: 前往黎明云崖
steps.en: Head to Dawncloud

steps.ch: 击败金血忆灵
steps.en: Defeat the ichor memosprite

steps.ch:
歌唱吧，星神！歌唱翁法罗斯之子卡厄斯兰那的愤怒——
一滴燃烧的净世金血，熔进你那如同烈日般燃烧的身躯。

在那滴金血流下前，你已经被仇恨淹没许久。那漫长的旅程，让我们曾经的同行短如瞬息。
在那滴金血留下后，你已经沉默了太久，你的心智是否依然坚韧？你的抗争是否仍在继续？
回应我吧，我需要一位友人为我拨云见日——

如果你的「指引」注定让愤怒毁天灭地，那也无妨，我需要前进的方向。
回应我吧，只有黎明的盛怒能照破长夜。
steps.en:
Sing, O Aeon! Sing of the rage of Khaslana, son of Amphoreus—
A drop of burning, cleansing golden blood, melting into your sun-like blazing form.

Before that drop of golden blood fell, hatred had long since consumed you. That lengthy journey made our time together feel but a fleeting moment.
After that drop of golden blood fell, you've remained silent for far too long. Does your mind still hold its tenacity? Does your defiance still persist?
Answer me, for I need a friend to clear the fog and unveil the sun—

If your "guidance" is destined to bring rage that destroys heaven and earth, so be it, as I need a direction forward.
Answer me, for only the Dawn's furor can pierce through the evernight.

steps.ch: 触碰净世金血，呼唤友人
steps.en: Touch the world-cleansing golden blood and summon your friend

quests.name_ch: 诸神啊，奏响创世的凯歌
quests.name_en: Gods, Sound the Anthem of Creation

steps.ch: 临近「最后的再创世」之前，各方势力皆需做好准备。\n为了胜利，也许我们还需要更多的盟助……
steps.en: As the "final Era Nova" approaches, all factions must be prepared.\nFor victory, we may need to seek more allies...

steps.ch: 与星穹列车的众人交谈
steps.en: Talk to the Astral Express crew

steps.ch: 临近「最后的再创世」之前，各方势力皆需做好准备。\n「赞达尔」并非不知道德谬歌的存在……
steps.en: As the final Era Nova approaches, all factions must be prepared.\nZandar was well aware of the Demiurge's existence...

steps.ch: 与「赞达尔」交谈德谬歌
steps.en: Talk to Zandar about the Demiurge

steps.ch:
翁法罗斯！我并非陡然地呼唤你的名字。
我来此，是为了讲述历史——
末日的黑潮降临大地，神明堕入疯狂，凡人举戈相向。
但仍有逐火的英雄，在创世的伟业中先行。

此世，他们将燃烧的金血熔进身躯。
来日的命运，可会记得他们的姓名？

以「负世」之名，我向你保证：刻法勒永志不忘。
steps.en:
Amphoreus! I do not beckon your name in haste.
I come here to tell a tale of history.
When the black tide of doom descended upon Earth, gods fell into madness, and mortals turned against each other.
Yet there were Flame-Chasing heroes, pioneering the great enterprise of creating a world.

In this world, they shall meld burning golden blood into their bodies.
Will the destiny of days to come remember their names?

In the name of Worldbearing, I promise you: Kephale will never forget.

steps.ch: 归还火种，完成最后的「再创世」
steps.en: Return the Coreflame and complete the final "Era Nova"

quests.name_ch: 晨曦啊，再抚映遥远地平
quests.name_en: Dawn, Caress the Distant Lands Once More

steps.ch: 天外之界的来客背负起世界的命运，用「开拓」为翁法罗斯写下新的起点。哀丽秘榭之外，是所有人愿望中的崭新纪元。\n而今你已抵达黎明，准备好迎接世人的召唤了吗，{NICKNAME}？
steps.en: A visitor from beyond the sky shoulders the world's destiny, writing a new beginning for Amphoreus through "Trailblaze." Beyond the Aedes Elysiae lies a new era that everyone wishes for.\nNow that you have arrived at the Dawn, {NICKNAME}, are you ready to answer the world's summon?

steps.ch: 在新世界的开始，与昔涟对话
steps.en: Talk to Cyrene at the beginning of the new world

steps.ch: 前往码头，再看一眼哀丽秘榭的海
steps.en: Head to the dock for one last look at the sea of Aedes Elysiae

steps.ch: 聆听昔涟讲述真相，完成「记忆」的拼图
steps.en: Listen to Cyrene's truth and complete the puzzle of "the Remembrance"

quests.name_ch: 星路长驰，穹宇远征

steps.ch: 仙舟盟誓：「欲令后世免于侵凌攻伐、危疑苛暴之衅」。此番请缨出战，但为扫除仇寇，援联盟友，佑护银河众生。
steps.en: The Xianzhou Alliance Oath: "To save future generations from war and bloody dispute." We volunteer for this battle to eliminate our foes, uphold our allies, and protect all life in the cosmos.

steps.ch: 协商出战事宜，支援星穹列车
steps.en: Negotiate the campaign and support the Astral Express

steps.ch: 按照黑塔制定的作战计划，列车组众人将深入翁法罗斯内部，与银河联军里应外合，共同击败「铁墓」。
steps.en: According to Herta's battle plan, the Express Crew will infiltrate deep into Amphoreus and coordinate with the Cosmic Alliance in a pincer attack to defeat Irontomb together.

steps.ch: 进入翁法罗斯，从世界内部定位「铁墓」
steps.en: Enter Amphoreus and locate Irontomb from within the world

steps.ch: 与外界建立联系，协调银河联军
steps.en: Establish contact with the outside world and coordinate with the Cosmic Alliance

steps.ch: 深入翁法罗斯，探索世界内部的样貌
steps.en: Delve into Amphoreus and explore the world within

steps.ch: 翁法罗斯与外界的隔绝状态被打破，三位无名客先行者成为新世界的泰坦。圣城居民向「负世」的{NICKNAME}祈祷，虔诚等待全世的神谕降临。
steps.en: The isolation of Amphoreus has been shattered, and the three Nameless forerunners have become Titans of the new world. The holy city's residents pray to the Worldbearing {NICKNAME}, devoutly awaiting the divine prophecy to descend upon the world.

steps.ch: 跟随神谕的号召，前往黎明云崖
steps.en: Follow the call of the prophecy to Dawncloud

steps.ch: 前往半神议会，见证{NICKNAME}的苏醒
steps.en: Head to the Demigod Council and witness {NICKNAME}'s awakening

steps.ch: 征讨「铁墓」之役关乎银河存亡，各方势力都有基于自身利益的考量。在联军会议之后，或许应与同盟者们展开更深入的交流，凝聚各方力量。
steps.en: The campaign against Irontomb decides the fate of the cosmos, and each faction weighs its own interests. After the alliance meeting, perhaps it is time to deepen ties with allies, to gather strength from all sides.

steps.ch: （可选）尝试与盟军联系
steps.en: (Optional) Try to contact allies

quests.name_ch: 魔女的孤诣课题

steps.ch: 权杖内核层已严重损毁，宛如废墟。要想在此搜寻德谬歌的痕迹，无异于大海捞针。真是欲盖弥彰呀，这只说明一件事——\n我找对地方了。
steps.en: The Scepter's kernel is severely damaged, little more than rubble. Seeking traces of the Demiurge here would be like finding a needle in a haystack. How revealing... This only confirms one thing...\nI'm exactly where I need to be.

steps.ch: 探索矩阵，寻找关于德谬歌的秘密
steps.en: Explore the Matrix, seek the secrets of the Demiurge

steps.ch: 操作「扎格列斯之手」，清除障碍
steps.en: Control the Hand of Zagreus to clear obstacles

steps.ch: 使用冲拳，击碎平台上的障碍块（0/3）
steps.en: Use the Punch action to break the obstacle blocks on the platform (0/3)

steps.ch: 使用冲拳，击碎平台上的障碍块（1/3）
steps.en: Use the Punch action to break the obstacle blocks on the platform (1/3)

steps.ch: 使用冲拳，击碎平台上的障碍块（2/3）
steps.en: Use the Punch action to break the obstacle blocks on the platform (2/3)

steps.ch: 使用冲拳，击碎平台上的障碍块（3/3）
steps.en: Use the Punch action to break the obstacle blocks on the platform (3/3)

steps.ch: 螺丝咕姆的宝贝看起来不错，希望它在探索矩阵上同样有效。
steps.en: Screwllum's treasure looks promising. Let's hope it works just as well on the Matrix.

steps.ch: 登上「槲寄生」
steps.en: Board the Mistletoe

steps.ch: 启动「槲寄生」
steps.en: Activate "Mistletoe"

steps.ch: 驾驶「槲寄生」深入矩阵
steps.en: Pilot the "Mistletoe" deep into the Matrix

steps.ch: 探索遇到阻碍，十四行代数式屏障将空间隔离。螺丝咕姆提议骇入独立信源终端，通过逆转算力来攻击屏障，开启权杖内核层的封印。
steps.en: Exploration hit a snag. A barrier of quatorzain algebraic expressions has isolated this space. Screwllum suggests hacking into the independent signal terminal and using reverse computation to break through the barrier, unlocking the seal on the Scepter's kernel.

steps.ch: 根据导航指示，搜索独立信源终端
steps.en: Search for the independent signal source terminal according to navigation instructions

steps.ch: 骇入终端，逆转算力
steps.en: Hack the terminal, reverse the computation

steps.ch: 搜索并骇入下一座终端
steps.en: Search and hack into the next terminal

steps.ch: 搜索并骇入最后一座终端
steps.en: Search and hack into the final terminal

steps.ch: 螺丝咕姆的宝贝看起来不错，希望它在探索矩阵上同样有效。
steps.en: Screwllum's treasure looks promising. Let's hope it works just as well on the Matrix.

steps.ch: 穿过屏障，继续前进
steps.en: Break through the barrier and keep moving forward

steps.ch: 突破屏障之后，螺丝咕姆发现一处有趣的信号——「神话之外」。去会会现实中的智械哥，从他脑袋里找出德谬歌的线索吧。
steps.en: After breaking through the barrier, Screwllum detects an intriguing signal: Exomyth. It's time to meet the old Intellitron in reality and find clues about the Demiurge from his head.

steps.ch: 追踪「神话之外」的信号
steps.en: Track the signal of Exomyth

steps.ch: 触摸识刻锚，进入「神话之外」
steps.en: Touch the Chronocognitive Anchor to enter Exomyth

steps.ch: 智械哥留下关于「墓碑」的注释作为遗言。种种迹象表明，德谬歌的确存在。该是与智械哥对峙的时候了，他的忌惮正是不容忽视的证据。
steps.en: Old Intellitron left notes about the "tombstone" as his final message. All signs indicate that Demiurge does indeed exist. It's time to confront old Intellitron, for his apprehension is the undeniable proof.

steps.ch: 驾驶「槲寄生」，前往来古士所说的「墓碑」
steps.en: Pilot the Mistletoe to the "tombstone" mentioned by Lygus

steps.ch: 与来古士对峙，诘问关于德谬歌的真相
steps.en: Confront Lygus and press for the truth of the Demiurge

steps.ch: 了解关于德谬歌的真相
steps.en: Learn the truth about Demiurge

steps.ch: 如果德谬歌无力改变实验结果，如果机器头计算的答案是自身毁灭……不，没有这些如果。\n与「智识」接轨的条件已经齐备，并非觐见，而是加冕。求解宇宙的未来，锚定名为黑塔的「时刻」。\n朝闻道，夕死可矣。
steps.en: If Demiurge is powerless to alter the experiment's results... if Droidhead's calculations point to THEIR own Destruction... No, there are no "ifs."\nThe conditions for linking with Erudition are complete. It's not an audience, but a coronation. I will decipher the universe's future and anchor Herta's "Instant."\nIf one could know the Truth at dawn, one can die at dusk without regret.

steps.ch: 前往「铁墓」的封印处
steps.en: Proceed to the sealing site of Irontomb

steps.ch: 激活识刻锚，召开天才俱乐部会议
steps.en: Activate the Chronocognitive Anchor and commence the meeting of Genius Society

quests.name_ch: 英雄啊，归以凡身向侵晨
quests.name_en: Hero, Return to Dawn in Mortality

steps.ch: 时光归墟…这里是权杖的内核层。白厄就在此处，以怒火铸就监牢，镇压着铁墓的恨意。若想与绝灭大君正面对敌，我们就必须踏上最后一次逐火之旅，收拢由众黄金裔升擢的泰坦们的命运，在他们的帮助下走到白厄面前，消融烈阳的执念。
steps.en: The Ruins of Time... This is the kernel of the Scepter. Here stands Phainon, who forged a prison with rage to contain the hatred of Irontomb. If we wish to face the Lord Ravager head-on, we must embark on our final Flame-Chase Journey, gather the destinies of the Chrysos Heirs who have ascended into Titans, and reach Phainon with their aid to dissolve the Blazing Sun's obsession.

steps.ch: 进入时光归墟，开启最后的「逐火之旅」
steps.en: Enter the Ruins of Time and begin the final "Flame-Chase Journey"

steps.ch: 召集「最后的泰坦」们，准备迎战铁墓
steps.en: Gather the "Last Titans" and prepare to face Irontomb

steps.ch: 尝试使用岁月的力量，移开拦路的巨石
steps.en: Try using the power of Time to move the giant boulder blocking the way

steps.ch: 失败的尝试。岁月的力量，莫非另有归属……
steps.en: Failed attempt. Perhaps the power of Time belongs elsewhere...

steps.ch: 在欧洛尼斯祷言的帮助下，移开拦路的巨石
steps.en: Move the giant boulder blocking the path with the help of Oronyx's Prayer

steps.ch: 继续前行，进入归墟的深处
steps.en: Continue forward into the depths of the ruins

steps.ch: 归墟埋藏着三千万世的执念与苦果。随着不断深入，万敌、赛飞儿、遐蝶、风堇相继加入队伍。在埋藏着救世之愿的晶体旁，那刻夏等候已久。我们需要启动仪式，尝试带走白厄的愿望，止息他心间沉重的回响。
steps.en: The ruins harbor the obsessions and bitter fruits of <unbreak>30</unbreak> million cycles. As we venture deeper, Mydei, Cipher, Castorice, and Hyacine join the team one after another. Anaxa has been waiting by the crystal that holds the wish to save the world. We need to initiate the ceremony, attempt to take away Phainon's wish, and silence the heavy reverberation in his heart.

steps.ch: 尝试启动仪式，带走「负世」的愿望
steps.en: Attempt to initiate the ceremony and take away the Wish of Worldbearing

steps.ch: 收集三份愿望
steps.en: Collect three wishes

steps.ch: 背负愿望，带走负世的印记
steps.en: Carry the wishes and take away Worldbearing's mark

steps.ch: 查看房间内有关白厄的追忆与记录
steps.en: Check the recollections and records about Phainon in the room

steps.ch: 告别「万径之门，缇里西庇俄丝」的两位分身，继续深入归墟
steps.en: Bid farewell to the two avatars of Tribios, Gate of Infinity, and venture deeper into the void

steps.ch: 愿望，只是救世主执念的一部分。深入归墟的旅途中，我们又与刻律德菈、海瑟音、缇安、缇宁等伙伴重逢。每位黄金裔都目睹了白厄一路走来的孤独抗争，也都毫不犹豫地化身同行的记忆，只为与救世主并肩作战。
steps.en: Wishes are but a part of the Deliverer's obsession. During our journey deep into the ruin, we reunited with other companions such as Cerydra, Hysilens, Trianne, and Trinnon. Each Chrysos Heir witnessed Phainon's solitary defiance along the way, and they transformed without hesitation into memories that walk with us, only to be able to fight alongside the Deliverer.

steps.ch: 寻找负世的另一半印记
steps.en: Find the other half of the Worldbearing mark

steps.ch: 启动仪式，打破「负世」的绝望
steps.en: Initiate the ceremony and break the Despair of Worldbearing

steps.ch: 打碎三份绝望
steps.en: Shatter the three parts of despair

steps.ch: 熄灭绝望，带走另一半负世的印记
steps.en: Extinguish despair and take the other half of the Worldbearing mark

steps.ch: 绝望，是救世主执念的另一部分。唯有同时卸下沉重的愿望与滚烫的绝望，白厄自己的心愿才能够得到解放。
steps.en: Despair is another part of the Deliverer's obsession. Only by letting go of both the heavy wishes and burning despair can Phainon's own heart be set free.

steps.ch: 跟随「空白的愿望」前往灵水盆，消溶负世者的「愿望」与「绝望」
steps.en: Follow the "Blank Wish" to the spirit basin to dissolve the "Wish" and "Despair" of the Worldbearer.

steps.ch: 与「空白的愿望」对话，将负世者的心愿送往明天
steps.en: Talk to Blank Wish and send the Worldbearer's wishes to tomorrow

steps.ch: 与昔涟同行，前往归墟的深处。
steps.en: Travel with Cyrene to the depths of the ruins.

quests.name_ch: 纸页啊，镌留记忆的涟漪

steps.ch: 铁墓的恨意吞没寰宇，它的加冕即将完成，星系内一切存在都已遭其格式化。在宇宙迎来毁灭的前一瞬，我却在静谧的虚空中醒来……
steps.en: Irontomb's hatred devours the cosmos. Its coronation is nearly complete. All existence within the galaxy has already been formatted by it. However, in the final split second before the universe's destruction, I wake up in a silent void...

steps.ch: 在宇宙毁灭前的一瞬，寻觅那记忆的涟漪
steps.en: Look for that ripple of memory in the split second just before the universe's destruction

steps.ch: 我追上了德谬歌的记忆，踏入一处静谧的花园——这是一页永恒的美好记忆。
steps.en: I caught up with the Demiurge's memories and stepped into a tranquil garden... This is an eternal page of beautiful memories.

steps.ch: 步入永恒的一页
steps.en: Step into the eternal page

steps.ch: 追上前方那道记忆的身影
steps.en: Chase after that figure of memory ahead

steps.ch: 尝试与昔涟一同铭记银河众生
steps.en: Try to remember all of cosmic life together with Cyrene

steps.ch: 在这永恒的居所，昔涟保护着银河众生的记忆，却也几乎散尽了自我。我必须与她一同铭记被铁墓抹消的银河众生，踏上记忆的命途，为故事写下不同的结局。
steps.en: In this eternal dwelling, Cyrene guards the memories of all cosmic beings, yet has almost lost herself in the process. I must join her in remembering those erased by the Irontomb, embark on the Path of Remembrance, and write a different ending to the story.

steps.ch: 踏上「记忆」的命途，铭记银河众生
steps.en: Embark on the Path of Remembrance and remember all life in the cosmos

steps.ch: 完成「再创世」，为故事写下不同的结局
steps.en: Complete "Era Nova" and write a different ending to the story

steps.ch: 从一页永恒返回战场吧。让记忆与爱成为我们的弓矢，平息那无首巨匠的劫火，为银河的未来做出截然不同的证明——宇宙的答案绝非「毁灭」，在沉重的终幕背后，会亮起希望的起始。
steps.en: Return to the battlefield from An Eternal Page. Let remembrances and love be our bow and arrow to quell the headless giant's karmic flames and prove a different path for the Cosmos's future. The answer to the universe will never be the Destruction. Hope's beginning shall shine forth behind the heavy curtain of the final act.

steps.ch: 做足准备，重返「毁灭」的战场
steps.en: Gear up and return to the battlefield of the Destruction

steps.ch: 尘埃落定，见证吕枯耳戈斯的终幕
steps.en: The dust settles. Witnessing the final act of Lycurgus

quests.name_ch: 银辇啊，挽别那人间史诗
quests.name_en: Silver Chariot, Part With That Humanity's Epic

steps.ch: 铁墓之战，以「毁灭」的落败告终。我在熟悉的车厢中醒来，只是列车似乎不同往日，似有稀客到访……
steps.en: The Battle of Irontomb ended in Destruction's defeat. I woke up in the familiar car, but the Express felt different today, as if some rare visitors had arrived...

steps.ch: 铁墓的危机已经解除，但故事尚未结束
steps.en: The crisis in Irontomb has been dispelled, but the story isn't over yet

quests.name_ch: 落英啊，残芳纷飞留归躅
quests.name_en: Fallen Petals, Leave Fading Traces of Fragrance

steps.ch: 倘若世间因果是一条顺流而下的溪涧，那么少女就是被岁月之风吹起、溯流而上的花朵。沿着回望的方向，她踮着脚在水面上播撒着涟漪，圆满了因果、拂留了芬芳，将一切重要的瞬间铭刻于此，慢慢地靠近…那最初的起点。
steps.en: If the world's causality were a stream flowing downstream, then the girl would be a flower, blown against the current by the winds of time. Following her backward gaze, she tiptoes across the water, casting ripples, completing the cycle of cause and effect, and leave a lingering fragrance. Engraving every precious moment here, she gradually draws closer... to that very beginning.

steps.ch: 从永恒的一页出发，走上回望过去的路
steps.en: Depart from the eternal page to embark on a journey to look back into the past

steps.ch: 播下涟漪，进行第一次回望
steps.en: Cast ripples and initiate the first gaze backward

steps.ch: 播下涟漪，进行第二次回望
steps.en: Cast ripples and initiate the second gaze backward

steps.ch: 播下涟漪，进行第三次回望
steps.en: Cast ripples and initiate the third gaze backward

steps.ch: 播下涟漪，进行第四次回望
steps.en: Cast ripples and initiate the fourth gaze backward

steps.ch: 播下涟漪，进行第五次回望
steps.en: Cast ripples and initiate the fifth gaze backward

steps.ch: 播下涟漪，留下最后的道别
steps.en: Cast ripples and bid the final farewell

steps.ch: 西风吹拂之地，有无垠的麦浪和蔺草的芬芳。这里就是少女的故乡，旅途开启的地方。如果觉得累了，就在这里好好睡一觉吧——一切珍贵的回忆，都会如温暖的毛绒，包裹着你进入梦乡。
steps.en: Where the west wind blows, unending waves of wheat fields and the fragrance of rush grass stretch far and wide. This is the girl's homeland, where the journey began. If you feel fatigued, feel free to take a respite here. All your precious memories will wrap around you like warm fleece as you drift into dreamland.

steps.ch: 用仪式剑锚定最初的因果
steps.en: Anchor the original causality with the ceremonial blade

steps.ch: 如果觉得累了，就在这里好好睡一觉吧——一切珍贵的回忆，都会如温暖的毛绒，包裹着你进入梦乡。
steps.en: If you feel fatigued, feel free to take a respite here. All your precious memories will wrap around you like warm fleece as you drift into dreamland.

steps.ch: 找个温暖又熟悉的地方，好好休息吧
steps.en: Find a warm and familiar place to get some proper rest

quests.name_ch: 劫火啊，黯于群星的浪潮
quests.name_en: Flames, Extinguish Beneath The Starry Waves

steps.ch: 从一页永恒返回战场吧。让记忆与爱成为我们的弓矢，平息那无首巨匠的劫火，为银河的未来做出截然不同的证明——宇宙的答案绝非「毁灭」，在沉重的终幕背后，会亮起希望的起始。
steps.en: Return to the battlefield from An Eternal Page. Let remembrances and love be our bow and arrow to quell the headless giant's karmic flames and prove a different path for the Cosmos's future. The answer to the universe will never be the Destruction. Hope's beginning shall shine forth behind the heavy curtain of the final act.

steps.ch: 完成寰宇尺度的再创世，拯救你所铭记的银河众生
steps.en: Achieve the Era Nova across the universe and save all cosmic beings you remember

steps.ch: 击败铁墓，将宇宙存续的答案归还群星
steps.en: Defeat Irontomb and return the answer to the universe's survival to the stars

steps.ch: 铁墓的危机已经解除，但故事尚未结束
steps.en: The crisis in Irontomb has been dispelled, but the story isn't over yet

quests.name_ch: 故事啊， 完篇于初遇之时
quests.name_en: Tale, End Upon The First Encounter

steps.ch: 你看见一颗流星，如同最具创造力的笔尖，在回环的夜中刻下顿号。\n故事，在穹顶下收尾；未来，在星亮的远方。
steps.en: A shooting star flashes by, like the most brilliant pen, carving staccatos into the endless loop of night.\nThe story ends beneath the dome. The future lies in the bright, distant stars.

steps.ch: 记忆的新芽，在重渊苏醒
steps.en: A new sprout of Remembrance awakens in the Abyss

steps.ch: 前往穹顶之下，星落的方向
steps.en: Head towards Under the Dome, where the stars fall

quests.name_ch: 我们该去往何方

steps.ch: 阿格莱雅发来消息称，大地兽工坊附近有骚乱发生。在这关键时刻可容不得闪失——你知道，圣城的墙垣并不稳固。
steps.en: Aglaea has sent word that there has been a disturbance in the Dromas Workshop. There is no room for error at this critical moment. You know that the walls of the holy city are not stable.

steps.ch: 调查大地兽工坊的骚乱
steps.en: Investigate the disturbance in the Dromas Workshop

steps.ch: 阿格莱雅发来消息称，大地兽工坊附近有骚乱发生。在这关键时刻可容不得闪失——你知道，圣城的墙垣并不稳固。\n一位名叫苏克提瑞斯的老者为那外邦人撑了腰。他邀请你去浴场聊聊，当下发生的事与每个人息息相关。
steps.en: Aglaea has sent word that there has been a disturbance in the Dromas Workshop. There is no room for error at this critical moment. You know that the walls of the holy city are not stable.\nAn old man named Soctires has shown support for the outlanders. He has invited you to the baths for a chat. The matters unfolding currently affect everyone.

steps.ch: 在云石天宫与苏克提瑞斯汇合
steps.en: Meet with Soctires in Marmoreal Palace

steps.ch: 阿格莱雅发来消息称，大地兽工坊附近有骚乱发生。在这关键时刻可容不得闪失——你知道，圣城的墙垣并不稳固。\n矛盾解决后，许多公民仍意犹未尽。他们的真心话往往用最随性的方式表露。
steps.en: Aglaea has sent word that there has been a disturbance in the Dromas Workshop. There is no room for error at this critical moment. You know that the walls of the holy city are not stable.\nAfter the conflict is resolved, many of the citizens have lingering concerns. Their true feelings are often expressed in the most careless ways.

steps.ch: （可选）倾听公民的议论
steps.en: (Optional) Listen in on the citizens' discussion

steps.ch: 谈话接近尾声时，苏克提瑞斯的弟子来报：有一伙受伤的外邦人躲进了重渊。你想起和缇宝他们收留的那批难民…重渊可不是个适合生活的地方。
steps.en: As your discussion was coming to an end, Soctires' disciple came with word: A group of wounded outlanders has hidden themselves away in the Abyss. You cannot help but think of the refugees that Tribbie and the others accepted into their land... The Abyss is no place to live.

steps.ch: 调查去往重渊的外邦人
steps.en: Investigate the outlanders headed to the Abyss

steps.ch: 与外邦人领袖交谈
steps.en: Speak with the Outlander Leader

steps.ch: 谈话接近尾声时，苏克提瑞斯的弟子来报：有一伙受伤的外邦人躲进了重渊…\n问题只有一个：我们愿意付出多少代价？
steps.en: As your discussion was coming to an end, Soctires' disciple came with word: A group of wounded outlanders has hidden themselves away in the Abyss.\nThere is only one question: How much are we willing to pay?

steps.ch: 去云石市集购买一些物资
steps.en: Go to Marmoreal Market to buy supplies

steps.ch: 谈话接近尾声时，苏克提瑞斯的弟子来报：有一伙受伤的外邦人躲进了重渊…\n你不是爱心泛滥的类型，但你依旧愿意提供最低限度的帮忙——仅限有人报销时。
steps.en: As your discussion was coming to an end, Soctires' disciple came with word: A group of wounded outlanders has hidden themselves away in the Abyss.\nYou are not the overly loving type, but you are still willing to provide the bare minimum amount of assistance... Provided that you will be reimbursed.

steps.ch: 把廉价物资交给外邦人
steps.en: Give the outlanders the cheap supplies

steps.ch: 英雄或罪人，民众会如何看待这位老者？他究竟是在为众人抱薪，还是在腐蚀圣城的墙垣？\n你选择以仁慈作答，与人为善者的生命中应有更多公平。
steps.en: Hero or sinner? How will the people view this old man? Is he willing to sacrifice himself for others, or is he deliberately corroding the foundations of the holy city?\nYou have chosen to respond with kindness. Those who are kind to others should receive greater justice in life.

steps.ch: 为苏克提瑞斯辩护
steps.en: Defend Soctires

steps.ch: 英雄或罪人，民众会如何看待这位老者？他究竟是在为众人抱薪，还是在腐蚀圣城的墙垣？\n你选择以强硬作答，一百个善举也不能为一桩恶行开脱。
steps.en: Hero or sinner? How will the people view this old man? Is he willing to sacrifice himself for others, or is he deliberately corroding the foundations of the holy city?\nYou have chosen to respond with toughness. Even a hundred kind actions do not excuse a bad deed.

steps.ch: 控诉苏克提瑞斯
steps.en: Prosecute Soctires

steps.ch: 英雄或罪人，民众会如何看待这位老者？他究竟是在为众人抱薪，还是在腐蚀圣城的墙垣？\n你选择以仁慈作答，与人为善者的生命中应有更多公平。
steps.en: Hero or sinner? How will the people view this old man? Is he willing to sacrifice himself for others, or is he deliberately corroding the foundations of the holy city?\nYou have chosen to respond with kindness. Those who are kind to others should receive greater justice in life.

steps.ch: 苏克提瑞斯的辩护结果
steps.en: Soctires' defense verdict

steps.ch: 英雄或罪人，民众会如何看待这位老者？他究竟是在为众人抱薪，还是在腐蚀圣城的墙垣？\n你选择以强硬作答，一百个善举也不能为一桩恶行开脱。
steps.en: Hero or sinner? How will the people view this old man? Is he willing to sacrifice himself for others, or is he deliberately corroding the foundations of the holy city?\nYou have chosen to respond with toughness. Even a hundred kind actions do not excuse a bad deed.

steps.ch: 苏克提瑞斯的控诉结果
steps.en: Soctires' prosecution verdict

steps.ch: 英雄或罪人？也许两者都不。\n真正能决定我们去往何方的，从来不是具体的某个人，而是意愿的碰撞——若对现状不满，就去碰撞，让世界知道你的态度。
steps.en: Hero or sinner? Perhaps neither is correct.\nIt is never a single person that truly decides the direction that one takes. It is the collision of wills. If you are dissatisfied with the status quo, charge in and let the world know where you stand.

steps.ch: 与阿格莱雅一同宣判结果
steps.en: Announce the verdict with Aglaea

steps.ch: 谈话接近尾声时，苏克提瑞斯的弟子来报：有一伙受伤的外邦人躲进了重渊…\n你做出了自认为最佳的选择——多一分则显得奢侈，少一分则显得寒酸。
steps.en: As your discussion was coming to an end, Soctires' disciple came with word: A group of wounded outlanders has hidden themselves away in the Abyss.\nYou provide what you consider to be the perfect amount — any more would be excessive, any less would be stingy.

steps.ch: 把标准物资交给外邦人
steps.en: Give the outlanders some average supplies

steps.ch: 谈话接近尾声时，苏克提瑞斯的弟子来报：有一伙受伤的外邦人躲进了重渊…\n你慷慨解囊，为那群可怜人选购了最昂贵的优质物资——这足以成为他们近来最好的消息了。
steps.en: As your discussion was coming to an end, Soctires' disciple came with word: A group of wounded outlanders has hidden themselves away in the Abyss.\nYou show extreme generosity and buy the most extravagant and luxurious supplies for the poor outlanders — this will be the best news they have had in a long time.

steps.ch: 把豪华物资交给外邦人
steps.en: Give the outlanders some luxurious supplies

steps.ch: 你解决了外邦人的粮食问题，却得知苏克提瑞斯被捕的消息。他做了什么，值得如此大动干戈？
steps.en: You solved the issue of the outlanders' food supplies, but received news of Soctires' capture. What has he done? Is this reaction really warranted?

steps.ch: 苏克提瑞斯被抓了？
steps.en: Soctires has been captured?

steps.ch: 前往关押苏克提瑞斯的房间
steps.en: Go to the room where Soctires is being held

steps.ch: 你解决了外邦人的粮食问题，却得知苏克提瑞斯被捕的消息…\n英雄或罪人，他会如何为自己辩驳？世人又将如何评价他的功过？
steps.en: You solved the issue of the outlanders' food supplies, but received news of Soctires' capture.\nHero or sinner? How will he plead his case? And how will the people judge his contributions and shortcomings?

steps.ch: 与苏克提瑞斯交谈
steps.en: Speak with Soctires

steps.ch: 英雄或罪人，民众会如何看待这位老者？他究竟是在为众人抱薪，还是在腐蚀圣城的墙垣？
steps.en: Hero or sinner? How will the people view this old man? Is he willing to sacrifice himself for others, or is he deliberately corroding the foundations of the holy city?

steps.ch: 等待审判开始
steps.en: Wait for judgment to begin

quests.name_ch: 我曾在阿卡迪亚

steps.ch: 虽然纷争的泰坦已陨，但纷争的余波并不会因此彻底消弭——城门前的喧哗证明了这点，作为天外的英雄，你或许还要继续进行荡除纷争的纷争……\n在银河球棒侠的正义执行下，一切纷争都将绳之以法！闹事的纷争泰坦被你赶走了，但到底发生了什么呢…去问问被你救下的可怜人吧。
steps.en: Though the Strife Titan has fallen, the repercussions of war have yet to fully disappear — the commotion outside the city gates makes this perfectly clear. As a hero from beyond the sky, perhaps you may wish to continue your battle to eradicate all strife...\nAll strife will be brought to justice under the swift hand of the Galactic Baseballer! Though you have driven away the troublesome Strife Titan, something must have happened here... Go and ask the poor people you rescued for more information.

steps.ch: 向伊阿宋询问情况
steps.en: Ask Iason what is going on

steps.ch: 求生、财富、信仰、荣耀、所要守护的事物…一切战士都有拼死而战的理由，为战而生的眷属也不例外。这位敌人为何要对自己不可能战胜的城邦挑起争端呢？\n天谴猎手带着商队的商品逃走了，去悬锋城找到她，找回被夺走的宝物，或许能找到问题的答案。
steps.en: Survival, fortune, faith, honor, things they want to protect... Every warrior has a reason to fight to the death, and the Titankin that live for battle are no exception. Why would this enemy initiate a conflict against a city that they have no hope of defeating?\nThe Furiae Archer escaped with the caravan's goods. Go to Castrum Kremnos to find her, retrieve the stolen treasures, and maybe you will receive an answer to your questions.

steps.ch: 寻找天谴猎手
steps.en: Find the Furiae Archer

steps.ch: 求生、财富、信仰、荣耀、所要守护的事物…一切战士都有拼死而战的理由，为战而生的眷属也不例外。这位敌人为何要对自己不可能战胜的城邦挑起争端呢？\n从这个本应疯狂的战士口中，你听到了两个未曾听闻的名字。这些事情的真相与你寻找金丝的目的并无干系，但探索未知也确实是无名客的工作——至少比一拳打死她有趣，你接这活儿总不会真的是为了战斗吧？
steps.en: Survival, fortune, faith, honor, things they want to protect... Every warrior has a reason to fight to the death, and the Titankin that live for battle are no exception. Why would this enemy initiate a conflict against a city that they have no hope of defeating?\nYou hear two unfamiliar names from the mouth of this supposedly crazed warrior. Though finding the truth behind these names has nothing to do with your objective of finding the golden thread, it is also the duty of a Nameless to explore the unknown... At least it would be more interesting than finishing her off with a single blow. You didn't just take this job to get into fights after all, right?

steps.ch: 去云石市集打听「帕里斯」与「阿卡迪亚」
steps.en: Go to Marmoreal Market and ask about "Paris" and "Arcadia"

steps.ch: 问问水果店的德墨忒尔
steps.en: Ask Demetria at the fruit shop

steps.ch: 问问书店的克帖西芬
steps.en: Ask Ctesiphona at the bookstore

steps.ch: 问问裁缝铺的阿芙罗与阿格莱雅
steps.en: Ask Aphrea and Aglaea at the tailor's shop

steps.ch: 与天谴猎手交谈
steps.en: Speak with the Furiae Archer

steps.ch: 在迷迷的帮助下，你们闯入了这位眷属的记忆。这是独属于她的往世，也是已然发生过的注定之事，你在这里能做的只有见证与解疑。\n在过去的悬锋城中，记忆的主人却不见踪影，看来你又要来一次轰轰烈烈的劫狱作战了。
steps.en: With Mem's help, you successfully enter the Titankin's memories. This is a past that belongs solely to her. It is also an unchangeable fate that you will only be able to witness.\nIn this past version of Castrum Kremnos, the master of this memory is nowhere to be seen... Looks like you have another explosive jailbreak battle ahead of you.

steps.ch: 调查悬锋城的守备情况
steps.en: Investigate Castrum Kremnos' extent of preparations

steps.ch: 在迷迷的帮助下，你们闯入了这位眷属的记忆。这是独属于她的往世，也是已然发生过的注定之事，你在这里能做的只有见证与解疑。\n悬锋城人为什么要在牢房周围放一堆能打开牢房的机关？是出于对劫狱者的尊重？还是天天打架真的会影响智力？
steps.en: With Mem's help, you successfully enter the Titankin's memories. This is a past that belongs solely to her. It is also an unchangeable fate that you will only be able to witness.\nWhy would the people of Castrum Kremnos place mechanisms that can open the prison doors placed all around the cells? Are they showing respect for those who would perform a jailbreak? Or has fighting every day taken its toll on their brain power?

steps.ch: 调查「神性」的机关
steps.en: Investigate the "Divinity" mechanism

steps.ch: 激活神性装置的第一个雕像
steps.en: Activate the first Divinity device statue

steps.ch: 激活神性装置的第二个雕像
steps.en: Activate the second Divinity device statue

steps.ch: 激活神性装置的第三个雕像
steps.en: Activate the third Divinity device statue

steps.ch: 激活神性装置的第四个雕像
steps.en: Activate the fourth Divinity device statue

steps.ch: 进入牢房
steps.en: Enter the prison cell

steps.ch: 在迷迷的帮助下，你们闯入了这位眷属的记忆。这是独属于她的往世，也是已然发生过的注定之事，你在这里能做的只有见证与解疑。\n你救出了天谴猎手，以及她念叨的那位帕里斯——一个油腔滑调的年轻人。多亏翁法罗斯是个封闭的世界，他这说话方式拿到外面去，估计要在星际和平网络论坛里被笑话几百楼。
steps.en: With Mem's help, you successfully enter the Titankin's memories. This is a past that belongs solely to her. It is also an unchangeable fate that you will only be able to witness.\nYou rescue the Furiae Archer and this "Paris" that she had mentioned so many times... A glib and cheesy young man. He's fortunate that Amphoreus is a closed-off world. If anyone outside of Amphoreus heard him speak like that, there's no doubt he'd be trolled brutally on the Interastral Peace Network.

steps.ch: 追上逃走的帕里斯和天谴猎手
steps.en: Go after Paris and Furiae Archer that escaped

steps.ch: 跟随帕里斯回到奥赫玛
steps.en: Return to Okhema with Paris

steps.ch: 你见证了天谴猎手的追忆，该如何形容这个故事？一场悲剧？一个误会？一段谎言？而她念诵那两个名字时的情感，是爱？是恨？还是只有疑虑？\n你为此探寻到最后，还是没能给出答案。\n他所爱慕的身体的鲜花要是凋谢了，他就会展翅离开，哪怕曾经说过很多的话，曾经有过深沉的承诺。
steps.en: Having witnessed the Furiae Archer's memories, how would you describe this story? A tragedy? A misunderstanding? A lie? And the emotion in her voice when she pronounces those two names... Is it love? Hatred? Or simply confusion?\nHaving explored this story to its end, you still cannot find an answer for yourself.\nIf the flowers on the body that he so loves were to wither, he would sprout wings and fly away. It does not matter what sweet words he'd said before, or how deep a promise he had made.

steps.ch: 将金丝带回奥赫玛
steps.en: Take the golden thread back to Okhema

steps.ch: 你见证了天谴猎手的追忆，该如何形容这个故事？一场悲剧？一个误会？一段谎言？而她念诵那两个名字时的情感，是爱？是恨？还是只有疑虑？\n你为此探寻到最后，还是没能给出答案。\n凡是未开花的，或者凋谢的，无论身体抑或灵魂，又或者其他任何事物，爱慕都不会驻足。
steps.en: Having witnessed the Furiae Archer's memories, how would you describe this story? A tragedy? A misunderstanding? A lie? And the emotion in her voice when she pronounces those two names... Is it love? Hatred? Or simply confusion?\nHaving explored this story to its end, you still cannot find an answer for yourself.\nLove will not grace the unflowering and the withered... Be it a body or a soul, or anything else for that matter.

steps.ch: 将金丝交给伊阿宋与阿格莱雅
steps.en: Give the golden thread to Iason and Aglaea

quests.name_ch: 夜梦难缄默

steps.ch: 在开拓的旅途中，你已经见证了许多不同形式的「预言」，量子历史学派的卜算，穷观阵的推演…在翁法罗斯，命运又会向你展现何种模样？
steps.en: You have already witnessed "prophecies" in many forms along your trailblazing expedition: Divinations of the Quantum History School, extrapolations of the Matrix of Prescience... Just what kind of fate will you be shown in Amphoreus?

steps.ch: 在广场等待帕西提亚出现
steps.en: Wait for Pasithea to appear in the Plaza

steps.ch: 今天预言家不上班，不上班，不上班。
steps.en: The prophet isn't working today. They're not working, not working.

steps.ch: 询问周边的市民
steps.en: Question the nearby citizens

steps.ch: 询问远处的市民
steps.en: Question the citizens further away

steps.ch: 向圣城卫士寻求线索
steps.en: Ask the Holy City Guard for clues

steps.ch: 哼，这时候想起人家了？
steps.en: Hmph, now you think of me?

steps.ch: 找某位「伙伴」帮帮忙
steps.en: Find a "companion" to help

steps.ch: 打算寻短见的帕西提亚…得赶快找到她才行！
steps.en: Pasithea is thinking of taking her own life... You must find her quickly!

steps.ch: 跟随迷迷的指引，救回帕西提亚
steps.en: Follow Mem's direction and rescue Pasithea

steps.ch: 与帕西提亚交谈
steps.en: Speak with Pasithea

steps.ch: 欧洛尼斯的眷属，为何会对帕西提亚纠缠不休？在散落的天外之音中，是否会有线索留存？
steps.en: Why are Oronyx's kin so intent on bothering Pasithea? Perhaps there is a clue to be found in the scattered celestial echoes?

steps.ch: 向缇宝转述现状
steps.en: Report the situation to Tribbie

steps.ch: 前往命运重渊
steps.en: Go to the Abyss of Fate

steps.ch: 借用欧洛尼斯的预言算碑
steps.en: Use the Prophecy Tablet of Oronyx

steps.ch: 还记得最初的祈祷吗？帕西提亚，伟大的欧洛尼斯向你降下了神启，或许从那一刻起，你的命运就早已注定。
steps.en: Do you remember your original prayer? Pasithea, the great Oronyx sent you divine inspiration. Perhaps, your fate was decided from that very moment.

steps.ch: 触碰凝聚的记忆
steps.en: Touch the concentrated memory

steps.ch: 在雅努萨波利斯的废墟中，散落的泰坦梦呓将过往铭记。
steps.en: In the ruins of Janusopolis, the scattered Titans relive the past in their sleep.

steps.ch: 追踪下一道天外之音
steps.en: Track down the next celestial echo

steps.ch: 再用用泰坦的预言算碑
steps.en: Use the Titan's Prophecy Tablet again

steps.ch: 命运的泰坦们啊，若你们已看到悲惨的命运，为何不来拯救我们，反倒放任黑潮吞噬一切？还是说，即使是你们，也无能为力？
steps.en: O Fate Titans! If you have seen our tragic destiny, why would you not save us? Why would you allow the black tide to devour everything? Or could it be that even you yourselves are powerless against it?

steps.ch: 触碰往日的记忆
steps.en: Touch the memory of the past

steps.ch: 赞美欧洛尼斯，愿您降下不可曲解，不可动摇的神谕，向我等揭示命运。
steps.en: Praise Oronyx. May your revelations be absolute and your prophecies unshakeable. Please reveal our destiny to us.

steps.ch: 前往命运三相殿
steps.en: Head to the Temple of the Three Fates

steps.ch: 不可曲解，不可动摇，不可违抗，不可更改，因为这就是命运命运命运命运命运！
steps.en: It cannot be warped, it cannot be shaken, it cannot be defied, it cannot be changed. Why? Because this is destiny, destiny, destiny, destiny.

steps.ch: 触碰嘈杂的记忆
steps.en: Touch the disorderly memories

steps.ch: 聆听耳畔的低语
steps.en: Listen to the whispering in your ears

steps.ch: 夜梦已开始喧嚣。
steps.en: The night's dream has begun to rumble.

steps.ch: 掀开过往的帷幕
steps.en: Lift the curtain of the past

steps.ch: 你的灵魂是沉重的吗？还是轻盈的？
steps.en: Is your soul heavy? Or is it light?

steps.ch: （可选）回顾审判的法度
steps.en: (Optional) Review the law of the judgment

steps.ch: 母亲，你憎恨她吗？若不是她将你交给那些贪婪的祭司，你又怎会承受如此苦痛的命运？
steps.en: Mother, do you hate her? If she had not handed you over to those greedy priests, you would never have to bear such a painful destiny?

steps.ch: 前往神殿顶层，见证圣女的末路
steps.en: Head to the highest level of the temple to witness the end of the maiden's story

steps.ch: 你想要唾骂杜撰神谕的祭司们，只可惜，他们已经先你一步，去往了塞纳托斯的国度。
steps.en: You want nothing more than to curse the priests who fabricated the prophecy. Unfortunately, they have already moved ahead of you and passed to the realm of Thanatos.

steps.ch: 继续前进，寻找祭司的残像
steps.en: Continue onwards and search for the priest's remains

steps.ch: 现在，孩子，让我们回到故事的起点，所有的悲剧都仍未发生的时刻。欧洛尼斯慷慨地给予了你一双窥见未来的眼睛，一切都还来得及改变。
steps.en: Now, child. Let us return to where this story all began, before all of this tragedy had occurred. Oronyx has graciously granted you the eyes to see the future. Everything can still be changed.

steps.ch: 抵达神殿尽头，接受泰坦的神启
steps.en: Reach the end of the Temple to receive the Titan's revelation

steps.ch: 你找到了所有的天外之音，可其中似乎并没有那位眷属的身影。
steps.en: You have found all of the celestial echoes, but the Titankin was nowhere to be seen in them.

steps.ch: 回到帕西提亚的身边
steps.en: Return to Pasithea's side

steps.ch: 等到夜梦已不再喧嚣，等到我们在梦乡重逢。
steps.en: Until the day our dreams fall quiet once more, until we meet again in the land of our dreams.

steps.ch: 带帕西提亚重回故地
steps.en: Take Pasithea back home

steps.ch: 触碰最后的记忆
steps.en: Touch the final memory

quests.name_ch: 自相矛盾

steps.ch: 小贩口中最坚固的盾牌，究竟是真是假？亲自试试吧！
steps.en: The merchant claims this is the most robust shield. Is that for real? Try smashing it!

steps.ch: 尝试击碎盾牌
steps.en: Try to smash the shield

steps.ch: 听听小贩的解释
steps.en: Listen to the merchant's explanation

steps.ch: 两个小贩不承认自己贩卖的是假货，看来你需要找个足以服众的仲裁者。
steps.en: Both merchants insist they aren't selling fakes. It seems you'll need to find a credible arbitrator to settle the dispute.

steps.ch: 寻找仲裁者
steps.en: Find the arbitrator

steps.ch: 哈托努斯愿意做公证，令人兴奋的时刻终于到了，现在拿起「最强之矛」，刺向「最强之盾」吧！
steps.en: Chartonus has agreed to act as the arbitrator — what an exciting turn of events! Now, take up the Strongest Lance and attack the Strongest Shield!

steps.ch: 拿起「最强之矛」，刺向「最强之盾」吧
steps.en: Take the Strongest Lance and attack the Strongest Shield with it

steps.ch: 小贩依旧不肯承认长矛和盾牌都是赝品。没办法，先用普通的武器来检验下盾牌的质量吧。
steps.en: The merchants still refuse to acknowledge that the lance and shield are both fakes. Left with no other option, you decide to test the shield's quality using a regular weapon.

steps.ch: 检验盾牌的质量
steps.en: Inspect the quality of the shield

steps.ch: 第二次检验盾牌的质量
steps.en: Inspect the quality of the shield for the second time

steps.ch: 第三次检验盾牌的质量
steps.en: Inspect the quality of the shield for the third time

steps.ch: 小贩依旧不肯承认长矛和盾牌都是赝品。现在，该检验长矛的质量了。
steps.en: The merchants still refuse to acknowledge that the lance and shield are both fakes. Now, it's time to assess the lance's quality.

steps.ch: 检验长矛的质量
steps.en: Inspect the quality of the lance

steps.ch: 验证结束，「最强之矛」与「最强之盾」都被证明是假货，现在该去找那两个小贩对质了。
steps.en: The results are in: The Strongest Lance and the Strongest Shield have both been proven to be fakes. Now, it's time to question the two merchants.

steps.ch: 用得到的结果去质问两个小贩
steps.en: Use the result obtained to question the two merchants

quests.name_ch: 神秘仪式

steps.ch: 你在奥赫玛意外得到一份古老的卷轴，上面记载了一个神秘的仪式。按照卷轴记载的步骤，找齐所有材料，在指定地点下召唤出来的会是什么呢？
steps.en: Unexpectedly, you come across an ancient scroll in Okhema, detailing a mystical ceremony. Follow the instructions carefully and gather all the necessary materials. What will be summoned at the designated location?

steps.ch: 寻找举行神秘仪式所需的材料
steps.en: Search for the required materials for the mystical ceremony

steps.ch: 在古老巨树下举行神秘仪式
steps.en: Carry out the mystical ceremony under the large ancient giant tree

steps.ch: 见证仪式所召唤的记忆
steps.en: Witness the memories summoned by the ceremony

steps.ch: 观看过往的回忆，了解仪式失败的原因
steps.en: Watch past recollections to learn why the ceremony failed

quests.name_ch: 在别处

steps.ch: 辩论的风气在奥赫玛流行已久，而你恰巧碰见了两位精通修辞学的教师，去听听他们会提出什么样有趣的观点吧。
steps.en: The culture of debate has been popular in Okhema for a long time, and you just so happen to have met with two teachers that are proficient in the art of rhetoric. Go and see what kinds of interesting perspectives they put forward.

steps.ch: 为某方的观点辩护
steps.en: Debate on the side of one perspective

steps.ch: （抉择）希诺：「阿卡索斯」不存在
steps.en: (Decision) Zeno: "Icatus" does not exist

steps.ch: （抉择）帕门弥德：「阿卡索斯」存在
steps.en: (Decision) Parmenides: "Icatus" does exist

quests.name_ch: 破碎的记忆

steps.ch: 果蔬摊老板德墨忒尔的女儿失踪已久，然而就在昨天，她梦到了自己最亲爱的孩子。或许你回溯记忆的能力能够帮到她。
steps.en: The fruit and veg store owner Demetria's daughter has been missing for a long time. However, she dreamt of her beloved child just last night. Perhaps your ability to rewind memories could be of assistance?

steps.ch: 前往城外，调查营地
steps.en: Head outside the city and investigate the camp

steps.ch: 回溯记忆，寻找线索
steps.en: Rewind the memory and search for clues

steps.ch: 与赫卡忒分享获得的线索
steps.en: Share the clues you found with Hekate

steps.ch: 与赫卡忒共同梳理线索
steps.en: Go through the clues with Hekate

steps.ch: 将调查结果汇报给德墨忒尔
steps.en: Report the results of your investigation to Demetria

quests.name_ch: 黑潮时期的爱情
quests.name_en: Love in the Time of Black Tide

steps.ch: 「爱当轻语低喃，令无人知晓，唯有天空。」你无意间撞见一对爱侣的秘密约会，但今天两人的交流似乎不太愉快……
steps.en: "Love should be soft whispers that none but the sky can hear." You accidentally run into a secret rendezvous between two lovers, but their conversation doesn't seem happy...

steps.ch: 倾听厄琉斯的烦恼
steps.en: Listen to Aelius' troubles

steps.ch: 与厄琉斯收到噩耗
steps.en: Receive the bad news with Aelius

steps.ch: 危难时刻，朋友会出手！厄琉斯决定问问市集热心的老板们，或许拼凑的碎片能引出线索。
steps.en: Times of trouble are what friends are for! Aelius decides to ask the helpful shopkeepers in the market, in the hopes of piecing together a clue from the fragmentary information they can offer.

steps.ch: 询问哈托努斯关于宁芙的下落
steps.en: Ask Chartonus about Nympha's whereabouts

steps.ch: 询问克瑞斯关于宁芙的下落
steps.en: Ask Kyros about Nympha's whereabouts

steps.ch: 询问西塔罗斯关于宁芙的下落
steps.en: Ask Theodoros about Nympha's whereabouts

steps.ch: 偌大的云石天宫，一定有办法调查到宁芙的下落。
steps.en: There must be a way to find Nympha in a place as big as the Marmoreal Palace

steps.ch: 前往云石天宫，寻找宁芙
steps.en: Go to the Marmoreal Palace and look for Nympha

steps.ch: 回溯过去，寻找宁芙被关押之处
steps.en: Rewind to the past and find where Nympha was imprisoned

steps.ch: 青年深知，再无任何事阻止他奔向所爱。
steps.en: The youth knows that there's nothing that will stop him from rushing towards his love.

steps.ch: 见证厄琉斯的觉悟
steps.en: Witness Aelius' revelation

steps.ch: 回到市集，找到宁芙
steps.en: Return to the market and find Nympha

steps.ch: 故事接近尾声，是喜剧完满的结局，还是另一出悲剧的开场？你默默祈祷命运的天秤倾向前者。
steps.en: The story draws to an end. Is this a happy ending of a rom-com, or the prologue of yet another tragedy? You silently pray that the scales of fate tilts towards the former.

steps.ch: 前往大地兽工坊，送别二人
steps.en: Head to the Dromas Workshop and bid farewell to these two

quests.name_ch: 女孩、钱币与故乡
quests.name_en: The Girl, the Coins, and Homeland

steps.ch: 你的钱袋和那女孩一起不见了，一定有人知道她现在在哪。
steps.en: Your money pouch has disappeared with the young girl. Someone must know where she is.

steps.ch: 询问目击者
steps.en: Interview witnesses

steps.ch: 有了众人提供的线索，那女孩的行踪便不难追查。小小年纪就不学好，是该好好教育一下。
steps.en: With the clues you've gathered from everyone, the girl should not be hard to find. Behaving like this at a young age... she needs to learn a good lesson.

steps.ch: 找到小女孩的藏身处
steps.en: Find where the girl is hiding

steps.ch: 你找到了那女孩的藏身处，这里的记忆浓度很高，似乎凝结着某段不愿遗忘的过往。
steps.en: You found the girl's hiding place. The memories are extremely concentrated here as if there is a condensed memory that is not willing to be forgotten.

steps.ch: 调查追忆残像
steps.en: Investigate the Fragments of Recollection

steps.ch: 追上她！
steps.en: Catch up to her!

steps.ch: 追上逃跑的小女孩
steps.en: Catch up to the running girl

steps.ch: 原来这女孩并非爱财，而是为了实现一个愿望…但现在都无所谓了。
steps.en: It turns out that she was not doing this for money, but to fulfill a wish... Nothing that can be done about it now, though.

steps.ch: 倾听女孩的「辩解」
steps.en: Listen to the girl's "explanation"

quests.name_ch: 非自然死亡

steps.ch: 「人们做不到一起死去。即使同时亡故，他们也只是各自面对了自己的死亡。」\n——见证珀里法斯的朋友们被黑潮杀死的最后时刻。
steps.en: "People cannot manage to die together. Even if they die at the same time, they are simply facing their own respective deaths."\n— Witness Periphas' friends' final moments as the black tide killed them.

steps.ch: 在树庭中寻找珀里法斯关心的线索
steps.en: Find in the Grove clues that Periphas value

steps.ch: 黑潮无情地从普通人身上碾过，不留下一丝怜悯。然而，这似乎无法解释…它为何如此「高效」？
steps.en: The black tide runs over mortals ruthlessly without a shred of mercy, but that doesn't seem to be enough to explain why it's so... "efficient."

steps.ch: 观察黑衣剑士的最后行动
steps.en: Observe the black-robed swordmaster's final act

steps.ch: 将存有疑点的调查结果告知珀里法斯。
steps.en: Let Periphas know of the suspicious conclusions from the investigation.

steps.ch: 将调查结果告知珀里法斯
steps.en: Let Periphas know of the investigation's outcome

quests.name_ch: 常有别离时

steps.ch: 在风堇的委托下，你答应去拜访那些树庭牺牲者的家属，了解一下他们的近况。\n但或许除此以外，你能做的还有很多。
steps.en: You promised to visit the families of those who lost their lives at the Grove and find out about how they're doing at Hyacine's request.\nAside from this, however, you might be able to do something more...

steps.ch: 找到老费贝尔，和他聊聊
steps.en: Find Old Fabio and talk with him

steps.ch: 在献身拱心附近调查姐妹俩留下的痕迹
steps.en: Investigate the traces left by the sisters near the Dome of Devotion

steps.ch: 继续调查姐妹俩留下的痕迹
steps.en: Continue investigating the traces left by the sisters

steps.ch: 找到提图斯，看看他是否需要帮助
steps.en: Find Titus and see if he needs help

steps.ch: 在友爱之馆附近调查老提图斯留下的痕迹
steps.en: Investigate the traces left by Old Titus near the Library of Philia

steps.ch: 将调查的结果告诉提图斯
steps.en: Let Titus know about the results of your investigation

steps.ch: 将阿塔卡玛的佩剑交还给老费贝尔
steps.en: Return Artakama's sword back to Old Fabio

quests.name_ch: 失恋的大地兽

steps.ch: 就算是为了赔偿金，你也得搞清楚这头大地兽的来历。但首先，你需要先让它安静下来。
steps.en: Even if it's just for the compensation, you need to figure out where this dromas came from. But first, you need to calm it down.

steps.ch: 和饲养员先生碰头，想想解决办法
steps.en: Meet with the caretaker and try to come up with a solution

steps.ch: 现在，就试着去解决这头大地兽的烦恼吧。
steps.en: Now, try to solve this dromas's woes.

steps.ch: 尝试安抚失恋的大地兽
steps.en: Try to soothe the heartbroken dromas

steps.ch: 能想到的解决办法都试过了，但没有奏效…再去和饲养员先生聊聊吧。
steps.en: You tried everything you can think of, but nothing worked... Go chat with the caretaker again.

steps.ch: 再次和饲养员先生碰头，聊聊后续的打算
steps.en: Meet up with the caretaker again and chat about your plans for what follows

steps.ch: 现在，你必须以身入局，拦住这头肆意妄为的大地兽吧！
steps.en: Now, you must enter the fray and stop this reckless dromas!

steps.ch: 拦住疯跑的大地兽
steps.en: Stop the rampaging dromas

steps.ch: 部分悬锋族人打算返回家乡，并带走这头大地兽，去看看事情的后续进展吧。
steps.en: Some Kremnoans plan to return home and wish to take this dromas. Go see how things are unfolding with them.

steps.ch: 去奥赫玛城门口看看事件的后续
steps.en: Go to Okhema's city gate and see how things have gone for the incident

quests.name_ch: 一日塔兰顿

steps.ch: 控诉创世神明安排了不公平的命运，于是他愤怒地冲了出去，他要干啥？
steps.en: Accusing the creator gods of arranging an unfair fate, he stormed out in anger. What is he planning to do?

steps.ch: 跟上去，搞清楚「埃德加」如何弑神
steps.en: Follow along and figure out how "Edgar" killed a god

steps.ch: 听完双方的争辩，给出一个公正的裁决，这便是「一日塔兰顿」。
steps.en: After listening to both sides' arguments, deliver a fair judgment. This is what it means to be "One-Day Talanton."

steps.ch: 担任「一日塔兰顿」，裁决二人的小争端
steps.en: Act as One-Day Talanton and settle a minor dispute between two individuals

quests.name_ch: 以刻法勒之名

steps.ch: 由于黎明云崖的准入规定，渴望与刻法勒说话的希瑞雅被守卫拦在入口。试试和守卫沟通一下，让他为这个小女孩淳朴的心愿放行吧。
steps.en: Due to Dawncloud's entry regulations, Serena, who wishes to speak with Kephale, is stopped by the guard at the entrance. Try talking to the guard to allow this little girl's innocent wish.

steps.ch: 试着和守卫沟通，请求放行
steps.en: Speak with the guard to ask for entry

steps.ch: 心软但依旧恪尽职守的守卫提出，你可以在清晨人少时再带希瑞雅悄悄进入云崖……
steps.en: The sympathetic but dutiful guard suggests that you could bring Serena into Dawncloud quietly during the less-crowded morning hours...

steps.ch: 和希瑞雅打个招呼，准备进入云崖
steps.en: Greet Serena before entering Dawncloud

steps.ch: 黎明云崖作为供奉、景仰刻法勒的圣地，有许多令人印象深刻的景观，带希瑞雅四处逛逛、参观参观吧。
steps.en: As a holy site dedicated to honoring Kephale, Dawncloud features many remarkable views. Show Serena around the place.

steps.ch: 带希瑞雅四处走走，参观黎明云崖
steps.en: Take Serena around to explore Dawncloud

steps.ch: 参观巨大的壁画
steps.en: Observe the giant mural

steps.ch: 参观另一幅巨大的壁画
steps.en: Observe the other giant mural

steps.ch: 现在，继续深入黎明云崖、向负世泰坦的所在进发吧。
steps.en: Now, proceed further into Dawncloud toward the Worldbearing Titan.

steps.ch: 深入黎明云崖，朝刻法勒的神体前进
steps.en: Continue deeper into Dawncloud toward Kephale's divine vessel

steps.ch: 参观半神议院
steps.en: Visit the Demigod Council

steps.ch: 和祭司的一番对话让希瑞雅产生了情绪波动，也许和她聊两句能让希瑞雅好些。
steps.en: The conversation with the priest has stirred up emotions in Serena. Perhaps talking with her will help her feel better.

steps.ch: 安慰安慰希瑞雅
steps.en: Comfort Serena

steps.ch: 现在，继续深入黎明云崖、向负世泰坦的所在进发吧。
steps.en: Now, proceed further into Dawncloud toward the Worldbearing Titan.

steps.ch: 继续深入黎明云崖，朝刻法勒的神体前进
steps.en: Proceed further into Dawncloud towards Kephale's divine vessel

steps.ch: 你们终于来到了最靠近刻法勒的地方，试着和它说说话吧。
steps.en: You've finally reached the closest spot to Kephale. Try speaking with it.

steps.ch: 靠近刻法勒，尝试与泰坦说话
steps.en: Approach Kephale and try speaking with the Titan

steps.ch: 「刻法勒」的声音有些可疑…或许该悄悄去声源处调查看看。
steps.en: Something seems suspicious about "Kephale's" voice... Perhaps we should quietly investigate its source.

steps.ch: 调查「刻法勒」之声的来源
steps.en: Investigate the source of "Kephale's" voice

steps.ch: 希瑞雅终于得偿所愿了，把这个善意的谎言埋在心底，带她离开黎明云崖吧。
steps.en: Serena has finally fulfilled her wish. Just keep this kind lie to yourself for now, and escort her out of Dawncloud.

steps.ch: 和希瑞雅说说话，带她离开黎明云崖
steps.en: Speak with Serena and escort her out of Dawncloud

quests.name_ch: 矛与盾，哐啷作声

steps.ch: 你在黎明云崖的避难所听到了竞技场英雄柯库翁的诉苦：克拉特鲁斯正维持此处的秩序，却拒绝了他外出救下其他公民的请求。\n去问问克拉特鲁斯原因吧。
steps.en: In the shelter of Dawncloud, you hear Glykon, the Arena Hero, and his lamentations, saying that though Krateros insists on maintaining order in the area, he denied Glykon's plea to venture out and rescue the other citizens.\nGo demand an explanation from Krateros.

steps.ch: 向克拉特鲁斯询问情况
steps.en: Ask Krateros about the situation

steps.ch: 面对黑潮肆虐的现况，你当然也不能无动于衷。在克拉特鲁斯的建议下，你决定和柯库翁一起探查对面圣殿的情况。
steps.en: Faced with the havoc the black tide is wreaking, you cannot stand idle. Heeding Krateros's advice, you and Glykon both investigate the situation of the temple across from you.

steps.ch: 探查被黑潮占据的圣殿
steps.en: Search the temple consumed by the black tide

steps.ch: 要解救被困的刻牢刻和克利克，必须先把游荡的黑潮造物解决。\n从来没有黑潮造物能在你的球棒下幸存，你决定亲自上阵。
steps.en: To rescue the trapped Kelok and Kilik, you must first eliminate the roaming Black Tide Creatures.\nNo creatures of the black tide have ever survived the weight of your falling bat. You decide to settle matters personally.

steps.ch: 击败游荡的黑潮造物
steps.en: Defeat the roaming Black Tide Creatures

steps.ch: 要解救被困的刻牢刻和克利克，必须先把游荡的黑潮造物解决。\n克利克为你提供了一条计策，只要你将怪物引到他们脚下，他就能把怪物解决。
steps.en: To rescue the trapped Kelok and Kilik, you must first eliminate the roaming Black Tide Creatures.\nKilik has provided you with a solution. If you can get the monsters beneath his and Kelok's feet, they can solve the monster problem.

steps.ch: 将黑潮造物引到廊道下方
steps.en: Lure the Black Tide Creatures under the corridor

steps.ch: 要解救被困的刻牢刻和克利克，必须先把游荡的黑潮造物解决。\n这种小事何必你亲力亲为？你决定交给柯库翁发挥。
steps.en: To rescue the trapped Kelok and Kilik, you must first eliminate the roaming Black Tide Creatures.\nWhy waste your strength on such a trifling matter? You decide to leave it to Glykon.

steps.ch: 交给柯库翁发挥
steps.en: Let Glykon do his thing

steps.ch: 要解救被困的刻牢刻和克利克，必须先把游荡的黑潮造物解决。\n从来没有黑潮造物能在你的球棒下幸存，你决定亲自上阵。
steps.en: To rescue the trapped Kelok and Kilik, you must first eliminate the roaming Black Tide Creatures.\nNo creatures of the black tide have ever survived the weight of your falling bat. You decide to settle matters personally.

steps.ch: 要解救被困的刻牢刻和克利克，必须先把游荡的黑潮造物解决。\n克利克为你提供了一条计策，只要你将怪物引到他们脚下，他就能把怪物解决。
steps.en: To rescue the trapped Kelok and Kilik, you must first eliminate the roaming Black Tide Creatures.\nKilik has provided you with a solution. If you can get the monsters beneath his and Kelok's feet, they can solve the monster problem.

steps.ch: 你们救下了克利克和刻牢刻，问问他们此处的情况吧。
steps.en: You saved Kilik and Kelok. Now, ask them what's going on.

steps.ch: 向两位小贩询问情况
steps.en: Ask the two merchants about the situation

steps.ch: 为了在不断来袭的黑潮中守住这里，两位小贩提出去取回自己被没收的货物，搭建起一处壁垒。\n虽然你对他们这批货的品质深表怀疑，但也没有其他办法，先目送他们出发吧。
steps.en: To defend against the relentless onslaught of the black tide, two merchants are determined to retrieve their confiscated goods and build a makeshift barricade.\nThough you're deeply skeptical of the quality of their wares, there's no alternative — you watch them depart, hoping their plan holds.

steps.ch: 掩护两位小贩出发
steps.en: Protect the two merchants as they set off on the journey

steps.ch: 两位小贩前脚刚走，汹涌的黑潮造物便接踵而来。\n再多的黑潮造物在你手下也不过一合之敌，你决定亲自上阵。
steps.en: Right after the two merchants left, the raging creatures of the black tide come forth.\nDoesn't matter how many Black Tide Creatures come, they're all victims to fall under your bat. You decide to settle matters personally.

steps.ch: 击败袭来的黑潮怪物
steps.en: Defeat the attacking Black Tide Creatures

steps.ch: 两位小贩前脚刚走，汹涌的黑潮造物便接踵而来。\n这种小事何必你亲力亲为？你决定交给柯库翁发挥。
steps.en: Right after the two merchants left, the raging creatures of the black tide come forth.\nWhy waste your strength on such a trifling matter? You decide to leave it to Glykon.

steps.ch: 等待两位小贩回来的时间里，你们也不能闲着。问问柯库翁下一步计划吧。
steps.en: You can't idle while waiting for the two merchants to return. Ask Glykon about the next part of the plan.

steps.ch: 与柯库翁谈谈下一步计划
steps.en: Ask Glykon about the next part of the plan

steps.ch: 柯库翁提出可以用散落各处的盾牌先搭出街垒的雏形。四处看看，收集盾牌、搭建壁垒吧。
steps.en: Glykon stated that you can use the scattered shields to create the shape of prototypical fortress. Look around, collect shields, and build a fortification.

steps.ch: 收集盾牌
steps.en: Collect Shields

steps.ch: 收集盾牌并放置
steps.en: Collect and place the shields

steps.ch: 放置盾牌搭建壁垒
steps.en: Place the shields and construct fortifications

steps.ch: 两个小贩仍不见踪影，为了不让再度来袭的黑潮造物占据此处，伤害躲在内室中的难民，你们不得不独力迎敌……
steps.en: The two merchants are missing, and to stop the oncoming Black Tide Creatures from taking this place and hurting the refugees hiding inside the inner chambers, you have to face the threat yourselves...

steps.ch: 继续迎击黑潮造物
steps.en: Continue facing the Black Tide Creatures

steps.ch: 事情尘埃落定。你们付出了一些代价，终究还是守住了这里。赶来支援的卫兵接管了防卫事务，去问问他们情况吧，也别忘了问候问候柯库翁。
steps.en: The dust has settled. You paid a price, but you managed to hold the area. The reinforcements have taken over security duties. Ask them about the situation and don't forget to check in with Glykon.

steps.ch: 向卫兵询问情况
steps.en: Ask the guards about the situation

steps.ch: 问候柯库翁
steps.en: Greet Glykon

quests.name_ch: 坏孩子，好礼物

steps.ch: 三个吵闹的小鬼头，竟然是在争论刻法勒的庇护究竟是不是真的。面对希瑞雅想再去一次黎明云崖的恳求，你得认真思考一下。
steps.en: Three noisy little troublemakers are actually arguing about whether Kephale's protection is real. Faced with Serena's plea to visit Dawncloud again, you need to ponder carefully.

steps.ch: 离孩子们稍远一点，思考现在的状况
steps.en: Move a bit further from the children and think about the current situation

steps.ch: 你来到了黎明云崖，并没有看到希瑞雅口中好心的守卫叔叔。\n想办法向眼前这名站岗的守卫打探打探吧。
steps.en: Having reached Dawncloud, you find no sign of the "Mr. Nice Guard" that Serena spoke of.\nTry to inquire with the guard on duty.

steps.ch: 与黎明云崖的守卫交谈
steps.en: Speak with the guard at Dawncloud

steps.ch: 从守卫口中得知，一部分守卫黎明云崖的卫兵被抽调去了对抗黑潮的前线，曾经帮助希瑞雅的好心叔叔或许也在其中，去他说的位置打探一下。
steps.en: According to the guard, some of the soldiers defending Dawncloud have been dispatched to the frontline to fight against the black tide. The kind man who once helped Serena might be among them. Go to the location he mentioned to find out.

steps.ch: 前往对抗黑潮的前线
steps.en: Go to the frontline fighting against the black tide

steps.ch: 沿着站岗守卫的指引，你来到了抵抗黑潮的前线，却发现这里刚刚遭遇过怪物入侵。\n调查一下倒地的卫兵们是否还活着吧。
steps.en: Following the stationed guards' directions, you arrive at the front line of the battle against black tide, only to find the area has just been overrun by monsters.\nCheck on the guards lying prone on the ground and see if any are still alive.

steps.ch: 调查仰面的普通卫兵
steps.en: Check the fallen guards

steps.ch: （可选）调查倒地的普通卫兵
steps.en: (Optional) Investigate the ordinary guard lying on the ground

steps.ch: （可选）调查倒地的山之民卫兵
steps.en: (Optional) Investigate the Mountain Dweller lying on the ground

steps.ch: 你在牺牲卫兵的盔甲下发现了一个特殊的遗物，追溯一下记忆残像里记录的片段，看看这里发生过什么吧。
steps.en: Beneath the armor of a fallen guard, you discover a peculiar relic. Trace what's recorded within the Fragment of Recollection to uncover what happened here.

steps.ch: 追溯卫兵尸体旁的记忆残像
steps.en: Trace the lingering Fragment of Recollection near the fallen guards

steps.ch: 你已经知道了，这名叫斐第斯的士兵，就是帮助过希瑞雅的守卫叔叔。面对他已经牺牲的事实，你要如何满足孩子们的心愿呢？
steps.en: You now know that the soldier named Phedes was the guard who once helped Serena. Now that he has sacrificed himself, how will you fulfill the children's wish?

steps.ch: 梳理下一步的计划
steps.en: Figure out the next move

steps.ch: 在刻法勒的神像后找到一个隐蔽的藏身处，完成你的扮演！
steps.en: Find a well-hidden spot behind the Kephale statue and pull off your performance!

steps.ch: 去刻法勒神像背后躲好，准备你的扮演
steps.en: Hide behind the Kephale statue and get ready for your act

steps.ch: 咳咳…你花费了太多口水，好在孩子们相信了这次扮演，现在悄悄离开吧。
steps.en: Ahem... You sure talked their ears off, but at least the kids bought your act. Now, quietly slip away.

steps.ch: 悄悄离开神像背后
steps.en: Sneak away from behind the statue

quests.name_ch: 终将再起的涟漪

steps.ch: 昔涟似乎丢失了什么重要的东西，她需要你的帮忙......
steps.en: Cyrene seems to have lost something important. She needs your help...

steps.ch: 前往后院的池塘边寻找「莫名遗失之物」
steps.en: Search for the "Mysteriously Lost Item" by the rear courtyard pond

steps.ch: 前往祝祭庭院二楼寻找「莫名遗失之物」
steps.en: Search for the "Mysteriously Lost Item" on the second floor of the Sacrament Courtyard

steps.ch: 前往麦浪翻涌之地寻找「莫名遗失之物」
steps.en: Search for the "Mysteriously Lost Item" in the Field of Golden Waves

steps.ch: 前往启程的海畔寻找「莫名遗失之物」
steps.en: Search for the "Mysteriously Lost Item" by the Seashore of Departure

quests.name_ch: 石悬风止处
quests.name_en: Where Stone and Wind Stood Still

steps.ch: 「吟风爵」维吉妮娅将难以启齿的情事，都藏在这封信笺之中。在宴会中找到「曳石爵」阿波罗尼，替羞涩的少女传达心意吧！
steps.en: The love that "Dux Carminum" Verginia struggles to voice are all hidden in this letter. Find "Dux Helkolithist" Apollonius in the feast and pass the shy girl's feelings along!

steps.ch: 替维吉妮娅将信笺送交阿波罗尼
steps.en: Hand the letter to Apollonius on Verginia's behalf

steps.ch: 拦路八卦的两位黄金裔向你透露了维吉妮娅与阿波罗尼的一些旧事，你手中的这封信似乎愈发沉重了。
steps.en: Two gossiping Chrysos Heirs who stopped you slipped some history between Verginia and Apollonius. The letter in your hands now seems even heavier.

steps.ch: 继续寻找阿波罗尼，将信送出
steps.en: Keep looking for Apollonius and pass the letter to him

steps.ch: 阿波罗尼的回应让维吉妮娅有些失落，可今天她的脸上却挂着担忧，去问问发生什么事了吧。
steps.en: Apollonius's reply made Verginia feel rather down. However, today she looks a little concerned. Go ask her what is happening.

steps.ch: 与维吉妮娅等人交谈
steps.en: Speak with Verginia and the others

steps.ch: 阿波罗尼居然失踪了…最后的目击记录位于城下的古遗迹，顺着记忆的残像前进，寻找他的踪迹吧。
steps.en: Who would have thought that Apollonius disappeared... He was last seen in the ancient ruins under the city. Advance after the fragments of memory and look for traces of him.

steps.ch: 进入城下的古遗迹，寻找阿波罗尼的踪迹
steps.en: Enter the ancient ruins under the city and look for Apollonius's tracks

steps.ch: 阿波罗尼此行的终点似乎就是雅努斯迷津…他想用这台装置得知些什么？
steps.en: The destination of Apollonius's trip seemed to be the Janus' Maze... What was he trying to learn through this device?

steps.ch: 前往雅努斯迷津处，寻找阿波罗尼的踪迹
steps.en: Head to the Janus' Maze and look for traces of Apollonius

steps.ch: 观看阿波罗尼启用雅努斯迷津的记录
steps.en: View the records of Apollonius using the Janus' Maze

steps.ch: 了解阿波罗尼从雅努斯迷津处得到的指引
steps.en: Learn about the guidance Apollonius received from the Janus' Maze

steps.ch: 得知欢宴真相的阿波罗尼想要离开幻境？必须阻止这等同于寻死的行为……
steps.en: Apollonius now wants to leave the fantasia after learning the truth behind the feast? You must stop this death-seeking behavior...

steps.ch: 前往斯缇科西亚入口处，拦下意图离城的阿波罗尼
steps.en: Head to the entrance of Styxia and stop Apollonius, who is trying to leave the city

steps.ch: 该怎么将阿波罗尼消失一事传达给他的伙伴们呢？你一筹莫展……
steps.en: How should you tell Apollonius's friends that he had disappeared? You feel stuck...

steps.ch: 返回维吉妮娅所在处
steps.en: Return to where Verginia is

steps.ch: 消失的阿波罗尼重新出现了？这怎么可能……
steps.en: Apollonius had returned after his disappearance? How is that possible...

steps.ch: 与重回欢宴的阿波罗尼及其他人会合
steps.en: Reunite with Apollonius, who had returned to the feast, as well as with everyone else

steps.ch: 目睹维吉妮娅告白一幕的，除了你与黄金裔，似乎还有这欢宴的主人。
steps.en: Apart from you and the Chrysos Heirs, it seemed the master of this feast also witnessed Verginia's confession.

steps.ch: 与人群之外的海瑟音交谈
steps.en: Speak with Hysilens, who is standing apart from the crowd

steps.ch: 悬石会为微风滚落山崖，微风也会为悬石驻留脚步。
steps.en: The stone is willing to roll down a cliff for the wind. The wind, too, is willing to still its steps for the stone.

steps.ch: 前往斯缇科西亚入口处，了解维吉妮娅的决意
steps.en: Head to the entrance of Styxia and learn about Verginia's resolve

quests.name_ch: 瓶中清忆

steps.ch: 你刚在台子上走了一圈，就被人硬塞了一瓶…蜜酿？你自己做的？什么时候？奇奇怪怪，还是找人问问吧。
steps.en: You barely make a round on the stage when someone shoves a bottle of... honey brew into your hands? Did you make this yourself? When? This is weird... It'd be better to ask around.

steps.ch: 与蜜酿主理人交谈，了解情况
steps.en: Talk to the honey brew manager to learn more about what is happening

steps.ch: 心酿的祭台…不管是为报酬，还是单纯对这个物品感兴趣，你接下了修复它的委托，去找「海洋」司祭来帮忙吧。
steps.en: The soul brew altar... Whether for the reward or simply out of interest in this item, you've accepted the request to repair it. Go find the "Ocean" Priest to help out.

steps.ch: 寻找海瑟音的司祭
steps.en: Search for Hysilens's priest

steps.ch: 司祭呼唤来海洋的权柄，但似乎并未按预期生效。踩到祭台上再做一瓶看看吧。
steps.en: The priest beckons the ocean's authority, but it doesn't quite work as expected. Try standing on the altar and making another bottle.

steps.ch: 步上祭台，再次尝试制造一瓶心酿
steps.en: Step onto the altar and try making another bottle of soul brew

steps.ch: 进行修复的尝试失败了，但如果能得知它的运作原理，司祭或许可以重新制造一个新的祭台——不如动用你的岁月权能，直接找泰坦问问看？
steps.en: The attempt to repair failed, but if we could understand how it operates, the priest might be able to build a new altar—why not use your authority of time to ask the Titan directly?

steps.ch: 找到灵水盆，看看能不能发现泰坦的思绪
steps.en: Find the spirit basin and see if you can discover the Titan's thoughts

steps.ch: 司祭似乎有所领悟，希望这一次，心酿能够迎来新生。
steps.en: The priest seems to have an epiphany. Hopefully, the soul brew can be rejuvenated this time.

steps.ch: 回到酿造区
steps.en: Return to the brewing area

steps.ch: 祭台被重塑，作为特产的心酿也再一次回到了欢宴客的视野中，去和他们聊聊吧。
steps.en: The altar has been reforged, and the signature soul brew has once again caught the attention of the banquet guests. Go have a chat with them.

steps.ch: 见证焕然一新的酿造区
steps.en: Observe the new brewing area

quests.name_ch: 《如我所书》

steps.ch: 这座花园，就是如我所书的最后一页…
steps.en: This garden is the final page of As I've Written...

steps.ch: 探索全新的永恒一页
steps.en: Explore the new Eternal Page

steps.ch: 只要把《如我所书》大规模复印，不就能被宇宙记住了？我真聪明！
steps.en: If I print As I've Written on a large scale, wouldn't the universe remember it? I am such a genius!

steps.ch: 跟姬子和瓦尔特商讨此事
steps.en: Discuss this matter with Himeko and Welt

steps.ch: 播散文明种子的第一站，雅利洛-Ⅵ！
steps.en: First stop for spreading the seeds of civilization: Jarilo-VI!

steps.ch: 去见大守护者
steps.en: Meet the Supreme Guardian

steps.ch: 播散文明种子的第一站，雅利洛-Ⅵ！\n希儿说有事要我帮忙，到底什么事这么神秘？
steps.en: First stop for spreading the seeds of civilization: Jarilo-VI!\nSeele says she needs my help. What could be so mysterious?

steps.ch: 看看发生了什么
steps.en: Check out what's going on

steps.ch: 播散文明种子的第一站，雅利洛-Ⅵ！\n原来虎克只是在闹着玩…或许娜塔莎医生会对我的作品感兴趣。
steps.en: First stop for spreading the seeds of civilization: Jarilo-VI!\nTurns out Hook is just messing around... Maybe Dr. Natasha is interested in my work.

steps.ch: 和娜塔莎医生聊聊
steps.en: Talk to Dr. Natasha

steps.ch: 第二站，仙舟「罗浮」！\n景元将军似乎不在，那就去找符玄「将军」吧。
steps.en: Second stop, the Xianzhou Luofu!\nGeneral Jing Yuan doesn't seem to be around, so let's go find "General" Fu Xuan.

steps.ch: 向符玄推荐《如我所书》
steps.en: Recommend As I've Written to Fu Xuan

steps.ch: 第二站，仙舟「罗浮」！\n还得再跑一个部门。驭空姐姐也有无名客之魂，应该会喜欢我的书吧？
steps.en: Second stop, The Xianzhou Luofu!\nStill need to visit another department. Madam Yukong has the spirit of the Nameless as well. She will probably like my book, right?

steps.ch: 询问驭空的意见
steps.en: Ask Yukong's opinion

steps.ch: 第三站，匹诺康尼！\n在做正事之前，先拜访一下前辈们吧。这个故事也应与他们分享。
steps.en: Third stop, Penacony!\nLet's pay our seniors a visit before getting down to business. This story should be shared with them too.

steps.ch: 拜访三位无名客的纪念碑
steps.en: Visit the monument of the Three Nameless

steps.ch: 第三站，匹诺康尼！\n这里可是我的主场，又有知更鸟帮忙，轻轻松松啦。
steps.en: Third stop, Penacony!\nThis is my home turf, and with Robin helping out, it'll be a piece of cake.

steps.ch: 与知更鸟碰面
steps.en: Meet with Robin

steps.ch: 第三站，匹诺康尼！\n这里的读者口味刁钻啊…爱臣们会给出什么意见呢？
steps.en: Third stop, Penacony!\nThe readers here are rather picky... I wonder what feedback my loyal subjects will give?

steps.ch: 向家具们征求意见
steps.en: Ask the furniture for advice

steps.ch: 第三站，匹诺康尼！\n这里的读者口味刁钻啊…或许我该想想办法。
steps.en: Third stop, Penacony!\nThe readers here are rather picky... I should probably do something.

steps.ch: 整理思绪
steps.en: Collect your thoughts

steps.ch: 第三站，匹诺康尼！\n爱德华医生夸赞了我的作品，莫非我真的是天才？
steps.en: Third stop, Penacony!\nDr. Edward praises my work. Could I really be a genius?

steps.ch: 询问爱德华医生的意见
steps.en: Ask Dr. Edward's opinion

steps.ch: 最后一站，空间站「黑塔」！\n这可是一手资料哦，站长一定会喜欢的。
steps.en: Final stop, the Herta Space Station!\nThis is first-hand intel. The Lead Researcher is sure to love it.

steps.ch: 向艾丝妲推荐《如我所书》
steps.en: Recommend As I've Written to Asta

steps.ch: 这回是真的走到最后了。我们的故事，会被寰宇铭记吧？\n翁法罗斯，明天见。
steps.en: This is truly the end of the road. Will the universe remember our story?\nSee you tomorrow, Amphoreus.

steps.ch: 回到列车，为旅途画上句号
steps.en: Return to the Express and bring this journey to a close

quests.name_ch: 帷后，酬酢与秘密
quests.name_en: Behind the Curtain, Pleasantries and Secrets
